columns = []\n        col_rows = safe_fetch(cursor, \"\"\"\n            SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default\n            FROM information_schema.columns\n            WHERE table_schema = %s AND table_name = %s\n            ORDER BY ordinal_position\n        \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name))\n        for col in col_rows:\n            col_name, data_type, is_nullable, col_default = col\n            col_comment = None\n            try:\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT col_description(('%s.%s'::regclass), ordinal_position)\n                    FROM information_schema.columns\n                    WHERE table_schema = %s AND table_name = %s AND column_name = %s\n                \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name, schema_name, table_name, col_name))\n                cc = cursor.fetchone()\n                if cc:\n                    col_comment = cc[0]\n            except:\n                pass\n            columns.append({\n                \"name\": col_name,\n                \"data_type\": data_type,\n                \"nullable\": is_nullable == 'YES',\n                \"default\": col_default,\n                \"comment\": col_comment\n            })\n        pk_rows = safe_fetch(cursor, \"\"\"\n            SELECT kc.column_name\n            FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc\n            JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kc\n                ON tc.constraint_name = kc.constraint_name\n                AND tc.table_schema = kc.table_schema\n            WHERE tc.table_schema = %s AND tc.table_name = %s\n                AND tc.constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY'\n            ORDER BY kc.ordinal_position\n        \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name))\n        pk = [row[0] for row in pk_rows]\n        fk_rows = safe_fetch(cursor, \"\"\"\n            SELECT kc.column_name, ccu.table_schema, ccu.table_name, ccu.column_name\n            FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc\n            JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kc\n                ON tc.constraint_name = kc.constraint_name\n                AND tc.table_schema = kc.table_schema\n            JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu\n                ON ccu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name\n                AND ccu.table_schema = tc.table_schema\n            WHERE tc.table_schema = %s AND tc.table_name = %s\n                AND tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY'\n        \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name))\n        fk = [{\"column\": r[0], \"ref_table\": f\"{r[1]}.{r[2]}\", \"ref_column\": r[3]} for r in fk_rows]\n\n        # Данные\n        table_data = None\n        if include_data or (extra_tables and f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\" in extra_tables):\n            try:\n                cursor.execute(sql.SQL(\"SELECT * FROM {}.{} LIMIT %s\").format(\n                    sql.Identifier(schema_name),\n                    sql.Identifier(table_name)\n                ), (data_limit,))\n                rows_data = cursor.fetchall()\n                if rows_data:\n                    cols = [desc[0] for desc in cursor.description]\n                    data_rows = []\n                    for row in rows_data:\n                        row_dict = {}\n                        for i, col in enumerate(cols):\n                            val = row[i]\n                            if isinstance(val, (datetime, date, time, Decimal)):\n                                val = json_serializer(val)\n                            row_dict[col] = val\n                        data_rows.append(row_dict)\n                    table_data = data_rows\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"      Ошибка выгрузки данных {schema_name}.{table_name}: {e}\")\n                table_data = None\n\n        tables.append({\n            \"name\": table_name,\n            \"comment\": comment,\n            \"columns\": columns,\n            \"primary_key\": pk,\n            \"foreign_keys\": fk,\n            \"data\": table_data\n        })\n    return tables\n\ndef get_views_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    views = []\n    rows = safe_fetch(cursor, \"\"\"\n        SELECT table_name, view_definition\n        FROM information_schema.views\n        WHERE table_schema = %s\n        ORDER BY table_name\n    \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n    for view_name, definition in rows:\n        comment = None\n        try:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT obj_description('%s.%s'::regclass)\", (schema_name, view_name))\n            row = cursor.fetchone()\n            if row:\n                comment = row[0]\n        except:\n            pass\n        columns = []\n        col_rows = safe_fetch(cursor, \"\"\"\n            SELECT column_name, data_type\n            FROM information_schema.columns\n            WHERE table_schema = %s AND table_name = %s\n            ORDER BY ordinal_position\n        \"\"\", (schema_name, view_name))\n        columns = [{\"name\": r[0], \"data_type\": r[1]} for r in col_rows]\n        views.append({\n            \"name\": view_name,\n            \"definition\": definition,\n            \"columns\": columns,\n            \"comment\": comment\n        })\n    return views\n\ndef get_functions_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    rows = safe_fetch(cursor, \"\"\"\n        SELECT p.proname, pg_get_function_arguments(p.oid), pg_get_function_result(p.oid),\n               pg_get_functiondef(p.oid), obj_description(p.oid), p.prokind\n        FROM pg_proc p\n        JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid\n        WHERE n.nspname = %s\n        ORDER BY p.proname\n    \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n    functions = []\n    for row in rows:\n        functions.append({\n            \"name\": row[0],\n            \"arguments\": row[1],\n            \"result_type\": row[2] if row[2] else \"void\",\n            \"definition\": row[3],\n            \"comment\": row[4],\n            \"kind\": \"procedure\" if row[5] == 'p' else \"function\"\n        })\n    return functions\n\ndef get_indexes_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    rows = safe_fetch(cursor, \"\"\"\n        SELECT i.relname, t.relname, pg_get_indexdef(idx.indexrelid), idx.indisunique, am.amname\n        FROM pg_index idx\n        JOIN pg_class i ON idx.indexrelid = i.oid\n        JOIN pg_class t ON idx.indrelid = t.oid\n        JOIN pg_namespace n ON t.relnamespace = n.oid\n        JOIN pg_am am ON i.relam = am.oid\n        WHERE n.nspname = %s\n        ORDER BY i.relname\n    \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n    indexes = []\n    for idx_name, table_name, definition, is_unique, method in rows:\n        indexes.append({\n            \"name\": idx_name,\n            \"table\": f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",\n            \"definition\": definition,\n            \"unique\": is_unique,\n            \"method\": method\n        })\n    return indexes\n\ndef draw_text(c, text, x, y, font_name, font_size, max_width, leading, margin_bottom):\n    \"\"\"Рисует текст с переносом строк, возвращает новую y.\"\"\"\n    c.setFont(font_name, font_size)\n    lines = []\n    for para in text.splitlines():\n        if c.stringWidth(para, font_name, font_size) <= max_width:\n            lines.append(para)\n        else:\n            words = para.split(' ')\n            cur = ''\n            for w in words:\n                test = cur + (' ' if cur else '') + w\n                if c.stringWidth(test, font_name, font_size) <= max_width:\n                    cur = test\n                else:\n                    if cur:\n                        lines.append(cur)\n                    cur = w\n            if cur:\n                lines.append(cur)\n    for line in lines:\n        if y - leading < margin_bottom:\n            c.showPage()\n            c.setFont(font_name, font_size)\n            y = A4[1] - 20*mm\n        c.drawString(x, y, line)\n        y -= leading\n    return y\n\ndef generate_pdf(schema_data, output_file):\n    c = canvas.Canvas(output_file, pagesize=A4)\n    page_width, page_height = A4\n    margin_top = 20 * mm\n    margin_left = 15 * mm\n    margin_right = 15 * mm\n    margin_bottom = 20 * mm\n    text_width = page_width - margin_left - margin_right\n    y = page_height - margin_top\n    font_normal = CYRILLIC_FONT\n    font_bold = CYRILLIC_FONT\n    size_title = 16\n    size_schema = 14\n    size_table = 12\n    size_text = 9\n    leading = 4\n\n    c.setFont(font_bold, size_title)\n    c.drawString(margin_left, y, \"PostgreSQL Database Structure Export\")\n    y -= 10\n    c.setFont(font_normal, size_text)\n    y = draw_text(c, f\"Generated: {datetime.now().isoformat()}\", margin_left, y,\n                  font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n\n    for schema_name, schema in schema_data.items():\n        if y < margin_bottom + 20:\n            c.showPage()\n            y = page_height - margin_top\n        c.setFont(font_bold, size_schema)\n        c.setFillColor(blue)\n        c.drawString(margin_left, y, f\"Schema: {schema_name}\")\n        y -= 8\n        c.setFillColor(black)\n        c.setFont(font_normal, size_text)\n        if schema.get('comment'):\n            y = draw_text(c, f\"Comment: {schema['comment']}\", margin_left, y,\n                          font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n            y -= 2\n        # Таблицы\n        for table in schema.get('tables', []):\n            if y < margin_bottom + 40:\n                c.showPage()\n                y = page_height - margin_top\n            c.setFont(font_bold, size_table)\n            c.drawString(margin_left, y, f\"Table: {table['name']}\")\n            y -= 6\n            c.setFont(font_normal, size_text)\n            if table.get('comment'):\n                y = draw_text(c, f\"  Comment: {table['comment']}\", margin_left, y,\n                              font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n            # Колонки\n            y = draw_text(c, \"  Columns:\", margin_left, y,\n                          font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n            for col in table['columns']:\n                col_str = f\"    {col['name']} {col['data_type']}\"\n                if not col['nullable']:\n                    col_str += \" NOT NULL\"\n                if col['default']:\n                    col_str += f\" DEFAULT {col['default']}\"\n                if col.get('comment'):\n                    col_str += f\"  -- {col['comment']}\"\n                y = draw_text(c, col_str, margin_left, y,\n                              font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n            # PK\n            if table['primary_key']:\n                y = draw_text(c, f\"  Primary Key: {', '.join(table['primary_key'])}\", margin_left, y,\n                              font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n            # FK\n            for fk in table['foreign_keys']:\n                y = draw_text(c, f\"  Foreign Key: {fk['column']} -> {fk['ref_table']}.{fk['ref_column']}\", margin_left, y,\n                              font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n            # Данные\n            if table.get('data'):\n                y = draw_text(c, f\"  Sample Data (max {len(table['data'])} rows):\", margin_left, y,\n                              font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n                for row in table['data']:\n                    row_str = \"    \" + \", \".join(f\"{k}={v}\" for k, v in row.items())\n                    y = draw_text(c, row_str[:120], margin_left, y,\n                                  font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n            y -= 4\n        # Индексы\n        for idx in schema.get('indexes', []):\n            if y < margin_bottom + 20:\n                c.showPage()\n                y = page_height - margin_top\n            y = draw_text(c, f\"Index: {idx['name']} on {idx['table']} ({idx['method']}) unique={idx['unique']}\", margin_left, y,\n                          font_normal, size_text, text_width, leading, margin_bottom)\n        # Здесь можно добавить представления и функции, но для краткости опущено\n        c.showPage()\n        y = page_height - margin_top\n    c.save()\n    print(f\"PDF сохранён: {output_file}\")\n\ndef main():\n    # Определяем схемы для обработки\n    schemas_to_process = []\n    for schema in ALL_SCHEMAS:\n        flag = SCHEMAS_CONFIG.get(schema)\n        if flag is not None:\n            if flag == 1:\n                schemas_to_process.append(schema)\n        else:\n            schemas_to_process.append(schema)\n\n    # Определяем схемы для выгрузки данных\n    schemas_to_load_data = set()\n    extra_tables_set = set(EXTRA_DATA_TABLES)\n    if ALL != -1:\n        if ALL == 1:\n            schemas_to_load_data = set(schemas_to_process)\n        else:  # ALL == 0\n            schemas_to_load_data = set(schemas_to_process) - {'data', 'ext'}\n    else:\n        # Если ALL=-1, данные не грузим ни для каких схем, но если указаны явные таблицы – грузим для них\n        pass\n\n    # Принудительно добавляем схемы для явных таблиц\n    for tab in EXTRA_DATA_TABLES:\n        if '.' in tab:\n            sch, _ = tab.split('.', 1)\n            if sch in schemas_to_process:\n                schemas_to_load_data.add(sch)\n\n    conn = get_connection()\n    conn.autocommit = True\n    cursor = conn.cursor()\n    result = {}\n    for schema in schemas_to_process:\n        print(f\"Обработка схемы: {schema}\")\n        include_data = (schema in schemas_to_load_data)\n        tables = get_tables_metadata(cursor, schema, include_data=include_data, extra_tables=extra_tables_set, data_limit=DATA_LIMIT)\n        views = get_views_metadata(cursor, schema)\n        functions = get_functions_metadata(cursor, schema)\n        indexes = get_indexes_metadata(cursor, schema)\n        result[schema] = {\n            \"comment\": get_schema_comment(cursor, schema),\n            \"tables\": tables,\n            \"views\": views,\n            \"functions\": functions,\n            \"indexes\": indexes\n        }\n    cursor.close()\n    conn.close()\n    generate_pdf(result, OUTPUT_FILE)\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()",
  "makeJsonDBStruck.py": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\nсамостоятельное получение дстрктуры с серверау\nРасширенный дамп структуры PostgreSQL и выборочно данных.\nРаботает как из командной строки, так и из IDE (задать параметры в секции DEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG).\n\"\"\"\n# !/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\nИсправленный дамп структуры PostgreSQL с полными комментариями, \nпроцедурами, функциями, триггерами и данными.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nimport sys\nimport argparse\nimport os\nimport psycopg2\nfrom psycopg2 import sql\nfrom datetime import date, datetime, time\nfrom decimal import Decimal\n\n# ======================== НАСТРОЙКИ ПО УМОЛЧАНИЮ ========================\nDEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG = {\n    'all': -1,  # -1: только структура, 0: выборочные данные, 1: все данные\n    'schemas': {  # 1 - обрабатывать, 0 - пропустить\n        'ext': 1,\n        'meta': 1,\n        'data': 1,\n        'auth': 1,\n        'autodoc': 1,\n        'lang': 1,\n        'public': 1,\n    },\n    'data_limit': 0,  # 0 - без ограничений, >0 - лимит записей на таблицу\n    'output_file': 'pg_schema_dump_full.json'\n}\n# ========================================================================\n\nALL_SCHEMAS = ['ext', 'meta', 'data', 'auth', 'autodoc', 'lang', 'public']\n\nDEFAULT_DB_CONFIG = {\n    \"host\": \"localhost\",\n    \"port\": 5432,\n    \"dbname\": \"mozart_erp\",\n    \"user\": \"postgres\",\n    \"password\": \"SQLSerIra!\"\n}\n\n\ndef get_connection(config):\n    conn = psycopg2.connect(**config)\n    conn.autocommit = True  # Включаем autocommit чтобы ошибки не ломали транзакцию\n    return conn\n\n\ndef json_serializer(obj):\n    \"\"\"Сериализатор для типов, не поддерживаемых JSON\"\"\"\n    if isinstance(obj, (datetime, date)):\n        return obj.isoformat()\n    if isinstance(obj, time):\n        return obj.strftime('%H:%M:%S')\n    if isinstance(obj, Decimal):\n        return float(obj)\n    if isinstance(obj, bytes):\n        return obj.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')\n    raise TypeError(f\"Object of type {type(obj)} is not JSON serializable\")\n\n\ndef get_schema_comment(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение комментария к схеме\"\"\"\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT obj_description(n.oid, 'pg_namespace')\n            FROM pg_namespace n\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n        row = cursor.fetchone()\n        return row[0] if row and row[0] else None\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения комментария схемы: {e}\")\n        return None\n\n\ndef get_tables_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение полных метаданных таблиц с комментариями\"\"\"\n    tables = []\n\n    try:\n        # Получаем все таблицы схемы\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT c.relname as table_name,\n                   obj_description(c.oid) as table_comment\n            FROM pg_class c\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s \n              AND c.relkind = 'r'\n            ORDER BY c.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        table_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n\n        for table_name, table_comment in table_rows:\n            try:\n                # Получаем колонки с комментариями\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT \n                        a.attname as column_name,\n                        pg_catalog.format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) as data_type,\n                        a.attnotnull as not_null,\n                        pg_get_expr(d.adbin, d.adrelid) as column_default,\n                        col_description(c.oid, a.attnum) as column_comment,\n                        a.attnum as ordinal_position\n                    FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a\n                    LEFT JOIN pg_catalog.pg_attrdef d ON (a.attrelid, a.attnum) = (d.adrelid, d.adnum)\n                    JOIN pg_class c ON a.attrelid = c.oid\n                    WHERE c.relname = %s\n                      AND c.relnamespace = (SELECT oid FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname = %s)\n                      AND a.attnum > 0 \n                      AND NOT a.attisdropped\n                    ORDER BY a.attnum\n                \"\"\", (table_name, schema_name))\n\n                columns = []\n                for col in cursor.fetchall():\n                    col_name, data_type, not_null, default, col_comment, ordinal = col\n                    is_serial = default is not None and 'nextval' in str(default)\n\n                    columns.append({\n                        \"name\": col_name,\n                        \"data_type\": data_type,\n                        \"nullable\": not not_null,\n                        \"default\": default,\n                        \"is_serial\": is_serial,\n                        \"comment\": col_comment.strip() if col_comment else None,\n                        \"ordinal_position\": ordinal\n                    })\n\n                # Получаем первичный ключ\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT a.attname\n                    FROM pg_index i\n                    JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = i.indrelid AND a.attnum = ANY(i.indkey)\n                    WHERE i.indrelid = %s::regclass \n                      AND i.indisprimary\n                    ORDER BY array_position(i.indkey, a.attnum)\n                \"\"\", (f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",))\n                primary_key = [row[0] for row in cursor.fetchall()]\n\n                # Получаем внешние ключи\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT\n                        kcu.column_name,\n                        ccu.table_schema AS ref_schema,\n                        ccu.table_name AS ref_table,\n                        ccu.column_name AS ref_column,\n                        tc.constraint_name\n                    FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc\n                    JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu\n                        ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name\n                        AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema\n                    JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu\n                        ON ccu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name\n                        AND ccu.table_schema = tc.table_schema\n                    WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY'\n                      AND tc.table_schema = %s\n                      AND tc.table_name = %s\n                    ORDER BY kcu.ordinal_position\n                \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name))\n\n                foreign_keys = []\n                for fk in cursor.fetchall():\n                    foreign_keys.append({\n                        \"column\": fk[0],\n                        \"ref_schema\": fk[1],\n                        \"ref_table\": fk[2],\n                        \"ref_column\": fk[3],\n                        \"constraint_name\": fk[4]\n                    })\n\n                # Получаем уникальные ограничения\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT\n                        tc.constraint_name,\n                        kcu.column_name\n                    FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc\n                    JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu\n                        ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name\n                        AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema\n                    WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'UNIQUE'\n                      AND tc.table_schema = %s\n                      AND tc.table_name = %s\n                    ORDER BY tc.constraint_name, kcu.ordinal_position\n                \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name))\n\n                unique_constraints = {}\n                for uc in cursor.fetchall():\n                    const_name, col_name = uc\n                    if const_name not in unique_constraints:\n                        unique_constraints[const_name] = []\n                    unique_constraints[const_name].append(col_name)\n\n                # Получаем check-ограничения\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT\n                        conname,\n                        pg_get_constraintdef(oid) as definition\n                    FROM pg_constraint\n                    WHERE conrelid = %s::regclass\n                      AND contype = 'c'\n                    ORDER BY conname\n                \"\"\", (f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",))\n\n                check_constraints = []\n                for cc in cursor.fetchall():\n                    check_constraints.append({\n                        \"name\": cc[0],\n                        \"definition\": cc[1]\n                    })\n\n                tables.append({\n                    \"name\": table_name,\n                    \"comment\": table_comment.strip() if table_comment else None,\n                    \"columns\": columns,\n                    \"primary_key\": primary_key,\n                    \"foreign_keys\": foreign_keys,\n                    \"unique_constraints\": unique_constraints,\n                    \"check_constraints\": check_constraints\n                })\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка обработки таблицы {table_name}: {e}\")\n                continue\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения таблиц: {e}\")\n\n    return tables\n\n\ndef get_views_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение представлений с комментариями\"\"\"\n    views = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                c.relname as view_name,\n                pg_get_viewdef(c.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(c.oid) as comment\n            FROM pg_class c\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND c.relkind = 'v'\n            ORDER BY c.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for view_name, definition, comment in cursor.fetchall():\n            try:\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT \n                        a.attname as column_name,\n                        pg_catalog.format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) as data_type\n                    FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a\n                    JOIN pg_class c ON a.attrelid = c.oid\n                    WHERE c.relname = %s\n                      AND c.relnamespace = (SELECT oid FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname = %s)\n                      AND a.attnum > 0\n                      AND NOT a.attisdropped\n                    ORDER BY a.attnum\n                \"\"\", (view_name, schema_name))\n\n                columns = [{\"name\": col[0], \"data_type\": col[1]} for col in cursor.fetchall()]\n\n                views.append({\n                    \"name\": view_name,\n                    \"definition\": definition,\n                    \"columns\": columns,\n                    \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None\n                })\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка обработки представления {view_name}: {e}\")\n                continue\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения представлений: {e}\")\n\n    return views\n\n\ndef get_procedures_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение хранимых процедур\"\"\"\n    procedures = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                p.proname,\n                pg_get_function_arguments(p.oid) as arguments,\n                pg_get_functiondef(p.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(p.oid) as comment\n            FROM pg_proc p\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND p.prokind = 'p'\n            ORDER BY p.proname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for proc_name, arguments, definition, comment in cursor.fetchall():\n            procedures.append({\n                \"name\": proc_name,\n                \"arguments\": arguments,\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None,\n                \"type\": \"procedure\"\n            })\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения процедур: {e}\")\n\n    return procedures\n\n\ndef get_functions_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение функций\"\"\"\n    functions = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                p.proname,\n                pg_get_function_arguments(p.oid) as arguments,\n                pg_get_function_result(p.oid) as result_type,\n                pg_get_functiondef(p.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(p.oid) as comment,\n                CASE p.prokind\n                    WHEN 'f' THEN 'function'\n                    WHEN 'w' THEN 'window_function'\n                    WHEN 'a' THEN 'aggregate_function'\n                END as func_type\n            FROM pg_proc p\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND p.prokind IN ('f', 'w', 'a')\n            ORDER BY p.proname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for func_name, arguments, result_type, definition, comment, func_type in cursor.fetchall():\n            functions.append({\n                \"name\": func_name,\n                \"arguments\": arguments,\n                \"result_type\": result_type if result_type else \"void\",\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None,\n                \"type\": func_type\n            })\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения функций: {e}\")\n\n    return functions\n\n\ndef get_triggers_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение триггеров\"\"\"\n    triggers = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                t.tgname,\n                c.relname as table_name,\n                pg_get_triggerdef(t.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(t.oid) as comment,\n                CASE \n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 1 = 1 THEN 'ROW' \n                    ELSE 'STATEMENT' \n                END as trigger_level,\n                CASE \n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 2 = 2 THEN 'BEFORE' \n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 4 = 4 THEN 'AFTER'\n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 64 = 64 THEN 'INSTEAD OF'\n                END as trigger_timing,\n                t.tgtype\n            FROM pg_trigger t\n            JOIN pg_class c ON t.tgrelid = c.oid\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND NOT t.tgisinternal\n            ORDER BY c.relname, t.tgname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for trigger_name, table_name, definition, comment, level, timing, tgtype in cursor.fetchall():\n            events = []\n            if tgtype & 4:\n                events.append('INSERT')\n            if tgtype & 8:\n                events.append('DELETE')\n            if tgtype & 16:\n                events.append('UPDATE')\n            if tgtype & 32:\n                events.append('TRUNCATE')\n\n            triggers.append({\n                \"name\": trigger_name,\n                \"table\": f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None,\n                \"level\": level,\n                \"timing\": timing,\n                \"events\": events\n            })\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения триггеров: {e}\")\n\n    return triggers\n\n\ndef get_indexes_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение индексов\"\"\"\n    indexes = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                i.relname as index_name,\n                c.relname as table_name,\n                pg_get_indexdef(i.oid) as definition,\n                idx.indisunique as is_unique,\n                idx.indisprimary as is_primary,\n                am.amname as index_method,\n                obj_description(i.oid) as comment\n            FROM pg_index idx\n            JOIN pg_class i ON idx.indexrelid = i.oid\n            JOIN pg_class c ON idx.indrelid = c.oid\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            JOIN pg_am am ON i.relam = am.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND NOT idx.indisprimary\n            ORDER BY c.relname, i.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for index_name, table_name, definition, is_unique, is_primary, method, comment in cursor.fetchall():\n            indexes.append({\n                \"name\": index_name,\n                \"table\": f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"is_unique\": is_unique,\n                \"is_primary\": is_primary,\n                \"method\": method,\n                \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None\n            })\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения индексов: {e}\")\n\n    return indexes\n\n\ndef get_sequences_metadata(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение последовательностей\"\"\"\n    sequences = []\n\n    try:\n        # Получаем список последовательностей из pg_class\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                c.relname as sequence_name,\n                obj_description(c.oid) as comment\n            FROM pg_class c\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND c.relkind = 'S'\n            ORDER BY c.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        seq_list = cursor.fetchall()\n\n        for seq_name, comment in seq_list:\n            try:\n                # Получаем параметры через отдельный запрос с pg_sequence (без 's')\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT \n                        seqstart,\n                        seqmin,\n                        seqmax,\n                        seqincrement\n                    FROM pg_sequence s\n                    JOIN pg_class c ON s.seqrelid = c.oid\n                    JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n                    WHERE n.nspname = %s AND c.relname = %s\n                \"\"\", (schema_name, seq_name))\n\n                seq_params = cursor.fetchone()\n\n                if seq_params:\n                    sequences.append({\n                        \"name\": seq_name,\n                        \"start_value\": seq_params[0],\n                        \"minimum_value\": seq_params[1],\n                        \"maximum_value\": seq_params[2],\n                        \"increment\": seq_params[3],\n                        \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None\n                    })\n                else:\n                    # Если не удалось получить параметры, добавляем с базовой информацией\n                    sequences.append({\n                        \"name\": seq_name,\n                        \"start_value\": 1,\n                        \"minimum_value\": 1,\n                        \"maximum_value\": 9223372036854775807,\n                        \"increment\": 1,\n                        \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None\n                    })\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения параметров последовательности {seq_name}: {e}\")\n                # Добавляем с базовой информацией\n                sequences.append({\n                    \"name\": seq_name,\n                    \"start_value\": 1,\n                    \"minimum_value\": 1,\n                    \"maximum_value\": 9223372036854775807,\n                    \"increment\": 1,\n                    \"comment\": comment.strip() if comment else None\n                })\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения списка последовательностей: {e}\")\n\n    return sequences\n\n\ndef get_table_data(cursor, schema_name, table_name, limit=0):\n    \"\"\"Получение данных таблицы\"\"\"\n    try:\n        if limit > 0:\n            cursor.execute(\n                sql.SQL(\"SELECT * FROM {}.{} LIMIT %s\").format(\n                    sql.Identifier(schema_name),\n                    sql.Identifier(table_name)\n                ), (limit,)\n            )\n        else:\n            cursor.execute(\n                sql.SQL(\"SELECT * FROM {}.{}\").format(\n                    sql.Identifier(schema_name),\n                    sql.Identifier(table_name)\n                )\n            )\n\n        rows = cursor.fetchall()\n        if not rows:\n            return []\n\n        columns = [desc[0] for desc in cursor.description]\n        result = []\n        for row in rows:\n            row_dict = {}\n            for i, col in enumerate(columns):\n                val = row[i]\n                if isinstance(val, (datetime, date, time)):\n                    val = val.isoformat()\n                elif isinstance(val, Decimal):\n                    val = float(val)\n                elif isinstance(val, bytes):\n                    val = val.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')\n                row_dict[col] = val\n            result.append(row_dict)\n        return result\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"      Ошибка выгрузки данных из {schema_name}.{table_name}: {e}\")\n        return []\n\n\ndef get_schema_overview(cursor):\n    \"\"\"Получение общей информации о схемах\"\"\"\n    overview = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                n.nspname,\n                obj_description(n.oid, 'pg_namespace') as comment,\n                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_class c WHERE c.relnamespace = n.oid AND c.relkind = 'r') as table_count,\n                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_class c WHERE c.relnamespace = n.oid AND c.relkind = 'v') as view_count,\n                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_proc p WHERE p.pronamespace = n.oid AND p.prokind = 'p') as procedure_count,\n                (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_proc p WHERE p.pronamespace = n.oid AND p.prokind IN ('f', 'w', 'a')) as function_count\n            FROM pg_namespace n\n            WHERE n.nspname IN ('ext', 'meta', 'data', 'auth', 'autodoc', 'lang', 'public')\n            ORDER BY n.nspname\n        \"\"\")\n\n        for schema_name, comment, tbl_count, view_count, proc_count, func_count in cursor.fetchall():\n            overview.append({\n                \"schema_name\": schema_name,\n                \"comment\": comment,\n                \"table_count\": tbl_count,\n                \"view_count\": view_count,\n                \"procedure_count\": proc_count,\n                \"function_count\": func_count\n            })\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"⚠️ Ошибка получения обзора схем: {e}\")\n\n    return overview\n\n\ndef main():\n    if len(sys.argv) == 1:\n        print(\"Запуск без аргументов. Использую настройки из DEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG.\")\n        all_mode = DEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG['all']\n        schemas_config = DEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG['schemas']\n        data_limit = DEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG['data_limit']\n        output_file = DEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG['output_file']\n        config_file = None\n    else:\n        parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Полный дамп структуры PostgreSQL')\n        parser.add_argument('config_file', nargs='?', help='JSON файл с параметрами подключения')\n        parser.add_argument('-all', type=int, choices=[-1, 0, 1], default=0,\n                            help='-1: структура, 0: выборочные данные, 1: все данные')\n        for schema in ALL_SCHEMAS:\n            parser.add_argument(f'-{schema}', type=int, choices=[0, 1], default=1,\n                                help=f'Обрабатывать схему {schema} (1) или нет (0)')\n        parser.add_argument('-limit', type=int, default=0,\n                            help='Лимит записей на таблицу (0 - все)')\n        parser.add_argument('-output', default='pg_schema_dump_full.json',\n                            help='Имя выходного файла')\n        args = parser.parse_args()\n\n        all_mode = args.all\n        schemas_config = {}\n        for schema in ALL_SCHEMAS:\n            schemas_config[schema] = getattr(args, schema, 1)\n        data_limit = args.limit\n        output_file = args.output\n        config_file = args.config_file\n\n    # Загрузка конфигурации подключения\n    if config_file:\n        with open(config_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            config_data = json.load(f)\n        db_cfg = config_data.get(\"db\", {})\n        db_config = {\n            \"host\": db_cfg.get(\"host\", DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG[\"host\"]),\n            \"port\": int(db_cfg.get(\"port\", DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG[\"port\"])),\n            \"dbname\": db_cfg.get(\"name\", DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG[\"dbname\"]),\n            \"user\": db_cfg.get(\"user\", DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG[\"user\"]),\n            \"password\": db_cfg.get(\"pass\", DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG[\"password\"])\n        }\n    else:\n        db_config = DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG\n\n    # Определяем схемы для обработки\n    schemas_to_process = [s for s in ALL_SCHEMAS if schemas_config.get(s, 0) == 1]\n\n    # Определяем для каких схем выгружать данные\n    schemas_to_load_data = set()\n    if all_mode != -1:\n        if all_mode == 1:\n            schemas_to_load_data = set(schemas_to_process)\n        else:\n            schemas_to_load_data = set(schemas_to_process) - {'data', 'ext'}\n\n    print(f\"Будет обработано схем: {len(schemas_to_process)}\")\n    print(f\"Схемы: {', '.join(schemas_to_process)}\")\n    print(f\"Данные будут выгружены для схем: {', '.join(schemas_to_load_data) if schemas_to_load_data else 'нет'}\")\n    if data_limit > 0:\n        print(f\"Лимит записей на таблицу: {data_limit}\")\n\n    try:\n        conn = get_connection(db_config)\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n        result = {\n            \"export_info\": {\n                \"database\": db_config[\"dbname\"],\n                \"host\": db_config[\"host\"],\n                \"export_timestamp\": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n                \"total_schemas\": len(schemas_to_process),\n                \"schemas_list\": schemas_to_process\n            },\n            \"schema_overview\": get_schema_overview(cursor),\n            \"schemas\": {}\n        }\n\n        for schema in schemas_to_process:\n            print(f\"\\n{'=' * 60}\")\n            print(f\"Обработка схемы: {schema}\")\n            print(f\"{'=' * 60}\")\n\n            schema_data = {\n                \"schema_name\": schema,\n                \"comment\": get_schema_comment(cursor, schema),\n                \"tables\": [],\n                \"views\": [],\n                \"procedures\": [],\n                \"functions\": [],\n                \"triggers\": [],\n                \"indexes\": [],\n                \"sequences\": [],\n                \"table_data\": {}\n            }\n\n            # Получаем метаданные с обработкой ошибок\n            print(\"  Получение таблиц...\")\n            schema_data[\"tables\"] = get_tables_metadata(cursor, schema)\n            print(f\"    Найдено таблиц: {len(schema_data['tables'])}\")\n\n            print(\"  Получение представлений...\")\n            schema_data[\"views\"] = get_views_metadata(cursor, schema)\n            print(f\"    Найдено представлений: {len(schema_data['views'])}\")\n\n            print(\"  Получение процедур...\")\n            schema_data[\"procedures\"] = get_procedures_metadata(cursor, schema)\n            print(f\"    Найдено процедур: {len(schema_data['procedures'])}\")\n\n            print(\"  Получение функций...\")\n            schema_data[\"functions\"] = get_functions_metadata(cursor, schema)\n            print(f\"    Найдено функций: {len(schema_data['functions'])}\")\n\n            print(\"  Получение триггеров...\")\n            schema_data[\"triggers\"] = get_triggers_metadata(cursor, schema)\n            print(f\"    Найдено триггеров: {len(schema_data['triggers'])}\")\n\n            print(\"  Получение индексов...\")\n            schema_data[\"indexes\"] = get_indexes_metadata(cursor, schema)\n            print(f\"    Найдено индексов: {len(schema_data['indexes'])}\")\n\n            print(\"  Получение последовательностей...\")\n            schema_data[\"sequences\"] = get_sequences_metadata(cursor, schema)\n            print(f\"    Найдено последовательностей: {len(schema_data['sequences'])}\")\n\n            # Выгружаем данные если нужно\n            if schema in schemas_to_load_data:\n                print(f\"  Выгрузка данных...\")\n                for table in schema_data[\"tables\"]:\n                    table_name = table[\"name\"]\n                    print(f\"    Таблица: {schema}.{table_name}\")\n                    rows = get_table_data(cursor, schema, table_name, limit=data_limit)\n                    if rows:\n                        schema_data[\"table_data\"][table_name] = rows\n                        print(f\"      Записей: {len(rows)}\")\n\n            result[\"schemas\"][schema] = schema_data\n\n        # Сохраняем результат\n        print(f\"\\n{'=' * 60}\")\n        print(\"Сохранение результата...\")\n        with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            json.dump(result, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2, default=json_serializer)\n\n        # Статистика\n        total_tables = sum(len(s[\"tables\"]) for s in result[\"schemas\"].values())\n        total_views = sum(len(s[\"views\"]) for s in result[\"schemas\"].values())\n        total_procedures = sum(len(s[\"procedures\"]) for s in result[\"schemas\"].values())\n        total_functions = sum(len(s[\"functions\"]) for s in result[\"schemas\"].values())\n        total_triggers = sum(len(s[\"triggers\"]) for s in result[\"schemas\"].values())\n\n        print(f\"\\n{'=' * 60}\")\n        print(\"СТАТИСТИКА ЭКСПОРТА\")\n        print(f\"{'=' * 60}\")\n        print(f\"Схем:           {len(result['schemas'])}\")\n        print(f\"Таблиц:         {total_tables}\")\n        print(f\"Представлений:  {total_views}\")\n        print(f\"Процедур:       {total_procedures}\")\n        print(f\"Функций:        {total_functions}\")\n        print(f\"Триггеров:      {total_triggers}\")\n        print(f\"\\nФайл: {output_file}\")\n\n        # Размер файла\n        if os.path.exists(output_file):\n            file_size = os.path.getsize(output_file)\n            if file_size > 1024 * 1024:\n                print(f\"Размер: {file_size / (1024 * 1024):.2f} MB\")\n            else:\n                print(f\"Размер: {file_size / 1024:.2f} KB\")\n\n        cursor.close()\n        conn.close()\n        print(\"\\n✅ Экспорт успешно завершен!\")\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"❌ Критическая ошибка: {e}\")\n        import traceback\n        traceback.print_exc()\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()",
  "makeJsonDBStruck2.py": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\nРасширенный дамп структуры PostgreSQL с гибкой настройкой выгрузки.\nУправление - только через словари внутри скрипта.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport psycopg2\nfrom psycopg2 import sql\nfrom datetime import date, datetime, time\nfrom decimal import Decimal\n\n# ======================== ПОДКЛЮЧЕНИЕ К БД ========================\nDEFAULT_DB_CONFIG = {\n    \"host\": \"localhost\",\n    \"port\": 5432,\n    \"dbname\": \"mozart_erp\",\n    \"user\": \"postgres\",\n    \"password\": \"SQLSerIra!\"\n}\n\n# ======================== НАСТРОЙКИ ВЫГРУЗКИ ========================\nDEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG = {\n    'output_file': '/home/sergey/Documents/автодок20052026/pg_schema_dump_pr.json',\n    'data_limit': 0,  # 0 - все записи, >0 - лимит на таблицу\n    'schemas': {\n        'ext': {\n            'structure': 1,\n            'views': 0,\n            'routines': 1,  # процедуры, функции, триггеры\n            'indexes': 0,\n            'sequences': 0,\n            'foreign_keys': 0,\n            'comments': 1,\n            'data': 0,\n        },\n        'meta': {\n            'structure': 1,\n            'views': 0,\n            'routines': 1,\n            'indexes': 0,\n            'sequences': 0,\n            'foreign_keys': 0,\n            'comments': 0,\n            'data': 1,\n        },\n        'data': {\n            'structure': 1,\n            'views': 0,\n            'routines': 1,\n            'indexes': 0,\n            'sequences': 0,\n            'foreign_keys': 0,\n            'comments': 0,\n            'data': 0,\n        },\n        'auth': {\n            'structure': 1,\n            'views': 0,\n            'routines': 1,\n            'indexes': 0,\n            'sequences': 0,\n            'foreign_keys': 0,\n            'comments': 0,\n            'data': 0,\n        },\n        'autodoc': {\n            'structure': 1,\n            'views': 0,\n            'routines': 1,\n            'indexes': 0,\n            'sequences': 0,\n            'foreign_keys': 0,\n            'comments': 0,\n            'data': 0,\n        },\n        'lang': {\n            'structure': 1,\n            'views': 0,\n            'routines': 1,\n            'indexes': 0,\n            'sequences': 0,\n            'foreign_keys': 0,\n            'comments': 0,\n            'data': 1,\n        },\n        'public': {\n            'structure': 1,\n            'views': 0,\n            'routines': 1,\n            'indexes': 0,\n            'sequences': 0,\n            'foreign_keys': 0,\n            'comments': 0,\n            'data': 0,\n        },\n    }\n}\n\nALL_SCHEMAS = ['ext', 'meta', 'data', 'auth', 'autodoc', 'lang', 'public']\n\n\n# ===================================================================\n\n\ndef get_connection(config):\n    conn = psycopg2.connect(**config)\n    conn.autocommit = True\n    return conn\n\n\ndef json_serializer(obj):\n    \"\"\"Сериализатор для типов, не поддерживаемых JSON\"\"\"\n    if isinstance(obj, (datetime, date)):\n        return obj.isoformat()\n    if isinstance(obj, time):\n        return obj.strftime('%H:%M:%S')\n    if isinstance(obj, Decimal):\n        return float(obj)\n    if isinstance(obj, bytes):\n        return obj.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')\n    raise TypeError(f\"Object of type {type(obj)} is not JSON serializable\")\n\n\ndef get_schema_comment(cursor, schema_name):\n    \"\"\"Получение комментария к схеме\"\"\"\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT obj_description(n.oid, 'pg_namespace')\n            FROM pg_namespace n\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n        row = cursor.fetchone()\n        return row[0] if row and row[0] else None\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения комментария схемы: {e}\")\n        return None\n\n\ndef get_tables_metadata(cursor, schema_name, include_fk, include_comments):\n    \"\"\"Получение метаданных таблиц\"\"\"\n    tables = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT c.relname as table_name,\n                   obj_description(c.oid) as table_comment\n            FROM pg_class c\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s \n              AND c.relkind = 'r'\n            ORDER BY c.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        table_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n\n        for table_name, table_comment in table_rows:\n            try:\n                # Получаем колонки\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT \n                        a.attname as column_name,\n                        pg_catalog.format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) as data_type,\n                        a.attnotnull as not_null,\n                        pg_get_expr(d.adbin, d.adrelid) as column_default,\n                        col_description(c.oid, a.attnum) as column_comment,\n                        a.attnum as ordinal_position\n                    FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a\n                    LEFT JOIN pg_catalog.pg_attrdef d ON (a.attrelid, a.attnum) = (d.adrelid, d.adnum)\n                    JOIN pg_class c ON a.attrelid = c.oid\n                    WHERE c.relname = %s\n                      AND c.relnamespace = (SELECT oid FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname = %s)\n                      AND a.attnum > 0 \n                      AND NOT a.attisdropped\n                    ORDER BY a.attnum\n                \"\"\", (table_name, schema_name))\n\n                columns = []\n                for col in cursor.fetchall():\n                    col_name, data_type, not_null, default, col_comment, ordinal = col\n                    is_serial = default is not None and 'nextval' in str(default)\n\n                    col_data = {\n                        \"name\": col_name,\n                        \"data_type\": data_type,\n                        \"nullable\": not not_null,\n                        \"default\": default,\n                        \"is_serial\": is_serial,\n                        \"ordinal_position\": ordinal\n                    }\n                    if include_comments:\n                        col_data[\"comment\"] = col_comment.strip() if col_comment else None\n\n                    columns.append(col_data)\n\n                # Получаем первичный ключ\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT a.attname\n                    FROM pg_index i\n                    JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = i.indrelid AND a.attnum = ANY(i.indkey)\n                    WHERE i.indrelid = %s::regclass \n                      AND i.indisprimary\n                    ORDER BY array_position(i.indkey, a.attnum)\n                \"\"\", (f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",))\n                primary_key = [row[0] for row in cursor.fetchall()]\n\n                # Получаем уникальные ограничения\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT\n                        tc.constraint_name,\n                        kcu.column_name\n                    FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc\n                    JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu\n                        ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name\n                        AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema\n                    WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'UNIQUE'\n                      AND tc.table_schema = %s\n                      AND tc.table_name = %s\n                    ORDER BY tc.constraint_name, kcu.ordinal_position\n                \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name))\n\n                unique_constraints = {}\n                for uc in cursor.fetchall():\n                    const_name, col_name = uc\n                    if const_name not in unique_constraints:\n                        unique_constraints[const_name] = []\n                    unique_constraints[const_name].append(col_name)\n\n                # Получаем check-ограничения\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT\n                        conname,\n                        pg_get_constraintdef(oid) as definition\n                    FROM pg_constraint\n                    WHERE conrelid = %s::regclass\n                      AND contype = 'c'\n                    ORDER BY conname\n                \"\"\", (f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",))\n\n                check_constraints = []\n                for cc in cursor.fetchall():\n                    check_constraints.append({\n                        \"name\": cc[0],\n                        \"definition\": cc[1]\n                    })\n\n                table_data = {\n                    \"name\": table_name,\n                    \"columns\": columns,\n                    \"primary_key\": primary_key,\n                    \"unique_constraints\": unique_constraints,\n                    \"check_constraints\": check_constraints\n                }\n\n                if include_comments and table_comment:\n                    table_data[\"comment\"] = table_comment.strip()\n\n                if include_fk:\n                    # Получаем внешние ключи\n                    cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                        SELECT\n                            kcu.column_name,\n                            ccu.table_schema AS ref_schema,\n                            ccu.table_name AS ref_table,\n                            ccu.column_name AS ref_column,\n                            tc.constraint_name\n                        FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc\n                        JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu\n                            ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name\n                            AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema\n                        JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu\n                            ON ccu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name\n                            AND ccu.table_schema = tc.table_schema\n                        WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY'\n                          AND tc.table_schema = %s\n                          AND tc.table_name = %s\n                        ORDER BY kcu.ordinal_position\n                    \"\"\", (schema_name, table_name))\n\n                    foreign_keys = []\n                    for fk in cursor.fetchall():\n                        foreign_keys.append({\n                            \"column\": fk[0],\n                            \"ref_schema\": fk[1],\n                            \"ref_table\": fk[2],\n                            \"ref_column\": fk[3],\n                            \"constraint_name\": fk[4]\n                        })\n                    table_data[\"foreign_keys\"] = foreign_keys\n\n                tables.append(table_data)\n\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка обработки таблицы {table_name}: {e}\")\n                continue\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения таблиц: {e}\")\n\n    return tables\n\n\ndef get_views_metadata(cursor, schema_name, include_comments):\n    \"\"\"Получение представлений\"\"\"\n    views = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                c.relname as view_name,\n                pg_get_viewdef(c.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(c.oid) as comment\n            FROM pg_class c\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND c.relkind = 'v'\n            ORDER BY c.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for view_name, definition, comment in cursor.fetchall():\n            try:\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT \n                        a.attname as column_name,\n                        pg_catalog.format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) as data_type\n                    FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a\n                    JOIN pg_class c ON a.attrelid = c.oid\n                    WHERE c.relname = %s\n                      AND c.relnamespace = (SELECT oid FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname = %s)\n                      AND a.attnum > 0\n                      AND NOT a.attisdropped\n                    ORDER BY a.attnum\n                \"\"\", (view_name, schema_name))\n\n                columns = [{\"name\": col[0], \"data_type\": col[1]} for col in cursor.fetchall()]\n\n                view_data = {\n                    \"name\": view_name,\n                    \"definition\": definition,\n                    \"columns\": columns\n                }\n                if include_comments and comment:\n                    view_data[\"comment\"] = comment.strip()\n\n                views.append(view_data)\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка обработки представления {view_name}: {e}\")\n                continue\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения представлений: {e}\")\n\n    return views\n\n\ndef get_routines_metadata(cursor, schema_name, include_comments):\n    \"\"\"Получение процедур, функций и триггеров\"\"\"\n    routines = []\n\n    try:\n        # Процедуры\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                p.proname,\n                pg_get_function_arguments(p.oid) as arguments,\n                pg_get_functiondef(p.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(p.oid) as comment,\n                'procedure' as routine_type\n            FROM pg_proc p\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND p.prokind = 'p'\n            ORDER BY p.proname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for proc_name, arguments, definition, comment, routine_type in cursor.fetchall():\n            routine_data = {\n                \"name\": proc_name,\n                \"arguments\": arguments,\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"type\": routine_type\n            }\n            if include_comments and comment:\n                routine_data[\"comment\"] = comment.strip()\n            routines.append(routine_data)\n\n        # Функции\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                p.proname,\n                pg_get_function_arguments(p.oid) as arguments,\n                pg_get_function_result(p.oid) as result_type,\n                pg_get_functiondef(p.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(p.oid) as comment,\n                CASE p.prokind\n                    WHEN 'f' THEN 'function'\n                    WHEN 'w' THEN 'window_function'\n                    WHEN 'a' THEN 'aggregate_function'\n                END as routine_type\n            FROM pg_proc p\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND p.prokind IN ('f', 'w', 'a')\n            ORDER BY p.proname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for func_name, arguments, result_type, definition, comment, routine_type in cursor.fetchall():\n            routine_data = {\n                \"name\": func_name,\n                \"arguments\": arguments,\n                \"result_type\": result_type if result_type else \"void\",\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"type\": routine_type\n            }\n            if include_comments and comment:\n                routine_data[\"comment\"] = comment.strip()\n            routines.append(routine_data)\n\n        # Триггеры\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                t.tgname,\n                c.relname as table_name,\n                pg_get_triggerdef(t.oid) as definition,\n                obj_description(t.oid) as comment,\n                CASE \n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 1 = 1 THEN 'ROW' \n                    ELSE 'STATEMENT' \n                END as trigger_level,\n                CASE \n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 2 = 2 THEN 'BEFORE' \n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 4 = 4 THEN 'AFTER'\n                    WHEN t.tgtype & 64 = 64 THEN 'INSTEAD OF'\n                END as trigger_timing,\n                t.tgtype\n            FROM pg_trigger t\n            JOIN pg_class c ON t.tgrelid = c.oid\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND NOT t.tgisinternal\n            ORDER BY c.relname, t.tgname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for trigger_name, table_name, definition, comment, level, timing, tgtype in cursor.fetchall():\n            events = []\n            if tgtype & 4:\n                events.append('INSERT')\n            if tgtype & 8:\n                events.append('DELETE')\n            if tgtype & 16:\n                events.append('UPDATE')\n            if tgtype & 32:\n                events.append('TRUNCATE')\n\n            trigger_data = {\n                \"name\": trigger_name,\n                \"table\": f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"level\": level,\n                \"timing\": timing,\n                \"events\": events,\n                \"type\": \"trigger\"\n            }\n            if include_comments and comment:\n                trigger_data[\"comment\"] = comment.strip()\n            routines.append(trigger_data)\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения процедур/функций/триггеров: {e}\")\n\n    return routines\n\n\ndef get_indexes_metadata(cursor, schema_name, include_comments):\n    \"\"\"Получение индексов\"\"\"\n    indexes = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                i.relname as index_name,\n                c.relname as table_name,\n                pg_get_indexdef(i.oid) as definition,\n                idx.indisunique as is_unique,\n                idx.indisprimary as is_primary,\n                am.amname as index_method,\n                obj_description(i.oid) as comment\n            FROM pg_index idx\n            JOIN pg_class i ON idx.indexrelid = i.oid\n            JOIN pg_class c ON idx.indrelid = c.oid\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            JOIN pg_am am ON i.relam = am.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND NOT idx.indisprimary\n            ORDER BY c.relname, i.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        for index_name, table_name, definition, is_unique, is_primary, method, comment in cursor.fetchall():\n            index_data = {\n                \"name\": index_name,\n                \"table\": f\"{schema_name}.{table_name}\",\n                \"definition\": definition,\n                \"is_unique\": is_unique,\n                \"is_primary\": is_primary,\n                \"method\": method\n            }\n            if include_comments and comment:\n                index_data[\"comment\"] = comment.strip()\n            indexes.append(index_data)\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения индексов: {e}\")\n\n    return indexes\n\n\ndef get_sequences_metadata(cursor, schema_name, include_comments):\n    \"\"\"Получение последовательностей\"\"\"\n    sequences = []\n\n    try:\n        cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                c.relname as sequence_name,\n                obj_description(c.oid) as comment\n            FROM pg_class c\n            JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n            WHERE n.nspname = %s\n              AND c.relkind = 'S'\n            ORDER BY c.relname\n        \"\"\", (schema_name,))\n\n        seq_list = cursor.fetchall()\n\n        for seq_name, comment in seq_list:\n            try:\n                cursor.execute(\"\"\"\n                    SELECT \n                        seqstart,\n                        seqmin,\n                        seqmax,\n                        seqincrement\n                    FROM pg_sequence s\n                    JOIN pg_class c ON s.seqrelid = c.oid\n                    JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid\n                    WHERE n.nspname = %s AND c.relname = %s\n                \"\"\", (schema_name, seq_name))\n\n                seq_params = cursor.fetchone()\n\n                seq_data = {\n                    \"name\": seq_name,\n                    \"start_value\": seq_params[0] if seq_params else 1,\n                    \"minimum_value\": seq_params[1] if seq_params else 1,\n                    \"maximum_value\": seq_params[2] if seq_params else 9223372036854775807,\n                    \"increment\": seq_params[3] if seq_params else 1\n                }\n                if include_comments and comment:\n                    seq_data[\"comment\"] = comment.strip()\n                sequences.append(seq_data)\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения параметров последовательности {seq_name}: {e}\")\n                seq_data = {\n                    \"name\": seq_name,\n                    \"start_value\": 1,\n                    \"minimum_value\": 1,\n                    \"maximum_value\": 9223372036854775807,\n                    \"increment\": 1\n                }\n                if include_comments and comment:\n                    seq_data[\"comment\"] = comment.strip()\n                sequences.append(seq_data)\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    ⚠️ Ошибка получения списка последовательностей: {e}\")\n\n    return sequences\n\n\ndef get_table_data(cursor, schema_name, table_name, limit=0):\n    \"\"\"Получение данных таблицы\"\"\"\n    try:\n        if limit > 0:\n            cursor.execute(\n                sql.SQL(\"SELECT * FROM {}.{} LIMIT %s\").format(\n                    sql.Identifier(schema_name),\n                    sql.Identifier(table_name)\n                ), (limit,)\n            )\n        else:\n            cursor.execute(\n                sql.SQL(\"SELECT * FROM {}.{}\").format(\n                    sql.Identifier(schema_name),\n                    sql.Identifier(table_name)\n                )\n            )\n\n        rows = cursor.fetchall()\n        if not rows:\n            return []\n\n        columns = [desc[0] for desc in cursor.description]\n        result = []\n        for row in rows:\n            row_dict = {}\n            for i, col in enumerate(columns):\n                val = row[i]\n                if isinstance(val, (datetime, date, time)):\n                    val = val.isoformat()\n                elif isinstance(val, Decimal):\n                    val = float(val)\n                elif isinstance(val, bytes):\n                    val = val.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')\n                row_dict[col] = val\n            result.append(row_dict)\n        return result\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"      Ошибка выгрузки данных из {schema_name}.{table_name}: {e}\")\n        return []\n\n\ndef main():\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n    print(\"ЗАПУСК ЭКСПОРТА СТРУКТУРЫ И ДАННЫХ POSTGRESQL\")\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n\n    # Загружаем настройки\n    config = DEFAULT_RUNTIME_CONFIG\n    output_file = config['output_file']\n    data_limit = config['data_limit']\n    schemas_config = config['schemas']\n\n    # Проверяем, что все схемы из ALL_SCHEMAS описаны\n    missing_schemas = set(ALL_SCHEMAS) - set(schemas_config.keys())\n    if missing_schemas:\n        print(f\"❌ Ошибка: не все схемы описаны в конфигурации. Отсутствуют: {missing_schemas}\")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    print(f\"Файл выгрузки: {output_file}\")\n    print(f\"Лимит записей на таблицу: {data_limit if data_limit > 0 else 'без лимита'}\")\n    print(\"\\nНастройки выгрузки по схемам:\")\n    for schema in ALL_SCHEMAS:\n        cfg = schemas_config[schema]\n        print(f\"  {schema}: структура={cfg['structure']}, представления={cfg['views']}, \"\n              f\"проц/функ/триг={cfg['routines']}, индексы={cfg['indexes']}, \"\n              f\"последоват={cfg['sequences']}, внеш.ключи={cfg['foreign_keys']}, \"\n              f\"комментарии={cfg['comments']}, данные={cfg['data']}\")\n\n    try:\n        conn = get_connection(DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG)\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        print(f\"\\n✅ Подключено к {DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG['host']}:{DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG['port']}/{DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG['dbname']}\")\n\n        result = {\n            \"export_info\": {\n                \"database\": DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG[\"dbname\"],\n                \"host\": DEFAULT_DB_CONFIG[\"host\"],\n                \"export_timestamp\": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n                \"schemas_processed\": ALL_SCHEMAS\n            },\n            \"schemas\": {}\n        }\n\n        for schema in ALL_SCHEMAS:\n            print(f\"\\n{'=' * 60}\")\n            print(f\"ОБРАБОТКА СХЕМЫ: {schema}\")\n            print(f\"{'=' * 60}\")\n\n            cfg = schemas_config[schema]\n\n            schema_data = {\n                \"schema_name\": schema,\n            }\n\n            # Комментарий схемы\n            if cfg['comments']:\n                schema_data[\"comment\"] = get_schema_comment(cursor, schema)\n\n            # Структура (таблицы)\n            if cfg['structure']:\n                print(\"  Таблицы...\")\n                schema_data[\"tables\"] = get_tables_metadata(\n                    cursor, schema,\n                    include_fk=cfg['foreign_keys'],\n                    include_comments=cfg['comments']\n                )\n                print(f\"    Таблиц: {len(schema_data.get('tables', []))}\")\n\n            # Представления\n            if cfg['views']:\n                print(\"  Представления...\")\n                schema_data[\"views\"] = get_views_metadata(cursor, schema, cfg['comments'])\n                print(f\"    Представлений: {len(schema_data.get('views', []))}\")\n\n            # Процедуры, функции, триггеры\n            if cfg['routines']:\n                print(\"  Процедуры, функции, триггеры...\")\n                schema_data[\"routines\"] = get_routines_metadata(cursor, schema, cfg['comments'])\n                print(f\"    Объектов: {len(schema_data.get('routines', []))}\")\n\n            # Индексы\n            if cfg['indexes']:\n                print(\"  Индексы...\")\n                schema_data[\"indexes\"] = get_indexes_metadata(cursor, schema, cfg['comments'])\n                print(f\"    Индексов: {len(schema_data.get('indexes', []))}\")\n\n            # Последовательности\n            if cfg['sequences']:\n                print(\"  Последовательности...\")\n                schema_data[\"sequences\"] = get_sequences_metadata(cursor, schema, cfg['comments'])\n                print(f\"    Последовательностей: {len(schema_data.get('sequences', []))}\")\n\n            #
