      "models.py": "# mozart_import/core/models.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Optional, Any\nfrom enum import Enum\n\n\nclass SourceType(Enum):\n    FILE = \"file\"\n    DATABASE = \"database\"\n    URL = \"url\"\n\n\nclass FileFormat(Enum):\n    JSON = \"json\"\n    XML = \"xml\"\n    DBF = \"dbf\"\n    CSV = \"csv\"\n    EXCEL = \"excel\"\n\n\nclass FieldType(Enum):\n    STRING = \"string\"\n    INTEGER = \"integer\"\n    FLOAT = \"float\"\n    BOOLEAN = \"boolean\"\n    DATE = \"date\"\n    DATETIME = \"datetime\"\n    TIME = \"time\"\n    BINARY = \"binary\"\n\n\n# Вспомогательные классы для визуализации графа\nclass NodeType(Enum):\n    SOURCE_TABLE = \"source_table\"\n    MOZART_ENTITY = \"mozart_entity\"\n\n\nclass DataType(Enum):\n    STRING = \"string\"\n    INTEGER = \"integer\"\n    FLOAT = \"float\"\n    BOOLEAN = \"boolean\"\n    DATE = \"date\"\n    DATETIME = \"datetime\"\n\n\nclass LinkType(Enum):\n    IMPORT = \"import\"\n    FK_SOURCE = \"fk_source\"\n    COMPOSITION = \"composition\"\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Field:\n    name: str\n    data_type: DataType       "mozart_matcher.py": "# mozart_import/core/mozart_matcher.py\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Optional, Any, Tuple\nfrom difflib import SequenceMatcher\nfrom .models import SourceSchema, SourceTable, SourceField, FieldType\nfrom .models import MatchedEntity, MatchedField, MappingProposal\nfrom database import DatabaseService\n\n\nclass MozartMatcher:\n    \"\"\"\n    Сопоставляет исходную схему (SourceSchema) с метаданными Mozart.\n    Возвращает MappingProposal с предложениями по сущностям и полям.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, db: DatabaseService):\n        self.db = db\n        # Загружаем метаданные Mozart при инициализации\n        self.entitytypes = {}  # {id: {cname, calias, class_id, class_alias, fields}}\n        self._load_metadata()\n\n    def _load_metadata(self):\n        # Загружаем сущности\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT e.id, e.cname, e.calias, e.class_id, c.calias as class_alias\n            FROM meta.entitytypes e\n            JOIN meta.entity_classes c ON e.class_id = c.id\n            ORDER BY e.cname\n        \"\"\")\n        for row in rows:\n            eid, cname, calias, class_id, class_alias = row\n            self.entitytypes[eid] = {\n                'cname': cname,\n                'calias': calias,\n                'class_id': class_id,\n                'class_alias': class_alias,\n                'fields': {}\n            }\n        # Загружаем поля\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT f.entitytypeid, f.cfieldname, f.calias, f.cfieldtype,\n                   f.ref_entitytypeid, ft.cname as type_name\n            FROM meta.fields f\n            JOIN meta.field_types ft ON f.cfieldtype = ft.ccode\n            ORDER BY f.entitytypeid, f.isortorder\n        \"\"\")\n        for row in rows:\n            eid, cfieldname, calias, cfieldtype, ref_eid, type_name = row\n            if eid in self.entitytypes:\n                self.entitytypes[eid]['fields'][cfieldname] = {\n                    'calias': calias,\n                    'cfieldtype': cfieldtype,\n                    'ref_entitytypeid': ref_eid,\n                    'type_name': type_name\n                }\n\n    def _similarity(self, a: str, b: str) -> float:\n        return SequenceMatcher(None, a.lower(), b.lower()).ratio()\n\n    def _match_table_to_entity(self, table: SourceTable) -> Tuple[Optional[int], str, float]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Пытается найти подходящую сущность в Mozart по имени таблицы.\n        Возвращает (entity_id, entity_name, confidence)\n        \"\"\"\n        best_id = None\n        best_name = None\n        best_score = 0.0\n        for eid, info in self.entitytypes.items():\n            score = max(self._similarity(table.name, info['cname']),\n                        self._similarity(table.name, info['calias']))\n            if score > best_score:\n                best_score = score\n                best_id = eid\n                best_name = info['cname']\n        if best_score > 0.6:\n            return best_id, best_name, best_score\n        return None, table.name, 0.0\n\n    def _match_field_to_field(self, source_field: SourceField, target_fields: Dict) -> Tuple[Optional[str], float]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Сопоставляет поле источника с полем сущности Mozart по имени и типу.\n        Возвращает (target_field_name, confidence)\n        \"\"\"\n        best_field = None\n        best_score = 0.0\n        for fname, finfo in target_fields.items():\n            name_score = max(self._similarity(source_field.name, fname),\n                             self._similarity(source_field.name, finfo['calias']))\n            type_score = 1.0\n            # Упрощённое соответствие типов\n            if finfo['cfieldtype'] == 'C' and source_field.field_type == FieldType.STRING:\n                type_score = 1.0\n            elif finfo['cfieldtype'] == 'I' and source_field.field_type == FieldType.INTEGER:\n                type_score = 1.0\n            elif finfo['cfieldtype'] == 'N' and source_field.field_type == FieldType.FLOAT:\n                type_score = 1.0\n            elif finfo['cfieldtype'] == 'D' and source_field.field_type == FieldType.DATE:\n                type_score = 1.0\n            elif finfo['cfieldtype'] == 'L' and source_field.field_type == FieldType.BOOLEAN:\n                type_score = 1.0\n            else:\n                type_score = 0.5\n            total = (name_score * 0.7 + type_score * 0.3)\n            if total > best_score:\n                best_score = total\n                best_field = fname\n        if best_score > 0.5:\n            return best_field, best_score\n        return None, 0.0\n\n    def propose(self, source_schema: SourceSchema) -> MappingProposal:\n        \"\"\"\n        Строит MappingProposal для всей исходной схемы.\n        \"\"\"\n        entities = []\n        unresolved = []\n        suggestions = []\n\n        for table in source_schema.tables:\n            entity_id, entity_name, conf = self._match_table_to_entity(table)\n            if entity_id is not None:\n                # Существующая сущность\n                target_fields = self.entitytypes[entity_id]['fields']\n                matched_fields = []\n                for src_field in table.fields:\n                    target_field, fconf = self._match_field_to_field(src_field, target_fields)\n                    if target_field:\n                        is_ref = (target_fields[target_field]['cfieldtype'] == 'R')\n                        ref_entity = target_fields[target_field]['ref_entitytypeid']\n                        matched_fields.append(MatchedField(\n                            source_field=src_field.name,\n                            target_field=target_field,\n                            confidence=fconf,\n                            is_reference=is_ref,\n                            ref_entitytype_id=ref_entity\n                        ))\n                    else:\n                        # Поле не найдено, предлагаем добавить\n                        matched_fields.append(MatchedField(\n                            source_field=src_field.name,\n                            target_field='',  # будет новое\n                            confidence=0.0,\n                            is_reference=False\n                        ))\n                entities.append(MatchedEntity(\n                    source_table=table.name,\n                    target_entity_id=entity_id,\n                    target_entity_name=entity_name,\n                    confidence=conf,\n                    fields=matched_fields,\n                    is_new=False\n                ))\n            else:\n                # Новая сущность\n                unresolved.append(table.name)\n                suggestions.append(table.name)\n\n        return MappingProposal(\n            source_schema=source_schema,\n            entities=entities,\n            unresolved_tables=unresolved,\n            suggestions_for_new_entities=suggestions\n        )",
      "profile_manager.py": "# mozart_import/core/profile_manager.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nimport json\nfrom typing import Optional, List\nfrom database import DatabaseService\nfrom .models import ImportProfile, SourceType\n\n\nclass ProfileManager:\n    def __init__(self, db: DatabaseService):\n        self.db = db\n\n    def save_profile(self, profile: ImportProfile) -> int:\n        source_type_code = profile.source_type.value if profile.source_type else None\n\n        # 1. Сохраняем или обновляем основной профиль\n        if profile.id:\n            self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                UPDATE meta.import_profiles\n                SET profile_name=%s, source_type=%s, source_path=%s,\n                    file_format=%s, db_type=%s, db_host=%s, db_port=%s,\n                    db_name=%s, db_user=%s, db_pass=%s, import_mode=%s,\n                    updated_at=now()\n                WHERE id=%s\n            \"\"\", (profile.name, source_type_code, profile.source_path,\n                  profile.file_format, profile.db_type, profile.db_host,\n                  profile.db_port, profile.db_name, profile.db_user,\n                  profile.db_pass, profile.import_mode, profile.id), fetch=False)\n            # Удаляем старые связанные данные\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_source_links WHERE profile_id=%s\", (profile.id,), fetch=False)\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_mappings WHERE link_id IN (SELECT id FROM meta.import_links WHERE profile_id=%s)\", (profile.id,), fetch=False)\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_links WHERE profile_id=%s\", (profile.id,), fetch=False)\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_target_entities WHERE profile_id=%s\", (profile.id,), fetch=False)\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_source_references WHERE source_table_id IN (SELECT id FROM meta.import_source_tables WHERE profile_id=%s)\", (profile.id,), fetch=False)\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_source_tables WHERE profile_id=%s\", (profile.id,), fetch=False)\n        else:\n            res = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO meta.import_profiles\n                    (profile_name, source_type, source_path, file_format,\n                     db_type, db_host, db_port, db_name, db_user, db_pass, import_mode)\n                VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)\n                RETURNING id\n            \"\"\", (profile.name, source_type_code, profile.source_path,\n                  profile.file_format, profile.db_type, profile.db_host,\n                  profile.db_port, profile.db_name, profile.db_user,\n                  profile.db_pass, profile.import_mode))\n            profile.id = res[0][0]\n\n        # 2. Сохраняем таблицы источника\n        source_table_ids = {}\n        for table in profile.source_tables:\n            res = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO meta.import_source_tables (profile_id, table_name, row_count, sample_data)\n                VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s)\n                RETURNING id\n            \"\"\", (profile.id, table['name'], table.get('row_count'), json.dumps(table.get('sample_rows', []))))\n            source_table_ids[table['name']] = res[0][0]\n\n        # 3. Сохраняем целевые сущности\n        target_entity_ids = {}\n        for entity in profile.target_entities:\n            res = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO meta.import_target_entities (profile_id, entity_id, entity_name)\n                VALUES (%s, %s, %s)\n                RETURNING id\n            \"\"\", (profile.id, entity['id'], entity['name']))\n            target_entity_ids[entity['id']] = res[0][0]\n\n        # 4. Сохраняем связи и маппинги\n        for link in profile.import_links:\n            src_id = source_table_ids.get(link['source_table'])\n            tgt_id = target_entity_ids.get(link['target_entity_id'])\n            if src_id and tgt_id:\n                res = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                    INSERT INTO meta.import_links (profile_id, source_table_id, target_entity_id)\n                    VALUES (%s, %s, %s)\n                    RETURNING id\n                \"\"\", (profile.id, src_id, tgt_id))\n                link_id = res[0][0]\n                self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_mappings WHERE link_id=%s\", (link_id,), fetch=False)\n                for mapping in link['mappings']:\n                    self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                        INSERT INTO meta.import_mappings\n                            (link_id, source_field, target_field, field_type, field_length, is_source_id,\n                             is_reference, ref_src_table, ref_src_key_field)\n                        VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)\n                        ON CONFLICT (link_id, source_field) DO UPDATE SET\n                            target_field = EXCLUDED.target_field,\n                            field_type = EXCLUDED.field_type,\n                            field_length = EXCLUDED.field_length,\n                            is_source_id = EXCLUDED.is_source_id,\n                            is_reference = EXCLUDED.is_reference,\n                            ref_src_table = EXCLUDED.ref_src_table,\n                            ref_src_key_field = EXCLUDED.ref_src_key_field\n                    \"\"\", (link_id, mapping['source_field'], mapping['target_field'],\n                          mapping.get('field_type', 'C'), mapping.get('field_length', 255),\n                          mapping.get('is_source_id', False),\n                          mapping.get('is_reference', False),\n                          mapping.get('ref_source_table', ''),\n                          mapping.get('ref_source_key_field', '')), fetch=False)\n\n        # 5. Сохраняем внутренние связи источника (FK)\n        for fk in profile.source_fk_links:\n            src_id = source_table_ids.get(fk['source_table'])\n            ref_id = source_table_ids.get(fk['target_table'])\n            if src_id and ref_id:\n                self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                    INSERT INTO meta.import_source_links (profile_id, source_table_id, source_field, ref_table_id, ref_field)\n                    VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s)\n                \"\"\", (profile.id, src_id, fk['source_field'], ref_id, fk['target_field']), fetch=False)\n\n        # 6. Сохраняем перекрестные ссылки источника (source_references)\n        for ref in profile.source_references:\n            src_id = source_table_ids.get(ref['source_table'])\n            dst_id = source_table_ids.get(ref['ref_table'])\n            if src_id and dst_id:\n                self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                    INSERT INTO meta.import_source_references (source_table_id, source_field, ref_table_id, ref_key_field)\n                    VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s)\n                    ON CONFLICT (source_table_id, source_field)\n                    DO UPDATE SET ref_table_id = EXCLUDED.ref_table_id, ref_key_field = EXCLUDED.ref_key_field\n                \"\"\", (src_id, ref['source_field'], dst_id, ref['ref_field']), fetch=False)\n\n        return profile.id\n\n    def load_profile(self, profile_id: int) -> Optional[ImportProfile]:\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT id, profile_name, source_type, source_path,\n                   file_format, db_type, db_host, db_port, db_name, db_user, db_pass,\n                   import_mode\n            FROM meta.import_profiles\n            WHERE id = %s\n        \"\"\", (profile_id,))\n        if not rows:\n            return None\n        row = rows[0]\n        profile = ImportProfile(\n            id=row[0],\n            name=row[1],\n            source_type=SourceType(row[2]),\n            source_path=row[3],\n            file_format=row[4],\n            db_type=row[5],\n            db_host=row[6],\n            db_port=row[7],\n            db_name=row[8],\n            db_user=row[9],\n            db_pass=row[10],\n            import_mode=row[11] if len(row) > 11 else 'append'\n        )\n\n        source_tables = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT id, table_name, row_count, sample_data\n            FROM meta.import_source_tables\n            WHERE profile_id = %s\n        \"\"\", (profile_id,))\n        profile.source_tables = []\n        source_table_map = {}\n        for st in source_tables:\n            tbl = {\n                'id': st[0],\n                'name': st[1],\n                'row_count': st[2],\n                'sample_rows': st[3] if st[3] else []\n            }\n            profile.source_tables.append(tbl)\n            source_table_map[st[1]] = st[0]\n\n        target_entities = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT id, entity_id, entity_name\n            FROM meta.import_target_entities\n            WHERE profile_id = %s\n        \"\"\", (profile_id,))\n        profile.target_entities = []\n        target_entity_map = {}\n        for te in target_entities:\n            ent = {'id': te[1], 'name': te[2]}\n            profile.target_entities.append(ent)\n            target_entity_map[te[1]] = te[0]\n\n        links = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT l.id, st.table_name, te.entity_id, te.entity_name\n            FROM meta.import_links l\n            JOIN meta.import_source_tables st ON l.source_table_id = st.id\n            JOIN meta.import_target_entities te ON l.target_entity_id = te.id\n            WHERE l.profile_id = %s\n        \"\"\", (profile_id,))\n        profile.import_links = []\n        for link in links:\n            mappings = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                SELECT source_field, target_field, field_type, field_length, is_source_id,\n                       is_reference, ref_src_table, ref_src_key_field\n                FROM meta.import_mappings\n                WHERE link_id = %s\n            \"\"\", (link[0],))\n            profile.import_links.append({\n                'source_table': link[1],\n                'target_entity_id': link[2],\n                'target_entity_name': link[3],\n                'mappings': [{'source_field': m[0], 'target_field': m[1], 'field_type': m[2],\n                              'field_length': m[3], 'is_source_id': m[4],\n                              'is_reference': m[5], 'ref_source_table': m[6],\n                              'ref_source_key_field': m[7]} for m in mappings]\n            })\n\n        source_fks = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT st1.table_name, ls.source_field, st2.table_name, ls.ref_field\n            FROM meta.import_source_links ls\n            JOIN meta.import_source_tables st1 ON ls.source_table_id = st1.id\n            JOIN meta.import_source_tables st2 ON ls.ref_table_id = st2.id\n            WHERE ls.profile_id = %s\n        \"\"\", (profile_id,))\n        profile.source_fk_links = [{'source_table': f[0], 'source_field': f[1],\n                                    'target_table': f[2], 'target_field': f[3]} for f in source_fks]\n\n        source_refs = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT st1.table_name, srf.source_field, st2.table_name, srf.ref_key_field\n            FROM meta.import_source_references srf\n            JOIN meta.import_source_tables st1 ON srf.source_table_id = st1.id\n            JOIN meta.import_source_tables st2 ON srf.ref_table_id = st2.id\n            WHERE st1.profile_id = %s\n        \"\"\", (profile_id,))\n        profile.source_references = [{'source_table': r[0], 'source_field': r[1],\n                                      'ref_table': r[2], 'ref_field': r[3]} for r in source_refs]\n\n        return profile\n\n    def list_profiles(self) -> List[ImportProfile]:\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT id, profile_name, source_type, source_path\n            FROM meta.import_profiles\n            ORDER BY created_at DESC\n        \"\"\")\n        profiles = []\n        for row in rows:\n            profiles.append(ImportProfile(\n                id=row[0],\n                name=row[1],\n                source_type=SourceType(row[2]),\n                source_path=row[3]\n            ))\n        return profiles\n\n    def delete_profile(self, profile_id: int):\n        self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_profiles WHERE id=%s\", (profile_id,), fetch=False)",
      "schema_analyzer.py": "# mozart_import/core/schema_analyzer.py\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\nfrom collections import Counter\nfrom .models import SourceSchema, SourceTable, SourceField, FieldType\n\n\nclass SchemaAnalyzer:\n    \"\"\"\n    Анализирует исходную схему, добавляет метаинформацию:\n    - предполагаемые первичные ключи (по именам или уникальности)\n    - предполагаемые внешние ключи (по именам полей)\n    - статистику по полям (уникальность, заполненность)\n    - кандидатов на иерархические связи (parent_id и т.п.)\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, schema: SourceSchema):\n        self.schema = schema\n        self._analyze()\n\n    def _analyze(self):\n        for table in self.schema.tables:\n            self._analyze_table(table)\n\n    def _analyze_table(self, table: SourceTable):\n        # 1. Определяем вероятный первичный ключ\n        pk_candidates = []\n        for field in table.fields:\n            if field.is_primary_key:\n                pk_candidates.append(field.name)\n            elif field.name.lower() in ('id', 'code', 'num', 'number', 'key'):\n                pk_candidates.append(field.name)\n        if pk_candidates:\n            table.primary_key = pk_candidates\n        else:\n            # если нет очевидного, предлагаем первый подходящий по типу целочисленный\n            int_fields = [f.name for f in table.fields if f.field_type in (FieldType.INTEGER)]\n            if int_fields:\n                table.primary_key = [int_fields[0]]\n\n        # 2. Определяем вероятные внешние ключи (по именам)\n        fk_candidates = {}\n        for field in table.fields:\n            name_lower = field.name.lower()\n            if name_lower.endswith('_id') or name_lower.startswith('id_') or name_lower in ('parentid', 'parent_id'):\n                # предполагаем, что ссылается на таблицу без последнего суффикса\n                target_table = name_lower.replace('_id', '').replace('id_', '')\n                if target_table == 'parent':\n                    target_table = table.name  # ссылка на саму себя (иерархия)\n                fk_candidates[field.name] = target_table\n        table.foreign_keys = fk_candidates\n\n        # 3. Собираем статистику по полям (если есть sample_rows)\n        if table.sample_rows:\n            for field in table.fields:\n                values = [row.get(field.name) for row in table.sample_rows if row.get(field.name) is not None]\n                field.nullable = len(values) < len(table.sample_rows)\n                # уникальность можно оценить на основе sample\n                unique_vals = len(set(values))\n                if unique_vals > 0 and len(values) > 0:\n                    uniqueness = unique_vals / len(values)\n                    # если в sample все значения уникальны, предполагаем, что поле уникально\n                    if uniqueness == 1.0 and len(values) == len(table.sample_rows):\n                        # помечаем как возможный кандидат на ключ\n                        if not table.primary_key:\n                            table.primary_key = [field.name]\n\n    def get_primary_key_candidates(self, table_name: str) -> List[str]:\n        for table in self.schema.tables:\n            if table.name == table_name and table.primary_key:\n                return table.primary_key\n        return []\n\n    def get_foreign_key_candidates(self, table_name: str) -> Dict[str, str]:\n        for table in self.schema.tables:\n            if table.name == table_name:\n                return table.foreign_keys\n        return {}\n\n    def suggest_hierarchy_field(self, table_name: str) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"Возвращает имя поля, вероятно, указывающего на родителя (для иерархий).\"\"\"\n        for table in self.schema.tables:\n            if table.name == table_name:\n                for field in table.fields:\n                    name_lower = field.name.lower()\n                    if name_lower in ('parentid', 'parent_id', 'pid', 'parent'):\n                        return field.name\n        return None\n\n    def suggest_reference(self, field_name: str) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"По имени поля предполагает целевую сущность для внешней ссылки.\"\"\"\n        name_lower = field_name.lower()\n        if name_lower.endswith('_id'):\n            target = name_lower[:-3]\n        elif name_lower.startswith('id_'):\n            target = name_lower[3:]\n        else:\n            return None\n        # ищем в схеме таблицу с таким именем\n        for table in self.schema.tables:\n            if table.name.lower() == target:\n                return table.name\n        return target  # не найдено, но возвращаем предположение",

      "source_connector.py": ""

            creator.create_fields(link['target_entity_id'], [{\n                        'cfieldname': link['target_field'][:63],\n                        'cfieldtype': 'C',\n                        'calias': link['target_field'].capitalize()[:50],\n                        'nlength': 255\n                    }])\n            elif link['type'] == 'sourceid':\n                check = self.db.execute_query(\n                    \"SELECT id FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid=%s AND cfieldname='sourceid'\",\n                    (link['target_entity_id'],)\n                )\n                if not check:\n                    creator.create_fields(link['target_entity_id'], [{\n                        'cfieldname': 'sourceid',\n                        'cfieldtype': 'C',\n                        'calias': 'Source ID',\n                        'nlength': 100\n                    }])\n\n        # Группировка связей по целевой сущности\n        groups = {}\n        for link in self.import_links:\n            eid = link['target_entity_id']\n            if eid not in groups:\n                groups[eid] = []\n            groups[eid].append(link)\n\n        entities = []\n        for eid, links in groups.items():\n            target_entity = None\n            for ent in self.mozart_entities:\n                if ent['id'] == eid:\n                    target_entity = ent\n menu.addAction(create_action)\n        menu.exec_(self.mozart_tree.mapToGlobal(pos))\n\n    def start_splitter_drag(self, event):\n        self.dragging = True\n        self.drag_start_y = event.globalY()\n        self.start_height = self.links_table.height()\n        self.setCursor(Qt.SizeVerCursor)\n\n    def drag_splitter(self, event):\n        if self.dragging:\n            delta = event.globalY() - self.drag_start_y\n            new_height = self.start_height - delta\n            new_height = max(100, min(600, new_height))\n            self.links_table.setMinimumHeight(new_height)\n            self.links_table.setMaximumHeight(new_height)\n\n    def stop_splitter_drag(self, event):\n        self.dragging = False\n        self.setCursor(Qt.ArrowCursor)\n\n    def add_import_link(self):\n        self.links_manager.add_import_link()\n        self.import_ops.set_import_links(self.links_manager.import_links)\n\n    def save_profile(self):\n        # 1. Сбор данных о таблицах источника\n        source_tables = []\n        for table in self.source_manager.source_tables:\n            sample_rows = table.sample_rows[:5] if table.sample_rows else []\n            source_tables.append({\n                'name': table.name,\n                'row_count': self.connector.get_row_count(table.name),\n                'sample_rows': sample_rows\n            })\n\n        # 2. Сбор целевых сущностей\n        target_entities = []\n        seen = set()\n        for link in self.links_manager.import_links:\n            eid = link['target_entity_id']\n            if eid not in seen:\n                for ent in self.mozart_manager.mozart_entities:\n                    if ent['id'] == eid:\n                        target_entities.append({'id': eid, 'name': ent['cname']})\n                        seen.add(eid)\n                        break\n\n        # 3. Сбор параметров подключения\n        file_format = None\n        db_type = None\n        db_host = None\n        db_port = None\n        db_name = None\n        db_user = None\n        db_pass = None\n\n        if hasattr(self.connector, 'file_format'):\n            # FileConnector\n            file_format = self.connector.file_format.value if isinstance(self.connector.file_format, FileFormat) else str(self.connector.file_format)\n        elif hasattr(self.connector, 'db_type'):\n            # DBConnector\n            db_type = self.connector.db_type\n            db_host = self.connector.host\n            db_port = self.connector.port\n            db_name = self.connector.database\n            db_user = self.connector.user\n            db_pass = self.connector.password\n        # URLConnector не имеет дополнительных полей, кроме source_path\n\n        # Определяем тип источника\n        if hasattr(self.connector, 'file_format'):\n            source_type = SourceType.FILE\n        elif hasattr(self.connector, 'db_type'):\n            source_type = SourceType.DATABASE\n        else:\n            source_type = SourceType.URL\n\n        profile = ImportProfile(\n            name=self.connector.source_path,\n            source_type=source_type,\n            source_path=self.connector.source_path,\n prof_mgr.save_profile(profile)\n        QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('profile_saved'))\n\n    def perform_import(self):\n NewEntityDialog\n        dlg = NewEntityDialog(self, self.db)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            data = dlg.get_data()\n            res = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.entitytypes (cname, calias, class_id, cbaseclass, lisversioned, isecuritystrategy, status_id)\n                   VALUES (%s, %s, %s, '', true, 1, 1) RETURNING id\"\"\",\n item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole, table.name)\n            for field in table.fields:\n                field_item = QTreeWidgetItem([f\"  {field.name} ({field.field_type.name})\", \"\"])\n     item.addChild(field_item)\n            self.source_tree.addTopLevelItem(item)\n        self.detect_source_fk_links()\n        self.update_source_links_table()\n\n    def detect_source_fk_links(self):\n        self.source_fk_links = []\n        for table in self.source_tables:\n            for field in table.fields:\n                if field.is_foreign_key and field.refers_to:\n                    self.source_fk_links.append({\n                        'source_table': table.name,\n                        'source_field': field.name,\n                        'target_table': field.refers_to,\n                        'target_field': 'id'\n                    })\n\n    def update_source_links_table(self):\n -----------------------------------------------------------------\n    def load_source_tables(self):\n        schema = self.connector.get_schema()\n        divider = self.scene.divider_x\n        x, y = 30, 30\n        for table in schema.tables:\n            fields = []\n            for f in table.fields:\n                dt = DataType.STRING\n                if f.field_type.name == 'INTEGER':\n                    dt = DataType.INTEGER\n                elif f.field_type.name == 'FLOAT':\n                    dt = DataType.FLOAT\n                elif f.field_type.name == 'BOOLEAN':\n                    dt = DataType.BOOLEAN\n                elif f.field_type.name == 'DATE':\n                    dt = DataType.DATE\n                fields.append(Field(name=f.name, data_type=dt,\n                                    is_primary_key=f.is_primary_key,\n                                    is_foreign_key=f.is_foreign_key,\n                                    references=f.refers_to))\n            node = Node(id=f\"src_{table.name}\", name=table.name,\n                        node_type=NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE, fields=fields,\n                        x=x, y=y, table_name=table.name)\n            node.refs = {}\n            self.scene.add_node(node)\n            y += 180\n            if y > self.scene.height() - 200:\n                y = 30\n                x += 280\n                if x > divider - 240:\n                    break\n\n        # FK-связи источника\n        for node_item in list(self.scene.nodes.values()):\n            if node_item.node.node_type != NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE:\n                continue\n            for field in node_item.node.fields:\n                if field.is_foreign_key and field.references:\n                    for target_item in                        pk = next((f for f in target_item.node.fields if f.is_primary_key), None)\n                            if pk:\n                                src_fi =             'source_field': link.start_field_item.field.name,\n                    'target_entity_id': link.end_item.node.entity_id,\n                    'target_field': link.end_field_item.field.name,\n                    'mappings': link.mappings\n                })\n\n        # Удаляем старые Mozart-ноды\n        to_remove = [nid for nid, ni in self.scene.nodes.items()\n                     if ni.node.node_type == NodeType.MOZART_ENTITY]\n        for nid in to_remove:\n            self.scene.removeItem(self.scene.nodes[nid])\n            del self.scene.nodes[nid]\n        for link in self.scene.links[:]:\n            if link.link_type == LinkType.IMPORT:\n                self.scene.removeItem(link)\n                self.scene.links.remove(link)\n\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(\n            \"SELECT id, cname, calias, class_id FROM meta.entitytypes ORDER BY cname\"\n        )\n        divider = self.scene.divider_x\n        x, y = divider + 30, 30\n        for eid, cname, calias, class_id in rows:\n            class_res = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"SELECT calias FROM meta.entity_classes WHERE id=%s\", (class_id,))\n            class_alias = class_res[0][0] if class_res else \"DICT\"\n\n            fields = []\n            frows = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"SELECT cfieldname, cfieldtype FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid=%s AND is_system=False ORDER BY isortorder\",\n                (eid,))\n            for fname, ftype in frows:\n                dt = DataType.STRING\n                if ftype == 'I':\n                    dt = DataType.INTEGER\n                elif ftype == 'N':\n                    dt = DataType.FLOAT\n                elif ftype == 'L':\n                    dt = DataType.BOOLEAN\n                fields.append(Field(name=fname, data_type=dt))\n\n            node = Node(id=f\"moz_{eid}\", name=f\"{cname} ({calias})\",\n                        node_type=NodeType.MOZART_ENTITY, fields=fields,\n                        x=x, y=y, entity_id=eid, class_alias=class_alias)\n            self.scene.add_node(node)\n            y kwargs.get('total', 0))\n            elif event == 'table_finish':\n                progress_dlg.finish_table(\n                    kwargs.get('inserted', 0), kwargs.get('updated', 0),\n                    kwargs.get('errors', 0), kwargs.get('skipped', 0)\n                )\n            elif event == 'all_finish':\n                stats = kwargs.get('stats', {})\n                msg = self.translator.tr('import_finished_stats').format(\n                    stats.get('inserted', 0), stats.get('updated', 0), stats.get('errors', 0))\n                if stats.get('skipped', 0) > 0:\n                    msg += f\", {self.translator.tr('skipped_count')}: {stats.get('skipped', 0)}\"\n                QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('import_finished_title'), msg)\n       "entity_creator.py": "# mozart_import/designer/entity_creator.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, Optional\nfrom database import DatabaseService\nfrom ..utils.field_creator import FieldCreator\nfrom ..utils.ext_helper import ExtHelper\nfrom lang.local_translator import LocalTranslator\n\n\nclass EntityCreator:\n    \"\"\"\n    Создаёт новую сущность Mozart на основе таблицы источника.\n    Копирует все отмеченные поля из источника в сущность.\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, db: DatabaseService):\n        self.db = db\n        self.field_creator = FieldCreator(db)\n        self.ext_helper = ExtHelper(db)\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n\n    def create_entity_from_source(self,\n                                  entity_name: str,\n                                  entity_alias: str,\n                                  class_id: int,\n                                  source_table_name: str,\n                                  checked_fields: list,    # список имён полей источника\n                                  source_sample: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Optional[int]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Создаёт тип сущности, ext-таблицу и поля meta.fields.\n        Возвращает entity_id новой сущности.\n        \"\"\"\n        # 1. Создаём запись в meta.entitytypes\n        res = self.db.execute_query(\n            \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.entitytypes\n               (cname, calias, class_id, cbaseclass, lisversioned, isecuritystrategy, status_id)\n               VALUES (%s, %s, %s, '', true, 1, 1) RETURNING id\"\"\",\n            (entity_name, entity_alias, class_id)\n        )\n        if not res:\n            return None\n        entity_id = res[0][0]\n\n        # 2. Обеспечиваем существование ext-таблицы\n        self.ext_helper.ensure_ext_table(entity_id)\n\n        # 3. Создаём поля\n        fields_to_create = []\n        for src_field in checked_fields:\n            # Генерируем имя поля Mozart (латиница, без спецсимволов)\n            from .designer_utils import to_field_name\n            mozart_field = to_field_name(src_field)\n            # Определяем тип по образцу (если есть)\n            field_type = 'C'  # строка по умолчанию\n            nlength = 255\n            if source_sample and src_field in source_sample:\n                val = source_sample[src_field]\n                if isinstance(val, int):\n                    field_type = 'I'\n                    nlength = 0\n                elif isinstance(val, float):\n                    field_type = 'N'\n                    nlength = 15\n                elif isinstance(val, bool):\n                    field_type = 'L'\n                    nlength = 0\n                else:\n                    field_type = 'C'\n                    nlength = max(255, len(str(val)) * 2)\n            fields_to_create.append({\n                'cfieldname': mozart_field,\n                'cfieldtype': field_type,\n                'calias': src_field.capitalize()[:50],\n                'nlength': nlength,\n                'lisindexed': True\n            })\n        if fields_to_create:\n            self.field_creator.create_fields(entity_id, fields_to_create)\n\n        return entity_id",

perform_import(self):\n        creator = FieldCreator(self.db)\n        for link in self.import_links:\n            if link['type'] == 'import' and link['target_field']:\n                check =   source_type=SourceType.FILE,\n            source_path=self.connector.source_path,\n            mapping_proposal=mapping_proposal\n        )\n        progress =       "link_edit_dialog.py": "# mozart_import/designer/link_edit_dialog.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QTableWidget, QTableWidgetItem,       "scene_profile_adapter.py": "# mozart_import/designer/scene_profile_adapter.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom typing import Optional\nfrom database import DatabaseService\nfrom ..core.models import ImportProfile, SourceType, FileFormat, NodeType, LinkType\n\n\nclass SceneProfileAdapter:\n    @staticmethod\n    def _get_entity_name(db: DatabaseService, entity_id: int) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Возвращает cname сущности по её ID, или пустую строку, если не найдено.\"\"\"\n        if not entity_id:\n            return ''\n        try:\n            rows = db.execute_query(\"SELECT cname FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id = %s\", (entity_id,))\n            return rows[0][0] if rows else ''\n        except Exception:\n            return f\"Entity_{entity_id}\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def scene_to_profile(scene, connector, db: DatabaseService, editing_profile_id: Optional[int] = None) -> ImportProfile:\n        \"\"\"Преобразует сцену в объект ImportProfile с гарантированным заполнением имени целевой сущности.\"\"\"\n        # Параметры подключения\n        src_type = SourceType.FILE\n        file_format = None\n        db_type = None\n        db_host = None\n        db_port = None\n        db_name = None\n        db_user = None\n        db_pass = None\n\n        if hasattr(connector, 'file_format'):\n            src_type = SourceType.FILE\n            file_format = connector.file_format.value if isinstance(connector.file_format, FileFormat) else str(connector.file_format)\n        elif hasattr(connector, 'db_type'):\n            src_type = SourceType.DATABASE\n            db_type = connector.db_type\n            db_host = connector.host\n            db_port = int(connector.port) if connector.port else None\n            db_name = connector.database\n            db_user = connector.user\n            db_pass = connector.password\n        else:\n            src_type = SourceType.URL\n\n        # Таблицы источника\n        source_tables = []\n        for node_item in scene.nodes.values():\n            if node_item.node.node_type != NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE:\n                continue\n            row_count = None\n            try:\n                row_count = connector.get_row_count(node_item.node.table_name)\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            sample_rows = []\n            try:\n                sample = connector.get_table_sample(node_item.node.table_name, limit=5)\n                sample_rows = sample\n            except Exception:\n                pass\n            source_tables.append({\n                'name': node_item.node.table_name,\n                'row_count': row_count,\n                'sample_rows': sample_rows\n            })\n\n        # Группируем связи импорта по (source_table, target_entity_id)\n        links_by_target = {}\n        for link in scene.links:\n            if link.link_type != LinkType.IMPORT:\n                continue\n            start_node = link.start_item.node\n            end_node = link.end_item.node\n            if end_node.entity_id is None:\n                continue\n\n            refs = getattr(start_node, 'refs', {})\n            key = (start_node.table_name, end_node.entity_id)\n\n            if key not in links_by_target:\n                # Получаем имя сущности: сначала из end_node.name, если пусто – из БД\n                entity_name = end_node.name\n                if not entity_name and end_node.entity_id:\n                    entity_name = SceneProfileAdapter._get_entity_name(db, end_node.entity_id)\n                if not entity_name:\n                    entity_name = f\"Entity_{end_node.entity_id}\"\n\n                links_by_target[key] = {\n                    'source_table': start_node.table_name,\n                    'target_entity_id': end_node.entity_id,\n                    'target_entity_name': entity_name,  # <-- ЭТА СТРОКА ВАЖНА!\n                    'mappings': []\n                }\n\n            # Обрабатываем маппинги линии\n            if link.mappings:\n                for m in link.mappings:\n                    src_field = m.get('source_field')\n                    ref_info = refs.get(src_field, {})\n                    enriched = {\n                        'source_field': src_field,\n                        'target_field': m.get('target_field'),\n                        'is_source_id': m.get('is_source_id', False),\n                        'is_reference': ref_info.get('is_ref', False),\n                        'ref_source_table': ref_info.get('ref_table', ''),\n                        'ref_source_key_field': ref_info.get('ref_field', '')\n                    }\n                    if not any(ex['source_field'] == enriched['source_field'] and ex['target_field'] == enriched['target_field']\n                               for ex in links_by_target[key]['mappings']):\n                        links_by_target[key]['mappings'].append(enriched)\n            else:\n                # Одиночный маппинг\n                src_field = link.start_field_item.field.name\n                tgt_field = link.end_field_item.field.name\n                ref_info = refs.get(src_field, {})\n                mapping = {\n                    'source_field': src_field,\n                    'target_field': tgt_field,\n                    'is_source_id': (tgt_field == 'sourceid'),\n                    'is_reference': ref_info.get('is_ref', False),\n                    'ref_source_table': ref_info.get('ref_table', ''),\n                    'ref_source_key_field': ref_info.get('ref_field', '')\n                }\n                if not any(ex['source_field'] == mapping['source_field'] and ex['target_field'] == mapping['target_field']\n                           for ex in links_by_target[key]['mappings']):\n                    links_by_target[key]['mappings'].append(mapping)\n\n        # Автоматическое добавление ключевой пары (sourceid) если отсутствует\n        for key, entry in links_by_target.items():\n            source_id_mapping = next((m for m in entry['mappings'] if m.get('is_source_id')), None)\n            if source_id_mapping:\n                continue\n\n            source_table_name = entry['source_table']\n            source_node = None\n            for ni in scene.nodes.values():\n                if (ni.node.node_type == NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE and\n                        ni.node.table_name == source_table_name):\n                    source_node = ni\n                    break\n\n            key_field = None\n            refs_of_node = getattr(source_node.node, 'refs', {}) if source_node else {}\n            for fname, rinfo in refs_of_node.items():\n                if not rinfo.get('is_ref'):\n                    key_field = fname\n                    break\n            if not key_field and source_node:\n                key_field = source_node.node.fields[0].name if source_node.node.fields else None\n\n            if key_field:\n                entry['mappings'].append({\n                    'source_field': key_field,\n                    'target_field': 'sourceid',\n                    'is_source_id': True,\n                    'is_reference': False,\n                    'ref_source_table': '',\n                    'ref_source_key_field': ''\n                })\n\n        target_entities = []\n        import_links = []\n        for key, entry in links_by_target.items():\n            target_entities.append({'id': entry['target_entity_id'], 'name': entry['target_entity_name']})\n            import_links.append({\n                'source_table': entry['source_table'],\n                'target_entity_id': entry['target_entity_id'],\n                'target_entity_name': entry['target_entity_name'],  # <-- ЭТА СТРОКА ВАЖНА!\n                'mappings': entry['mappings']\n            })\n\n        # FK связи источника\n        source_fk_links = []\n        for link in scene.links:\n            if link.link_type == LinkType.FK_SOURCE:\n                source_fk_links.append({\n                    'source_table': link.start_item.node.table_name,\n                    'source_field': link.start_field_item.field.name,\n                    'target_table': link.end_item.node.table_name,\n                    'target_field': link.end_field_item.field.name\n                })\n\n        # Сбор ручных настроек ссылок источника (source_references)\n        source_references = []\n        for node_item in scene.nodes.values():\n            if node_item.node.node_type != NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE:\n                continue\n            refs = getattr(node_item.node, 'refs', {})\n            for field_name, ref_info in refs.items():\n                if ref_info.get('is_ref'):\n                    source_references.append({\n                        'source_table': node_item.node.table_name,\n                        'source_field': field_name,\n                        'ref_table': ref_info['ref_table'],\n                        'ref_field': ref_info['ref_field']\n                    })\n\n        return ImportProfile(\n            id=editing_profile_id,\n            name=connector.source_path,\n            source_type=src_type,\n            source_path=connector.source_path,\n            source_tables=source_tables,\n            target_entities=target_entities,\n            import_links=import_links,\n            source_fk_links=source_fk_links,\n            source_references=source_references,\n            file_format=file_format,\n            db_type=db_type,\n            db_host=db_host,\n            db_port=db_port,\n            db_name=db_name,\n            db_user=db_user,\n            db_pass=db_pass\n        )\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def restore_scene(scene, profile: ImportProfile, mozart_entities=None):\n        \"\"\"Восстанавливает связи импорта и внутренние ссылки источника на сцене.\"\"\"\n        # Восстанавливаем refs для всех узлов источника из profile.source_references\n        for ref in profile.source_references:\n            for nitem in scene.nodes.values():\n                if (nitem.node.node_type == NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE and\n                        nitem.node.table_name == ref['source_table']):\n                    refs = getattr(nitem.node, 'refs', {})\n                    refs[ref['source_field']] = {\n                        'is_ref': True,\n                        'ref_table': ref['ref_table'],\n                        'ref_field': ref['ref_field']\n                    }\n                    nitem.node.refs = refs\n                    break\n\n        # Восстанавливаем связи импорта\n        for link_data in profile.import_links:\n            source_table = link_data['source_table']\n            target_entity_id = link_data['target_entity_id']\n            source_node = None\n            target_node = None\n            for nitem in scene.nodes.values():\n                if nitem.node.node_type == NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE and nitem.node.table_name == source_table:\n                    source_node = nitem\n                elif nitem.node.node_type == NodeType.MOZART_ENTITY and nitem.node.entity_id == target_entity_id:\n                    target_node = nitem\n            if not source_node or not target_node:\n                continue\n\n            mappings = link_data.get('mappings', [])\n            # Удаляем старые линии между этими узлами\n            for link in scene.links[:]:\n                if link.link_type == LinkType.IMPORT and link.start_item == source_node and link.end_item == target_node:\n                    scene.removeItem(link)\n                    scene.links.remove(link)\n\n            # Создаём новую линию и принудительно записываем маппинги\n            if mappings:\n                link = scene.add_link(source_node, target_node, LinkType.IMPORT, mappings=mappings)\n                if link:\n                    link.mappings = mappings\n            else:\n                link = scene.add_link(source_node, target_node, LinkType.IMPORT)\n\n        scene.update_all_links()",
      "source_ref_dialog.py": "# mozart_import/designer/source_ref_dialog.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QDialog, QVBoxLayout, QTableWidget, QTableWidgetItem,\n                             QCheckBox, QComboBox, QDialogButtonBox, QHeaderView, QMessageBox)\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import Qt\n\n\nclass SourceRefDialog(QDialog):\n    \"\"\"\n    Диалог настройки ссылочных полей внутри таблицы источника.\n    Для каждого поля можно указать, является ли оно ссылкой на другую таблицу источника,\n    выбрать целевую таблицу и поле, которое служит ключом в этой таблице.\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, source_table_name: str, source_fields: list, all_source_table_names: list,\n                 current_refs: dict = None, parent=None):\n        \"\"\"\n        source_fields -- список имён полей текущей таблицы\n        all_source_table_names -- список имён всех таблиц источника (для выбора целевой таблицы)\n        current_refs -- словарь {имя_поля: {'is_ref': bool, 'ref_table': str, 'ref_field': str}}\n        \"\"\"\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.setWindowTitle(f\"Ссылочные поля таблицы «{source_table_name}»\")\n        self.resize(800, 400)\n\n        self.source_fields = source_fields\n        self.all_tables = all_source_table_names\n        self.current_refs = current_refs or {}\n        self.result_refs = {}\n\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n\n        self.table = QTableWidget(len(source_fields), 3)\n        self.table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels([\"Поле\", \"Ссылка?\", \"Целевая таблица.поле\"])\n        self.table.horizontalHeader().setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.Stretch)\n        self.table.verticalHeader().setVisible(False)\n\n        for row, field_name in enumerate(source_fields):\n            # Имя поля\n            item = QTableWidgetItem(field_name)\n            item.setFlags(item.flags() & ~Qt.ItemIsEditable)\n            self.table.setItem(row, 0, item)\n\n            # Чекбокс \"Ссылка\"\n            chk = QCheckBox()\n            ref_info = self.current_refs.get(field_name, {})\n            chk.setChecked(ref_info.get('is_ref', False))\n            self.table.setCellWidget(row, 1, chk)\n\n            # Комбобокс с целевой таблицей и полем\n            combo = QComboBox()\n            for tbl in all_source_table_names:\n                # Добавляем поля этой таблицы (упрощённо: предполагаем, что ключевое поле называется 'id' или первое поле)\n                # В реальном приложении нужно знать схему всех таблиц, но здесь используем заглушку: поле 'id'\n                combo.addItem(f\"{tbl}.id\", (tbl, 'id'))  # Пока предполагаем, что ключевое поле всегда 'id'\n            # Если текущая ссылка уже установлена, выбираем соответствующий пункт\n            if ref_info.get('is_ref'):\n                target = ref_info.get('ref_table')\n                field = ref_info.get('ref_field')\n                idx = combo.findData((target, field))\n                if idx >= 0:\n                    combo.setCurrentIndex(idx)\n            self.table.setCellWidget(row, 2, combo)\n\n        layout.addWidget(self.table)\n\n        btn_box = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel)\n        btn_box.accepted.connect(self._save)\n        btn_box.rejected.connect(self.reject)\n        layout.addWidget(btn_box)\n\n    def _save(self):\n        self.result_refs = {}\n        for row in range(self.table.rowCount()):\n            field_name = self.table.item(row, 0).text()\n            is_ref = self.table.cellWidget(row, 1).isChecked()\n            combo = self.table.cellWidget(row, 2)\n            target_table, target_field = combo.currentData()\n            self.result_refs[field_name] = {\n                'is_ref': is_ref,\n                'ref_table': target_table,\n                'ref_field': target_field\n            }\n        self.accept()\n\n    def get_refs(self):\n        return self.result_refs"

      "graphics_view.py": "# mozart_import/graph/graphics_view.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import QGraphicsView\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import Qt\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import QPainter, QWheelEvent\n\nfrom .link_line import LinkLine\n\n\nclass GraphicsView(QGraphicsView):\n    def __init__(self, scene, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(scene, parent)\n        self.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing)\n\n        # Исправлено: используем QGraphicsView.ScrollHandDrag\n        self.setDragMode(QGraphicsView.ScrollHandDrag)\n\n        self.setTransformationAnchor(QGraphicsView.AnchorUnderMouse)\n        self.setResizeAnchor(QGraphicsView.AnchorUnderMouse)\n        self.setFocusPolicy(Qt.StrongFocus)\n        self.scale_factor = 1.0\n\n    def wheelEvent(self, event: QWheelEvent):\n        if event.modifiers() == Qt.ControlModifier:\n            delta = event.angleDelta().y()\n            if delta > 0:\n                self.scale_view(1.25)\n            elif delta < 0:\n                self.scale_view(0.8)\n        else:\n            super().wheelEvent(event)\n\n    def scale_view(self, factor):\n        self.scale_factor *= factor\n        self.scale(factor, factor)\n\n    def keyPressEvent(self, event):\n        if event.key() == Qt.Key_Delete:\n            scene = self.scene()\n            for item in scene.selectedItems():\n                if isinstance(item, LinkLine):\n                    if hasattr(scene, 'remove_link'):\n                        scene.remove_link(item)\n            event.accept()\n        else:\n            super().keyPressEvent(event)",
      "link_line.py": "# mozart_import/graph/link_line.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import QGraphicsLineItem\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import QLineF, Qt\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import QPen, QColor\n\nfrom ..core.models import LinkType\n\n\nclass LinkLine(QGraphicsLineItem):\n    \"\"\"\n    Линия связи между двумя полями.\n    Хранит полный набор маппингов для данной связи импорта.\n    Теперь поддерживает выделение и удаление.\n    \"\"\"\n    COLORS = {\n        LinkType.IMPORT: QColor(200, 30, 30),      # красный\n        LinkType.FK_SOURCE: QColor(100, 100, 140),  # сине-серый\n        LinkType.COMPOSITION: QColor(30, 150, 30),  # зелёный\n    }\n\n    def __init__(self, start_item, start_field_item, end_item, end_field_item,\n                 link_type: LinkType, mappings=None):\n        super().__init__()\n        self.start_item = start_item\n        self.start_field_item = start_field_item\n        self.end_item = end_item\n        self.end_field_item = end_field_item\n        self.link_type = link_type\n        # Маппинги: список словарей {source_field, target_field, is_source_id}\n        self.mappings = mappings or []\n        # Если маппинги не заданы, создаём один на основе начального поля\n        if not self.mappings and link_type == LinkType.IMPORT:\n            self.mappings = [{\n                'source_field': start_field_item.field.name,\n                'target_field': end_field_item.field.name,\n                'is_source_id': False\n            }]\n\n        color = self.COLORS.get(link_type, Qt.black)\n        width = 3 if link_type == LinkType.IMPORT else 1\n        style = Qt.SolidLine if link_type == LinkType.IMPORT else Qt.DashLine\n\n        # Пера для обычного и выделенного состояния\n        self._normal_pen = QPen(color, width, style)\n        self._selected_pen = QPen(Qt.red, width + 1, style)\n\n        self.setPen(self._normal_pen)\n        self.setZValue(-1)\n        # Разрешаем выделение линии\n        self.setFlag(QGraphicsLineItem.ItemIsSelectable, True)\n        self.setFlag(QGraphicsLineItem.ItemSendsGeometryChanges, True)\n        self.update_position()\n\n    def itemChange(self, change, value):\n        \"\"\"При выделении меняем цвет линии.\"\"\"\n        if change == QGraphicsLineItem.ItemSelectedChange:\n            if value:\n                self.setPen(self._selected_pen)\n            else:\n                self.setPen(self._normal_pen)\n        return super().itemChange(change, value)\n\n    def update_position(self):\n        if not self.start_field_item or not self.end_field_item:\n            return\n        sp = self.start_field_item.scenePos()\n        sp.setX(sp.x() + self.start_field_item.boundingRect().width())\n        sp.setY(sp.y() + self.start_field_item.boundingRect().height() / 2)\n\n        ep = self.end_field_item.scenePos()\n        ep.setX(ep.x())\n        ep.setY(ep.y() + self.end_field_item.boundingRect().height() / 2)\n\n        self.setLine(QLineF(sp, ep))\n\n    def update_mappings_from_dialog(self, new_mappings):\n        \"\"\"Обновить маппинги после диалога.\"\"\"\n        self.mappings = new_mappings",

             self.links.append(link)\n                return link\n            else:\n                if start_node_item.field_items and end_node_item.field_items:\n                    src_fi = start_node_item.field_items[0]\n                    tgt_fi = end_node_item.field_items[0]\n                    link = LinkLine(start_node_item, src_fi, end_node_item, tgt_fi, link_type)\n                    self.addItem(link)\n                    self.links.append(link)\n                    return link\n        elif link_type == LinkType.FK_SOURCE:\n            if (start_node_item.node.node_type !=            return\n\n        dlg = QDialog()\n        dlg.setWindowTitle(f\"{self.translator.tr('import_links_for')} {entity_name}\")\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(dlg)\n        table = self.translator.tr('key_field'),\n            self.translator.tr('reference'),\n            self.translator.tr('target')\n        ])\n        table.horizontalHeader().setStretchLastSection(True)\n\n        for link in relevant_links:\n            src_table = link.start_item.node.name\n            for m in link.mappings:\n                row = table.rowCount()\n                table.insertRow(row)\n       "name_matcher.py": "# mozart_import/matchers/name_matcher.py\nfrom difflib import SequenceMatcher\nfrom typing import Tuple, Optional\n\n\nclass NameMatcher:\n    \"\"\"Сопоставление по имени (таблиц, полей).\"\"\"\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def similarity(a: str, b: str) -> float:\n        return SequenceMatcher(None, a.lower(), b.lower()).ratio()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def best_match(name: str, candidates: list, threshold: float = 0.6) -> Tuple[Optional[str], float]:\n        best = None\n        best_score = 0.0\n        for cand in candidates:\n            score = NameMatcher.similarity(name, cand)\n            if score > best_score:\n                best_score = score\n                best = cand\n        if best_score >= threshold:\n            return best, best_score\n        return None, 0.0",
      "type_matcher.py": "# mozart_import/matchers/type_matcher.py\nfrom ..core.models import FieldType\n\n\nclass TypeMatcher:\n    \"\"\"Сопоставление типов данных источника и Mozart.\"\"\"\n\n    # Маппинг типов источника -> коды типов Mozart (C, I, N, D, T, L, M, R)\n    TYPE_MAPPING = {\n        FieldType.STRING: 'C',\n        FieldType.INTEGER: 'I',\n        FieldType.FLOAT: 'N',\n        FieldType.BOOLEAN: 'L',\n        FieldType.DATE: 'D',\n        FieldType.DATETIME: 'T',\n        FieldType.TIME: 'T',\n        FieldType.BINARY: 'F',\n    }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get_mozart_type(cls, source_type: FieldType) -> str:\n        return cls.TYPE_MAPPING.get(source_type, 'C')\n\n    @classmethod\n    def is_compatible(cls, source_type: FieldType, mozart_type: str) -> bool:\n        target = cls.get_mozart_type(source_type)\n        if target == mozart_type:\n            return True\n        # Дополнительные совместимости\n        if source_type == FieldType.INTEGER and mozart_type == 'N':\n            return True\n        if source_type == FieldType.FLOAT and mozart_type == 'N':\n            return True\n        if source_type == FieldType.STRING and mozart_type == 'C':\n            return True\n        return False"

      "field_creator.py": "# mozart_import/utils/field_creator.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom database import DatabaseService\n\n\nclass FieldCreator:\n    def __init__(self, db: DatabaseService):\n        self.db = db\n\n    def create_fields(self, entity_id: int, fields: list) -> list:\n        created_ids = []\n        for f in fields:\n            exists = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"SELECT id FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid=%s AND cfieldname=%s\",\n                (entity_id, f['cfieldname'])\n            )\n            if exists:\n                created_ids.append(exists[0][0])\n                continue\n\n            cfieldname = f['cfieldname'][:63]\n            calias = f.get('calias', cfieldname.capitalize())[:50]\n            cfieldtype = f.get('cfieldtype', 'C')\n            nlength = f.get('nlength', 255)\n            ndecimals = f.get('ndecimals', 0)\n            lisindexed = f.get('lisindexed', True)\n            ref_entitytypeid = f.get('ref_entitytypeid', None)\n\n            res = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.fields\n                   (entitytypeid, cfieldname, cfieldtype, calias,\n                    nlength, ndecimals, lisindexed, ref_entitytypeid, status_id)\n                   VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, 1)\n                   RETURNING id\"\"\",\n                (entity_id, cfieldname, cfieldtype, calias,\n                 nlength, ndecimals, lisindexed, ref_entitytypeid)\n            )\n            if res:\n                field_id = res[0][0]\n                self.db.execute_procedure(\"meta.p_field_sync\", (field_id,))\n                created_ids.append(field_id)\n            else:\n                raise Exception(f\"Failed to create field {cfieldname}\")\n        return created_ids",

target_node:\n                continue\n            source_table_name = link_list[0]['source_node_id'].replace('src_', '')\n            matched_fields = []\n            for link in link_list:\n                if link.get('target_field'):\n                    is_ref = False\n                    ref_entity_id = None\n                    matched_fields.append(MatchedField(\n prof_mgr.save_profile(profile)\n\n    def start_import(self):\n        if not self.wizard.profile:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.wizard.profile)\n        self.import_thread.progress.connect(self.update_progress)\n        self.import_thread.finished.connect(self.on_finished)\n        self.import_thread.error.connect(self.on_error)\n        self.import_thread.start()\n\n    def update_progress(self, current, total):\n        self.progress.setMaximum(total)\n        self.progress.setValue(current)\n        self.log.append(f\"{self.translator.tr('processed_records')}: {current} / {total}\")\n\n    def on_finished(self, stats):\n {stats['errors']}\")\n        QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('import_finished_title'), self.translator.tr('import_finished'))\n        self.btn_start.setEnabled(False)\n\n    def on_error(self, msg):\n        self.log.append(f\"{self.translator.tr('error')}: {msg}\")\n        QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), msg)\n def load_source(self):\n        if not self.wizard.connector:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('connector_not_ready'))\n            return\n        self.clear_scene()\n        schema = self.wizard.connector.get_schema()\n        if not schema.tables:\n            QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('no_tables_found'))\n            return\n        x = 50\n        y = 50\n        for table in schema.tables:\n            fields = []\n            for f in table.fields:\n                dt = DataType.STRING\n                if f.field_type.name == 'INTEGER':\n                    dt = DataType.INTEGER\n                elif f.field_type.name == 'FLOAT':\n                    dt = DataType.FLOAT\n                elif f.field_type.name == 'BOOLEAN':\n                    dt = DataType.BOOLEAN\n                elif f.field_type.name == 'DATE':\n                    dt = DataType.DATE\n                elif f.field_type.name == 'DATETIME':\n                    dt = DataType.DATETIME\n                fields.append(Field(\n                    name=f.name,\n                    data_type=dt,\n                    is_primary_key=f.is_primary_key,\n                    is_foreign_key=f.is_foreign_key,\n                    references=f.refers_to\n                ))\n            node = Node(\n                id=f\"src_{table.name}\",\n                name=table.name,\n                node_type=NodeType.SOURCE_TABLE,\n                fields=fields,\n                x=x,      x = 50\n                y += 250\n\n        # Автоматические связи FK\n        for node in self.source_nodes:\n            for field in node.fields:\n                if field.is_foreign_key and field.references:\n                    target_table_name = field.references\n                    for target_node in self.source_nodes:\n                        if target_node.table_name == target_table_name:\n                            target_field = None\n                            for tf in target_node.fields:\n                                if tf.is_primary_key:\n DataType.DATETIME\n                fields.append(Field(name=fname, data_type=dt))\n            node = Node(\n                id=f\"moz_{eid}\",\n                name=f\"{cname} ({calias})\",\n                node_type=NodeType.MOZART_ENTITY,\n                fields=fields,\n                x=x, y=y,\n                entity_id=eid,\n                class_alias=class_alias\n            )\n        comps = self.wizard.db.execute_query(\"SELECT parent_entityid, child_entityid, c_link_fieldname FROM meta.entity_composition\")\n        for parent_id, child_id, link_field in comps:\n            parent_node = None\n            child_node = None\n            for n in self.mozart_nodes:\n                if n.entity_id == parent_id:\n                    parent_node = n\n                if n.entity_id == child_id:\n                    child_node = n\n            if parent_node and child_node:\n                # Ищем поле в дочерней сущности с именем link_field\n                child_field = None\n                for f in child_node.fields:\n                    if f.name == link_field:\n                        child_field = f\n                        break\n                if child_field:\n                    # Для родителя используем первое поле (или можно создать линию без привязки к полю)\n                    parent_field = parent_node.fields[0] if parent_node.fields else None\n                    if parent_field:\n                        start_fi = self.find_field_item(parent_node, parent_field.name)\n                        end_fi = self.find_field_item(child_node, child_field.name)\n                        if start_fi and end_fi:\n                            self.scene.add_link(start_fi, end_fi, LinkType.COMPOSITION)\n        QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('mozart_loaded').format(len(rows)))\n\n    def create_entity(self):\n        dlg = NewEntityDialog(self, self.wizard.db)\n node_type=NodeType.MOZART_ENTITY,\n                fields=[],\n                x=600, y=300,\n                class_alias=\"DICT\"\n            )\n            self.scene.add_node(node)\n            if not hasattr(self.wizard, 'pending_entities'):\n                self.wizard.pending_entities = []\n            self.wizard.pending_entities.append((node, data))\n            QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('entity_added_to_scene'))\n\n    def save_mapping(self):\n        nodes_pos = {}\n        for node_item in self.scene.nodes.values():\n            nodes_pos[node_item.node.id] = {'x': node_item.node.x, 'y': node_item.node.y}\n        links_data = []\n        for link_line in self.scene.links:\n            link_dict = {\n                'source_node_id': link_line.start_item.node.id,\n                'source_field': link_line.start_field_item.field.name,\n                'target_node_id': link_line.end_item.node.id,\n                'target_field': link_line.end_field_item.field.name,\n                'link_type': link_line.link_type.value,\n                'is_source_id': getattr(link_line, 'is_source_id', False)\n            }\n            links_data.append(link_dict)\n        scene_data = {\n            'nodes_pos': nodes_pos,\n            'links': links_data\n        }\n        self.wizard.import_scene_json = json.dumps(scene_data, ensure_ascii=False)\n        self.wizard.source_nodes = self.source_nodes\n        self.wizard.mozart_nodes = self.mozart_nodes\n        self.wizard.links = links_data\n        self.wizard.next()\n\n    def preview_table(self, node_item):\n        if not self.wizard.connector:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('connector_not_ready'))\n            return\n        table_name = node_item.node.table_name\n        sample = self.wizard.connector.get_table_sample(table_name, limit=20)\n        if not sample:\n            QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('no_data'))\n            return\n        dlg = QDialog(self)\n        dlg.setWindowTitle(self.translator.tr('preview_table_title').format(table_name))\n        layout = QVBoxLayoutD(dlg)\n        table = QTableWidget()\n        if sample:\n            headers = list(sample[0].keys())\n            table.setColumnCount(len(headers))\n            table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headers)\n            table.setRowCount(len(sample))\n            for i, row in enumerate(sample):\n                for j, col in enumerate(headers):\n                    table.setItem(i, j, QTableWidgetItem(str(row.get(col, ''))))\n        layout.addWidget(table)\n        dlg.exec_()",

self.init_ui()\n\n    def init_ui(self):\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n\n        # Верхняя панель: выбор/создание сущности\n        h_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.entity_combo = self.setTitle(self.translator.tr('mapping_page_title'))\n        self.setSubTitle(self.translator.tr('mapping_page_subtitle'))\n        self.entity_combo.setItemText(0, self.btn_apply_structure.setText(self.translator.tr('apply_structure_button'))\n        self.btn_import_data.setText(self.translator.tr('import_data_button'))\n        self.preview_tab.setTabText(0, self.translator.tr('data_preview_tab'))\n        self.mapping_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels([\n            self.translator.tr('source_field_header'),\n            self.translator.tr('target_field_header'),\n            self.translator.tr('type_header'),\n            self.translator.tr('length_header'),\n            self.translator.tr('ref_header')\n        ])\n\n    def refresh_entity_list(self):\n        self.entity_combo.clear()\n        self.entity_combo.addItem(self.translator.tr('create_new_entity'), None)\n        rows = self.wizard.db.execute_query(\"SELECT id, cname, calias FROM meta.entitytypes ORDER BY cname\")\n        for eid, cname, calias in rows:\n            self.entity_combo.addItem(f\"{cname} ({calias})\", eid)\n\n    def on_entity_selected(self):\n        self.current_entity_id = self.entity_combo.currentData()\n        self.load_mapping_table()\n\n    def load_mapping_table(self):\n        if not self.wizard.schema:\n            return\n        source_table = None\n        for t in self.wizard.schema.tables:\n            if t.name == self.wizard.selected_table_name:\n                source_table = t\n                break\n        if not source_table:\n            self.mapping_table.setRowCount(0)\n            return\n\n        self.mapping_table.setRowCount(len(source_table.fields))\n        for row, sf in enumerate(source_table.fields):\n            self.mapping_table.setItem(row, 0, QTableWidgetItem(sf.name))\n            # В колонке 1 – комбобокс с существующими полями + опция создания нового\n            combo = QComboBox()\n            combo.addItem(\"-- \" + self.translator.tr('ignore_field') + \" --\", \"\")\n            if self.current_entity_id:\n                fields = self.wizard.db.execute_query(\n                    \"SELECT cfieldname, calias FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid=%s\",\n self.translator.tr('create_new_field') + \" ++\", \"__NEW__\")\n            combo.currentIndexChanged.connect(lambda idx, r=row: self.on_new_field_selected(r, combo))\n            self.mapping_table.setCellWidget(row, 1, combo)\n            self.mapping_table.setItem(row, 2, QTableWidgetItem(sf.field_type.name))\n            self.mapping_table.setItem(row, 3, self.pending_fields:\n                self.show_pending_editor(row, self.pending_fields[row])\n\n        # Загрузить предпросмотр данных\n        self.load_preview(source_table)\n\n    def on_new_field_selected(self, row, combo):\n        if combo.currentData() == \"__NEW__\":\n            combo.blockSignals(True)\n            combo.setCurrentIndex(0)\n            combo.blockSignals(False)\n            # Показываем редактор в строке\n            self.show_pending_editor(row)\n\n    def show_pending_editor(self, row, pending=None):\n        # Создаём виджеты для ввода параметров нового поля\n        # Временно сохраним в self.pending_fields и отобразим в дополнительных колонках\n        # Для простоты используем QLineEdit в ячейках колонок 2-4\n        name_edit = QLineEdit()\n        if pending and pending.get('name'):\n            name_edit.setText(pending['name'])\n        else:\n            source_field = self.mapping_table.item(row, 0).text()\n            name_edit.setText(self.to_field_name(source_field))\n        name_edit.textChanged.connect(lambda t, r=row: self.update_pending(r, 'name', t))\n        self.mapping_table.setCellWidget(row,
