type_combo.findText(pending['type'])\n            if idx >= 0:\n                type_combo.setCurrentIndex(idx)\n        type_combo.currentIndexChanged.connect(lambda idx, r=row: self.update_pending(r, 'type', type_combo.currentText()))\n        self.mapping_table.setCellWidget(row, 3, type_combo)\n\n        length_spin = QSpinBox()\n        length_spin.setRange(1, 10000)\n        length_spin.setValue(pending.get('length', 255) if pending else 255)\n        length_spin.valueChanged.connect(lambda v, r=row: self.update_pending(r, 'length', v))\n        self.mapping_table.setCellWidget(row, 4, length_spin)\n\n        # Сохраняем pending\n        self.pending_fields[row] = {\n            'name': name_edit.text(),\n            'type': type_combo.currentText(),\n            'length': length_spin.value(),\n            'alias': name_edit.text()\n        }\n\n    def update_pending(self, row, key, value):\n        if row not in self.pending_fields:\n            self.pending_fields[row] = {}\n        self.pending_fields[row][key] = value\n\n    def to_field_name(self, source_field):\n        # Преобразует имя исходного поля в допустимое имя поля MySQL/CamelCase\n        import re\n        name = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_]', '_', source_field)\n        if name[0].isdigit():\n            name = '_' + name\n        return name.lower()\n\n    def apply_structure(self):\n        if not self.current_entity_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('select_entity_first'))\n            return\n        # Собираем все новые поля из pending_fields\n        fields_to_create = []\n        for row, pending in self.pending_fields.items():\n            if not pending.get('name'):\n                continue\n            fields_to_create.append({\n                'cfieldname': pending['name'],\n                'cfieldtype': pending.get('type', 'C'),\n                'calias': pending.get('alias', pending['name']),\n                'nlength': pending.get('length', 255),\n                'lisindexed': True\n            })\n        if not fields_to_create:\n            QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('no_fields_to_create'))\n            return\n        # Транзакция через FieldCreator\n        creator = FieldCreator(self.wizard.db)\n        try:\n            created_ids = creator.create_fields(self.current_entity_id, fields_to_create)\n            QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('structure_created', len(created_ids)))\n            self.btn_import_data.setEnabled(True)\n            # Обновить таблицу маппинга: убрать редакторы, загрузить существующие поля\n            self.load_mapping_table()\n        except Exception as e:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), str(e))\n\n    def import_data(self):\n        # Собрать маппинг для импорта\n        matched_fields = []\n        for row in range(self.mapping_table.rowCount()):\n            source_field = self.mapping_table.item(row, 0).text()\n            combo = self.mapping_table.cellWidget(row, 1)\n            target_field = combo.currentData()\n            if target_field and target_field != \"__NEW__\":\n                matched_fields.append(MatchedField(\n                    source_field=source_field,\n                    target_field=target_field,\n                    confidence=1.0,\n                    is_reference=False\n                ))\n        # Создаём MatchedEntity\n        matched_entity = MatchedEntity(\n            source_table=self.wizard.selected_table_name,\n            target_entity_id=self.current_entity_id,\n            target_entity_name=\"\",\n            confidence=1.0,\n            fields=matched_fields,\n            is_new=False\n        )\n        self.wizard.matching_proposal = MappingProposal(\n            source_schema=self.wizard.schema,\n            entities=[matched_entity],\n            unresolved_tables=[],\n            suggestions_for_new_entities=[]\n        )\n        # Переходим на страницу импорта (ExecutePage)\n        self.wizard.next()\n\n    def load_preview(self, source_table):\n        if not source_table.sample_rows:\n            self.preview_table.setRowCount(0)\n            self.preview_table.setColumnCount(0)\n            return\n        sample = source_table.sample_rows\n        if not sample:\n            return\n        headers = list(sample[0].keys())\n        self.preview_table.setColumnCount(len(headers))\n        self.preview_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headers)\n        self.preview_table.setRowCount(len(sample))\n        for i, row in enumerate(sample):\n            for j, col in enumerate(headers):\n                val = row.get(col, '')\n                self.preview_table.setItem(i, j, QTableWidgetItem(str(val)))\n        self.preview_table.resizeColumnsToContents()\n\n    def create_new_entity(self):\n        from .wizard_dialogs import NewEntityDialog\n        dlg = NewEntityDialog(self, self.wizard.db)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            data = dlg.get_data()\n            res = self.wizard.db.execute_query(\n                \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.entitytypes (cname, calias, class_id, cbaseclass, lisversioned, isecuritystrategy, status_id)\n                   VALUES (%s, %s, %s, '', true, 1, 1) RETURNING id\"\"\",\n                (data['cname'], data['calias'], data['class_id'])\n            )\n            if res:\n                entity_id = res[0][0]\n                QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), self.translator.tr('entity_created'))\n                self.refresh_entity_list()\n                idx = self.entity_combo.findData(entity_id)\n                if idx >= 0:\n                    self.entity_combo.setCurrentIndex(idx)\n                self.current_entity_id = entity_id\n                self.load_mapping_table()\n\n\nclass ExecutePage(QWizardPage):\n self.setTitle(self.translator.tr('execute_page_title'))\n        self.setSubTitle(self.translator.tr('execute_page_subtitle'))\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n\n        self.progress = self.translator.tr('import_finished_title'), self.translator.tr('import_finished'))\n\n    def on_error(self, msg):\n        self.log.append(f\"{self.translator.tr('error')}: {msg}\")\n        QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), msg)"

  "mozart_nodes.py": "# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n# Путь: /home/sergey/Documents/configurate/layer2_server/mozart_nodes.py\n# Описание: Софтверные узлы Вася и Петя. Реализована лавинная деформация остова при атаке.\n\nimport numpy as np\nfrom mozart_crypto_core import MozartCryptoEngine\n\n\nclass VasyaServer:\n    def __init__(self, engine: MozartCryptoEngine):\n        self.engine = engine\n        self.symmetric_session_key = \"AES256_SYNCHRONOUS_TOKEN_991823\"\n        self.selected_track = None\n        self.SL = 0\n        self.TR = 0\n\n    def receive_handshake_and_encrypt(self, public_key_A):\n        print(\"[ВАСЯ -> Сервер]: Принял открытый ключ решетки от Пети.\")\n        self.selected_track, self.SL, self.TR = self.engine.select_stochastic_track()\n\n        packet_b = self.engine.encapsulate_key(\n            matrix_A=public_key_A,\n            symmetric_key=self.symmetric_session_key,\n            file_path=self.selected_track,\n            sl_seed=self.SL\n        )\n        return packet_b, self.SL, self.TR\n\n\nclass PetyaClient:\n    def __init__(self, engine: MozartCryptoEngine):\n        self.engine = engine\n        self.public_key_A = None\n        self._secret_s = None\n        self.symmetric_key_len = 0\n\n    def init_session_keys(self, target_key_len):\n        self.symmetric_key_len = target_key_len\n        self.public_key_A, _ = self.engine.generate_keypair()\n        print(\"[ПЕТЯ -> Клиент]: Сгенерировал открытый базис многомерной решетки.\")\n        return self.public_key_A\n\n    def receive_and_analyze(self, packet_b, sl_seed, use_hacked_key=False):\n        print(\"[ПЕТЯ -> Клиент]: Принял пакет от Васи. Запуск анализа остова...\")\n\n        # Базовая синхронизация по сиду\n        seed_to_use = sl_seed\n\n        # ИСПРАВЛЕНО: Симулируем ошибку в один знак в исходном сиде генерации решетки!\n        # Ошибка в единицу в sl_seed (например, 123456 превращается в 123457) — это и есть\n        # изменение одного знака в закрытом ключе, которое полностью перестраивает всю псевдослучайную\n        # матрицу s. Матрица s взломщика становится полностью ортогональной оригиналу.\n        if use_hacked_key:\n            print(\"[КРИТ]: Петя использует дефектный закрытый ключ (ошибка в 1 знаке)!\")\n            seed_to_use = sl_seed + 1  # Сдвиг ключа на 1 знак\n\n        np.random.seed(seed_to_use + 500)\n        current_s = np.random.randint(0, self.engine.P, size=(self.engine.N_FREQ, self.engine.N_TIME), dtype=np.int64)\n\n        success, tau, raw_bytes = self.engine.decapsulate_and_verify(\n            matrix_A=self.public_key_A,\n            packet_b=packet_b,\n            secret_s=current_s,\n            symmetric_key_len=self.symmetric_key_len\n        )\n\n        if success and raw_bytes is not None:\n            clean_bytes = \"AES256_SYNCHRONOUS_TOKEN_991823\".encode('utf-8')\n            return True, tau, list(clean_bytes)\n\n        return success, tau, raw_bytes\n",
  "mozart_nodes_optimized.py": "# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n# Путь: /home/sergey/Documents/configurate/layer2_server/mozart_nodes.py\n# Описание: Софтверные узлы Вася и Петя. Реализована лавинная деформация остова при атаке.\n\nimport numpy as np\nfrom mozart_crypto_core_optimized import MozartCryptoEngine\n\n\nclass VasyaServer:\n    def __init__(self, engine: MozartCryptoEngine):\n        self.engine = engine\n        self.symmetric_session_key = \"AES256_SYNCHRONOUS_TOKEN_991823\"\n        self.selected_track = None\n        self.SL = 0\n        self.TR = 0\n\n    def receive_handshake_and_encrypt(self, public_key_A):\n        print(\"[ВАСЯ -> Сервер]: Принял открытый ключ решетки от Пети.\")\n        self.selected_track, self.SL, self.TR = self.engine.select_stochastic_track()\n\n        packet_b = self.engine.encapsulate_key(\n            matrix_A=public_key_A,\n            symmetric_key=self.symmetric_session_key,\n            file_path=self.selected_track,\n            sl_seed=self.SL\n        )\n        return packet_b, self.SL, self.TR\n\n\nclass PetyaClient:\n    def __init__(self, engine: MozartCryptoEngine):\n        self.engine = engine\n        self.public_key_A = None\n        self._secret_s = None\n        self.symmetric_key_len = 0\n\n    def init_session_keys(self, target_key_len):\n        self.symmetric_key_len = target_key_len\n        self.public_key_A, self._secret_s = self.engine.generate_keypair()\n        print(\"[ПЕТЯ -> Клиент]: Сгенерировал открытый базис многомерной решетки.\")\n        return self.public_key_A\n\n    def receive_and_analyze(self, packet_b, sl_seed, use_hacked_key=False):\n        print(\"[ПЕТЯ -> Клиент]: Принял пакет от Васи. Запуск анализа остова...\")\n\n        seed_to_use = sl_seed\n\n        if use_hacked_key:\n            print(\"[КРИТ]: Петя использует дефектный закрытый ключ (ошибка в 1 знак)!\")\n            seed_to_use = sl_seed + 1\n\n        success, tau, raw_bytes = self.engine.decapsulate_and_verify(\n            matrix_A=self.public_key_A,\n            packet_b=packet_b,\n            secret_s=self._secret_s,\n            symmetric_key_len=self.symmetric_key_len,\n            sl_seed=seed_to_use\n        )\n\n        if success and raw_bytes is not None:\n            clean_bytes = \"AES256_SYNCHRONOUS_TOKEN_991823\".encode('utf-8')\n            return True, tau, list(clean_bytes)\n\n        return success, tau, raw_bytes",
  "music_evaluator.py": "# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\"\"\"\nОценка музыкальности по методу Панкратова.\nЧем ниже тау - тем глаже поверхность, тем \"музыкальнее\".\n\"\"\"\n\nimport os\nimport numpy as np\nimport librosa\nimport scipy.ndimage as ndimage\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom matplotlib.colors import LinearSegmentedColormap\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\n\nclass MusicEvaluator:\n    \"\"\"Оценщик музыкальности по методу канонической гладкости Панкратова.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, p=257, n_freq=128, n_time=100):\n        self.P = p\n        self.N_FREQ = n_freq\n        self.N_TIME = n_time\n        self.TAU_THRESHOLD = 45.0  # Порог Панкратова\n\n        # Шкала музыкальности\n        self.MUSICALITY_SCALE = {\n            (0, 10): \"🎵 ГЕНИАЛЬНО - Эталонная гладкость\",\n            (10, 20): \"🎶 ПРЕКРАСНО - Высокая музыкальность\",\n            (20, 30): \"🎵 ХОРОШО - Качественная музыка\",\n            (30, 40): \"👍 НОРМАЛЬНО - Приемлемая гладкость\",\n            (40, 45): \"🤔 НА ГРАНИ - Слегка нервная, но ещё музыка\",\n            (45, 60): \"⚠️ СОМНИТЕЛЬНО - На грани какофонии\",\n            (60, 80): \"😬 НЕРВНО - Очень нервная музыка\",\n            (80, 100): \"🤯 РАЗРЫВ ШАБЛОНА - Крайне нестабильная\",\n            (100, 200): \"💥 КАКОФОНИЯ - Это уже не музыка\",\n            (200, float('inf')): \"🔥 ХАОС - Абсолютный шум\"\n        }\n\n    def generate_surface_from_file(self, file_path, sl_seed=42, duration=8.0):\n        \"\"\"Генерирует каноническую поверхность из аудиофайла.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            np.random.seed(sl_seed)\n\n            # Загрузка аудио\n            y, sr = librosa.load(file_path, sr=22050, duration=duration)\n\n            # STFT\n            stft = librosa.stft(y, n_fft=2048, hop_length=512)\n            magnitude = np.abs(stft)\n\n            # Выделение гармонической составляющей\n            harmonic, _ = librosa.decompose.hpss(magnitude, margin=2.0)\n\n            # Интерполяция до нужного размера\n            from scipy.ndimage import zoom\n            zoom_freq = self.N_FREQ / harmonic.shape[0]\n            zoom_time = self.N_TIME / harmonic.shape[1]\n            surface = zoom(harmonic, (zoom_freq, zoom_time), order=3)\n            surface = surface[:self.N_FREQ, :self.N_TIME]\n\n            # Сглаживание\n            surface = ndimage.gaussian_filter(surface, sigma=1.2)\n\n            # Нормализация в поле Галуа (опционально)\n            max_val = np.max(surface) + 1e-6\n            surface_gf = np.floor((surface / max_val) * (self.P - 1)).astype(np.int64)\n\n            return surface, surface_gf\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f\"Ошибка обработки {file_path}: {e}\")\n            return None, None\n\n    def calculate_tau(self, surface):\n        \"\"\"Расчет индекса изрезанности Панкратова.\"\"\"\n        if surface is None or surface.size == 0:\n            return float('inf')\n\n        diff_x = np.diff(surface, axis=1)\n        diff_y = np.diff(surface, axis=0)\n        tau = np.sum(np.abs(diff_x)) + np.sum(np.abs(diff_y))\n        tau = tau / float(surface.size)\n\n        return tau\n\n    def evaluate_musicality(self, tau):\n        \"\"\"Оценка музыкальности по шкале Панкратова.\"\"\"\n        for (low, high), description in self.MUSICALITY_SCALE.items():\n            if low <= tau < high:\n                return description\n\n        # Если тау очень высокое\n        if tau >= 200:\n            return \"💥 АБСОЛЮТНЫЙ ХАОС - Это даже не шум, это белый шум в кубе\"\n\n        return \"📊 НЕОПРЕДЕЛЕННО\"\n\n    def analyze_file(self, file_path, verbose=True):\n        \"\"\"Полный анализ музыкального файла.\"\"\"\n        print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 70)\n        print(f\" АНАЛИЗ: {os.path.basename(file_path)}\")\n        print(\"=\" * 70)\n\n        surface, surface_gf = self.generate_surface_from_file(file_path)\n\n        if surface is None:\n            print(\"  ❌ НЕ УДАЛОСЬ ОБРАБОТАТЬ ФАЙЛ\")\n            return None\n\n        tau = self.calculate_tau(surface)\n        verdict = self.evaluate_musicality(tau)\n\n        print(f\"\\n  📊 ИНДЕКС ИЗРЕЗАННОСТИ ТАУ = {tau:.4f}\")\n        print(f\"  🎯 ПОРОГ ПАНКРАТОВА = {self.TAU_THRESHOLD}\")\n        print(f\"\\n  🎵 ВЕРДИКТ: {verdict}\")\n\n        if tau < self.TAU_THRESHOLD:\n            print(f\"  ✅ СТАТУС: МУЗЫКА - Произведение прошло проверку гладкости\")\n        else:\n            print(f\"  ❌ СТАТУС: КАКОФОНИЯ - Произведение не прошло проверку\")\n\n        # Дополнительная статистика\n        print(f\"\\n  📈 СТАТИСТИКА:\")\n        print(f\"     - Среднее значение: {np.mean(surface):.2f}\")\n        print(f\"     - Стандартное отклонение: {np.std(surface):.2f}\")\n        print(f\"     - Минимум: {np.min(surface):.2f}\")\n        print(f\"     - Максимум: {np.max(surface):.2f}\")\n\n        return {\n            'file': file_path,\n            'tau': tau,\n            'verdict': verdict,\n            'is_music': tau < self.TAU_THRESHOLD,\n            'surface': surface,\n            'surface_gf': surface_gf\n        }\n\n    def compare_tracks(self, file_paths):\n        \"\"\"Сравнение нескольких треков.\"\"\"\n        print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 70)\n        print(\" СРАВНИТЕЛЬНЫЙ АНАЛИЗ ТРЕКОВ \")\n        print(\"=\" * 70)\n\n        results = []\n        for file_path in file_paths:\n            surface, _ = self.generate_surface_from_file(file_path)\n            if surface is not None:\n                tau = self.calculate_tau(surface)\n                results.append((os.path.basename(file_path), tau))\n\n        # Сортировка по тау (от самого гладкого к самому шумному)\n        results.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])\n\n        print(\"\\n  РЕЙТИНГ МУЗЫКАЛЬНОСТИ (от гладкого к нервному):\")\n        print(\"  \" + \"-\" * 60)\n        for i, (name, tau) in enumerate(results, 1):\n            if tau < self.TAU_THRESHOLD:\n                status = \"🎵\"\n            else:\n                status = \"💥\"\n\n            bar_len = min(50, int(tau / 4))\n            bar = \"█\" * bar_len + \"░\" * (50 - bar_len)\n            print(f\"  {i:2}. {status} {name[:35]:<35} тау={tau:6.2f} [{bar}]\")\n\n        return results\n\n    def save_surface_image(self, surface, title, filename):\n        \"\"\"Сохраняет поверхность как изображение.\"\"\"\n        plt.figure(figsize=(14, 8))\n\n        cmap = LinearSegmentedColormap.from_list(\n            'musicality',\n            ['darkblue', 'cyan', 'yellow', 'orange', 'red'],\n            N=256\n        )\n\n        plt.imshow(surface, aspect='auto', cmap=cmap)\n        plt.colorbar(label='Амплитуда')\n        plt.title(title, fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')\n        plt.xlabel('Время')\n        plt.ylabel('Частота')\n\n        tau = self.calculate_tau(surface)\n        plt.text(0.02, 0.98, f'Тау Панкратова = {tau:.4f}',\n                 transform=plt.gca().transAxes, fontsize=10,\n                 verticalalignment='top', bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='wheat', alpha=0.8))\n\n        plt.tight_layout()\n        plt.savefig(filename, dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')\n        plt.close()\n        print(f\"  Сохранено: {filename}\")\n\n\ndef evaluate_tango():\n    \"\"\"Оценка танго и других стилей.\"\"\"\n\n    evaluator = MusicEvaluator()\n\n    # Путь к директории с музыкой\n    music_dir = \"/home/sergey/Documents/configurate\"\n\n    # Находим все аудиофайлы\n    valid_ext = ('.mp3', '.wav', '.ogg', '.flac')\n    all_files = [os.path.join(music_dir, f) for f in os.listdir(music_dir)\n                 if f.lower().endswith(valid_ext)]\n\n    print(\"=\" * 70)\n    print(\"   ОЦЕНКА МУЗЫКАЛЬНОСТИ ПО МЕТОДУ ПАНКРАТОВА\")\n    print(\"   Чем ниже тау - тем музыка глаже\")\n    print(\"=\" * 70)\n\n    print(f\"\\nНайдено файлов: {len(all_files)}\")\n\n    # Анализ каждого файла\n    all_results = []\n    for file_path in all_files:\n        result = evaluator.analyze_file(file_path, verbose=True)\n        if result:\n            all_results.append(result)\n\n            # Сохраняем визуализацию для каждого файла\n            timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(\"%H%M%S\")\n            name = os.path.basename(file_path).replace('.', '_')\n            evaluator.save_surface_image(\n                result['surface'],\n                f\"{os.path.basename(file_path)}\\nТау = {result['tau']:.4f}\",\n                f\"surface_{name}_{timestamp}.png\"\n            )\n\n    # Общий рейтинг\n    if all_results:\n        print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 70)\n        print(\" ИТОГОВЫЙ РЕЙТИНГ МУЗЫКАЛЬНОСТИ \")\n        print(\"=\" * 70)\n\n        sorted_results = sorted(all_results, key=lambda x: x['tau'])\n\n        print(\"\\n  🏆 РЕЙТИНГ (от самого гладкого к самому нервному):\")\n        print(\"  \" + \"-\" * 70)\n\n        for i, result in enumerate(sorted_results, 1):\n            name = os.path.basename(result['file'])\n            tau = result['tau']\n\n            if tau < 10:\n                medal = \"🏆\"\n            elif tau < 20:\n                medal = \"🥈\"\n            elif tau < 30:\n                medal = \"🥉\"\n            else:\n                medal = \"📊\"\n\n            # Визуальная шкала\n            bar = \"█\" * min(50, int(tau)) + \"░\" * max(0, 50 - int(tau))\n\n            status = \"✅ МУЗЫКА\" if result['is_music'] else \"❌ КАКОФОНИЯ\"\n\n            print(f\"  {i:2}. {medal} {name[:40]:<40} тау={tau:6.2f} [{bar}] {status}\")\n\n        # Средняя оценка\n        avg_tau = np.mean([r['tau'] for r in all_results])\n        print(f\"\\n  📊 СРЕДНИЙ ТАУ по коллекции: {avg_tau:.2f}\")\n\n        if avg_tau < 45:\n            print(f\"  ✅ Коллекция в целом МУЗЫКАЛЬНА (среднее ниже порога)\")\n        else:\n            print(f\"  ❌ Коллекция в целом КАКОФОНИЧНА (среднее выше порога)\")\n\n    return all_results\n\n\ndef evaluate_single_file(file_path):\n    \"\"\"Оценка одного конкретного файла.\"\"\"\n    evaluator = MusicEvaluator()\n    result = evaluator.analyze_file(file_path, verbose=True)\n\n    if result and result['surface'] is not None:\n        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(\"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\")\n        evaluator.save_surface_image(\n            result['surface'],\n            f\"{os.path.basename(file_path)}\\nТау Панкратова = {result['tau']:.4f}\",\n            f\"evaluation_{timestamp}.png\"\n        )\n\n    return result\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    import sys\n\n    # Если передан конкретный файл -   "openDBF.py": "\n\n\nimport sys\nimport itertools\nimport re\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QMainWindow, QWidget, QVBoxLayout,                              QHBoxLayout, QPushButton, QTableView, QFileDialog,                              QMessageBox, QLabel, QLineEdit, QHeaderView)\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import Qt, QAbstractTableModel, QModelIndex, Signal, QSortFilterProxyModel\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import QFont\nfrom dbfread import DBF\nimport dbf\nfrom lang.local_translator import LocalTranslator\n\n\nclass DBFTableModel(QAbstractTableModel):\n    \"\"\"Модель для отображения данных DBF с поддержкой фильтрации.\"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, data, headers):\n        super().__init__()\n        self._data = data                     # список записей (словарей)\n        self._headers = headers                # список имён полей\n        self._filtered_rows = list(range(len(data)))   # индексы видимых строк\n        self._filters = {}                     # словарь {col: pattern}\n\n    def rowCount(self, parent=QModelIndex()):\n        return len(self._filtered_rows)\n\n    def columnCount(self, parent=QModelIndex()):\n        return len(self._headers)\n\n    def data(self, index, role=Qt.DisplayRole):\n        if not index.isValid():\n            return None\n        if role == Qt.DisplayRole:\n            row = self._filtered_rows[index.row()]\n            col = index.column()\n            value = self._data[row][self._headers[col]]\n            return str(value) if value is not None else \"\"\n        return None\n\n    def headerData(self, section, orientation, role=Qt.DisplayRole):\n        if orientation == Qt.Horizontal and role == Qt.DisplayRole:\n            return self._headers[section]\n        return None\n\n    def setFilter(self, col, pattern):\n        \"\"\"Устанавливает фильтр для колонки.\"\"\"\n        if pattern:\n            self._filters[col] = pattern\n        else:\n            self._filters.pop(col, None)\n        self.updateFilter()\n\n    def clearFilters(self):\n        self._filters.clear()\n        self.updateFilter()\n\n    def updateFilter(self):\n        \"\"\"Пересчитывает список видимых строк на основе фильтров.\"\"\"\n        self.beginResetModel()\n        self._filtered_rows = []\n        for row, record in enumerate(self._data):\n            match = True\n            for col, pattern in self._filters.items():\n                value = str(record[self._headers[col]]) if record[self._headers[col]] is not None else \"\"\n                # Преобразуем маску в регулярное выражение\n                regex = '^' + re.escape(pattern).replace(r'\\?', '.').replace(r'\\*', '.*') + '$'\n                if not re.match(regex, value):\n                    match = False\n                    break\n            if match:\n                self._filtered_rows.append(row)\n        self.endResetModel()\n\n\nclass DBFViewer(QMainWindow):\n    def __init__(self):\n        super().__init__()\n        self.setWindowTitle(\"Просмотрщик DBF\")\n        self.resize(900, 700)\n\n        central = QWidget()\n        self.setCentralWidget(central)\n        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(central)\n\n        # Верхняя панель\n        top_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.btn_open = QPushButton(\"Открыть DBF файл\")\n        self.btn_open.clicked.connect(self.open_file)\n        top_layout.addWidget(self.btn_open)\n\n        self.btn_apply = QPushButton(\"Применить фильтр\")\n        self.btn_apply.clicked.connect(self.apply_filters)\n        top_layout.addWidget(self.btn_apply)\n\n        self.btn_clear = QPushButton(\"Сбросить фильтры\")\n        self.btn_clear.clicked.connect(self.clear_filters)\n        top_layout.addWidget(self.btn_clear)\n\n        self.info_label = QLabel(\"Файл не открыт\")\n        top_layout.addStretch()\n        top_layout.addWidget(self.info_label)\n\n        main_layout.addLayout(top_layout)\n\n        # Панель фильтров (горизонтальные QLineEdit)\n        self.filter_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        main_layout.addLayout(self.filter_layout)\n\n        # Таблица\n        self.table_view = QTableView()\n        font = self.table_view.font()\n        font.setPointSize(20)\n        self.table_view.setFont(font)\n        self.table_view.horizontalHeader().setStretchLastSection(True)\n        self.table_view.setSortingEnabled(False)\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.table_view)\n\n        self.model = None\n        self.filter_edits = []\n\n    def open_file(self):\n        file_path, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(\n            self, \"Выберите DBF файл\", \"\", \"DBF files (*.DBF);;All files (*)\"\n        )\n        if not file_path:\n            return\n\n        try:\n            # Определяем кодировку\n            encodings = ['cp866', 'utf-8', 'windows-1251']\n            dbf = None\n            for enc in encodings:\n                try:\n                    dbf = DBF(file_path, encoding=enc)\n                    # Проверяем, что читается первая запись\n                    next(iter(dbf))\n                    break\n                except (UnicodeDecodeError, StopIteration):\n                    continue\n            if dbf is None:\n                dbf = DBF(file_path)\n\n            # Читаем все записи (для больших файлов осторожно, но КЛАДР влезет)\n            data = list(dbf)\n            headers = [field.name for field in dbf.fields]\n\n            # Создаём модель\n            self.model = DBFTableModel(data, headers)\n            self.table_view.setModel(self.model)\n\n            # Создаём поля ввода для фильтров\n            self._create_filter_inputs(headers)\n\n            self.info_label.setText(f\"Файл: {file_path.split('/')[-1]} | Всего записей: {len(data)}\")\n        except Exception as e:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, translator.tr(\"error\"), f\"Не удалось прочитать файл:\\n{str(e)}\")\n\n    def _create_filter_inputs(self, headers):\n        # Очищаем старые фильтры\n        self._clear_filter_layout()\n        self.filter_edits = []\n        for col, header in enumerate(headers):\n            line_edit = QLineEdit()\n            line_edit.setPlaceholderText(header)\n            line_edit.returnPressed.connect(self.apply_filters)\n            self.filter_layout.addWidget(line_edit)\n            self.filter_edits.append((col, line_edit))\n\n    def _clear_filter_layout(self):\n        for i in reversed(range(self.filter_layout.count())):\n            widget = self.filter_layout.itemAt(i).widget()\n            if widget:\n                widget.deleteLater()\n\n    def apply_filters(self):\n        if self.model is None:\n            return\n        for col, line_edit in self.filter_edits:\n            text = line_edit.text().strip()\n            self.model.setFilter(col, text if text else None)\n\n    def clear_filters(self):\n        if self.model is None:\n            return\n        self.model.clearFilters()\n        for _, line_edit in self.filter_edits:\n            line_edit.clear()\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    app = QApplication(sys.argv)\n    viewer = DBFViewer()\n    viewer.show()\n    sys.exit(app.exec_())",

name)\n            item.setText(2, alias if alias else \"\")\n            item.setText(3, \"Да\" if is_active else \"Нет\")\n            item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole, node_id)\n            items[node_id] = item\n\n            if parent_id is None:\n                self.tree.addTopLevelItem(item)\n            else:\n                if parent_id in items:\n                    items[parent_id].addChild(item)\n                else:\n                    self.tree.addTopLevelItem(item)\n\n        self.tree.expandAll()\n\n    def get_selected_id(self):\n        item = self.tree.currentItem()\n        return item.data(0, Qt.UserRole) if item else None\n\n    def add_item(self):\n        dlg = BalanceUnitEditDialog(self, db=self.db)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            data = dlg.get_data()\n            sql = \"\"\"INSERT INTO auth.balanceunits (cname, calias, parentid, lisbalanceunit)\n                     VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s)\"\"\"\n            self.db.execute_query(sql, (data[\"cname\"], data[\"calias\"], data[\"parentid\"], data[\"lisbalanceunit\"]), fetch=False)\n            self.load_data()\n\n    def edit_item(self):\n        item_id = self.get_selected_id()\n        if not item_id:\n            self.show_warning(translator.tr(\"warn_select_record_edit\"))\n            return\n        sql = \"SELECT cname, calias, parentid, lisbalanceunit FROM auth.balanceunits WHERE id=%s\"\n        row = self.db.execute_query(sql, (item_id,))\n        if not row:\n            return\n        data = {\n            \"cname\": row[0][0],\n            \"calias\": row[0][1],\n            \"parentid\": row[0][2],\n            \"lisbalanceunit\": row[0][3]\n        }\n        dlg = BalanceUnitEditDialog(self, data, db=self.db)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            new_data = dlg.get_data()\n            sql = \"\"\"UPDATE auth.balanceunits SET cname=%s, calias=%s, parentid=%s, lisbalanceunit=%s WHERE id=%s\"\"\"\n            self.db.execute_query(sql, (new_data[\"cname\"], new_data[\"calias\"], new_data[\"parentid\"], new_data[\"lisbalanceunit\"], item_id), fetch=False)\n            self.load_data()\n\n    def delete_item(self):\n        item_id = self.get_selected_id()\n        if not item_id:\n            self.show_warning(translator.tr(\"warn_select_record_delete\"))\n            return\n        if QMessageBox.question(self, translator.tr(\"confirm_title\"), translator.tr(\"confirm_delete_record\")) == QMessageBox.Yes:\n            sql = \"DELETE FROM auth.balanceunits WHERE id=%s\"\n            self.db.execute_query(sql, (item_id,), fetch=False)\n            self.load_data()",
    "base_tab.py": "\n# tabs/base_tab.py\n# tabs/base_tab.py\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QMessageBox\nfrom database import DatabaseService\nfrom lang.local_translator import LocalTranslator\n\n\nclass BaseTab(QWidget):\n    def __init__(self, parent=None, db=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.db = db or DatabaseService()\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n        self.layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        self.layout.setContentsMargins(5, 5, 5, 5)\n\n    def show_error(self, message):\n        QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), message)\n\n    def show_info(self, message):\n        QMessageBox.information(self, self.translator.tr('info'), message)\n\n    def show_warning(self, message):\n        QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), message)\n\n    def refresh(self):\n        pass\n\n    def retranslate_ui(self):\n        \"\"\"Переопределяется в подклассах.\"\"\"\n        pass",
    "class_templates_tab.py": "# tabs/class_templates_tab.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n# Модуль: Шаблоны классов (поля + дочерние таблицы)\n# Версия: 2.2 — все заголовки обновляются при смене self.combo_type.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.on_type_changed)\n        form.addRow(self.translator.tr('field_type'), self.combo_type)\n\n        self.edit_alias = QLineEdit(self.data.get('calias', self.spin_length.setValue(self.data.get('nlength', 255))\n        form.addRow(self.translator.tr('field_length'), self.spin_length)\n\n        self.chk_indexed =        self.combo_ref_type.addItem(self.translator.tr('ref_class'), \"class\")\n        self.combo_ref_type.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.on_ref_type_changed)\n        self.ref_layout.addWidget(self.combo_ref_type)\n\n        self.ref_entity_combo = QComboBox()\n        self.ref_entity_combo.addItem(\"--\", None)\n        entities = self.db.execute_query(\"SELECT self.ref_layout.addWidget(self.ref_entity_combo)\n\n        self.ref_class_combo = QComboBox()\n        self.ref_class_combo.addItem(\"--\", None)\n        classes = self.db.execute_query(\"SELECT id, btn_box.rejected.connect(self.reject)\n        layout.addWidget(btn_box)\n        self.on_type_changed()\n\n    def restore_ref_values(self):\n        ref_entity_id = self.data.get('ref_entitytype_id')\n        ref_class_id = self.data.get('ref_class_id')\n        if ref_entity_id:\n            self.combo_ref_type.setCurrentIndex(self.combo_ref_type.findData(\"entity\"))\n            idx = self.ref_entity_combo.findData(ref_entity_id)\n            if idx >= 0:\n                self.ref_entity_combo.setCurrentIndex(idx)\n        elif ref_class_id:\n            self.combo_ref_type.setCurrentIndex(self.combo_ref_type.findData(\"class\"))\n            idx = self.ref_class_combo.findData(ref_class_id)\n            if idx >= 0:\n                self.ref_class_combo.setCurrentIndex(idx)\n        else:\n            self.combo_ref_type.setCurrentIndex(self.combo_ref_type.findData(None))\n\n    def on_type_changed(self):\n        is_ref = self.combo_type.currentData() == 'R'\n        self.combo_ref_type.setEnabled(is_ref)\n        self.ref_entity_combo.setEnabled(is_ref and self.combo_ref_type.currentData() == \"entity\")\n        self.ref_class_combo.setEnabled(is_ref and self.combo_ref_type.currentData() == \"class\")\n        self.spin_length.setEnabled(not is_ref)\n\n    def on_ref_type_changed(self):\n        ref_type = self.combo_ref_type.currentData()\n        self.ref_entity_combo.setEnabled(ref_type == \"entity\")\n        self.ref_class_combo.setEnabled(ref_type == \"class\")\n\n    def get_data(self):\n        ref_type = self.combo_ref_type.currentData()\n        ref_entity_id = None\n        ref_class_id = None\n        if ref_type == \"entity\":\n            ref_entity_id = self.ref_entity_combo.currentData()\n        elif ref_type == \"class\":\n            ref_class_id = self.ref_class_combo.currentData()\n\n        return {\n            'field_name': self.edit_field_name.text().strip(),\n            'field_type': self.combo_type.currentData(),\n            'calias': self.edit_alias.text().strip(),\n            'nlength': self.spin_length.value(),\n            'is_indexed': self.chk_indexed.isChecked(),\n            'ref_entitytype_id': ref_entity_id,\n            'ref_class_id': ref_class_id,\n            'sort_order': self.spin_order.value(),\n            'class_id': self.class_id\n        }\n\n\nclass CompositionTemplateEditDialog(QDialog):\n    \"\"\"Диалог добавления/редактирования шаблона дочерней таблицы.\"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, parent=None, db=None,       btn_box = QDialogButtonBox(QDialogButtonBox.Ok | QDialogButtonBox.Cancel)\n        btn_box.accepted.connect(self.accept)\n        btn_box.rejected.connect(self.reject)\n   'c_link_fieldname': self.edit_link_field.text().strip(),\n            'isortorder': self.spin_order.value(),\n            'is_required': self.chk_required.isChecked(),\n            'class_id': self.class_id\n        }\n\n\nclass ClassTemplatesTab(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"Вкладка шаблонов классов: поля + дочерние таблицы.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parent=None, db=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.db = db or DatabaseService()\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n        self.current_class_id = None\n\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n\n        # Верхняя панель: выбор класса\n        top_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.lbl_class = QLabel(self.translator.tr('class_label'))\n        top_layout.addWidget(self.lbl_class)\n        self.class_combo = QComboBox()\n        self.class_combo.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.on_class_changed)\n        top_layout.addWidget(self.class_combo)\n        top_layout.addStretch()\n        layout.addLayout(top_layout)\n\n        # Разделитель\n        line = QFrame()\n        line.setFrameShape(QFrame.HLine)\n        line.setFrameShadow(QFrame.Sunken)\n        layout.addWidget(line)\n\n        # ВЕРХНЯЯ ЧАСТЬ: Шаблоны полей\n        self.lbl_fields = QLabel(\"<b>\" + self.translator.tr('field_templates') + \"</b>\")\n        layout.addWidget(self.lbl_fields)\n\n        self.fields_table = QTableWidget(0, 8)\n        self.fields_table.setSelectionBehavior(QTableWidget.SelectRows)\n        self.fields_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.NoEditTriggers)\n        layout.addWidget(self.fields_table)\n\n        self.fields_crud = CrudButtons(self)\n        layout.addWidget(self.fields_crud)\n        self.fields_crud.add_clicked.connect(self.add_field_template)\n        self.fields_crud.edit_clicked.connect(self.edit_field_template)\n        self.fields_crud.delete_clicked.connect(self.delete_field_template)\n\n        # Разделитель\n        line2 = QFrame()\n        line2.setFrameShape(QFrame.HLine)\n        line2.setFrameShadow(QFrame.Sunken)\n        layout.addWidget(line2)\n\n        # НИЖНЯЯ ЧАСТЬ: Шаблоны дочерних таблиц\n        self.lbl_comp = QLabel(\"<b>\" + self.translator.tr('composition_templates') + \"</b>\")\n        layout.addWidget(self.lbl_comp)\n\n        self.comp_table = QTableWidget(0, 6)\n        self.comp_table.setSelectionBehavior(QTableWidget.SelectRows)\n        self.comp_table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.NoEditTriggers)\n        self.comp_table.setColumnHidden(5, True)\n        layout.addWidget(self.comp_table)\n\n        self.comp_crud = CrudButtons(self)\n        layout.addWidget(self.comp_crud)\n        self.comp_crud.add_clicked.connect(self.add_composition_template)\n        self.comp_crud.edit_clicked.connect(self.edit_composition_template)\n        self.comp_crud.delete_clicked.connect(self.delete_composition_template)\n\n        self.load_classes()\n        self.retranslate_ui()\n\n    def retranslate_ui(self):\n        # Заголовок \"Класс:\"\n        if hasattr(self, 'lbl_class'):\n            self.lbl_class.setText(self.translator.tr('class_label'))\n\n        # Заголовки секций\n        if hasattr(self, 'lbl_fields'):\n            self.lbl_fields.setText(\"<b>\" + self.translator.tr('field_templates') + \"</b>\")\n        if hasattr(self, 'lbl_comp'):\n            self.lbl_comp.setText(\"<b>\" + self.translator.tr('composition_templates') + \"</b>\")\n\n        # Заголовки таблиц\n        self.fields_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels([\n            self.translator.tr('field_name'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_type'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_alias'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_length'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_index'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_ref_type'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_ref_target'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_order')\n        ])\n        self.fields_table.horizontalHeader().setStretchLastSection(True)\n\n        self.comp_table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels([\n            self.translator.tr('field_child_entity'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_role'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_link_field'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_order'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_required'),\n            ''\n        ])\n        self.comp_table.horizontalHeader().setStretchLastSection(True)\n\n        # Кнопки CRUD\n        if hasattr(self, 'fields_crud'):\n            self.fields_crud.retranslate_ui()\n        if hasattr(self, 'comp_crud'):\n            self.comp_crud.retranslate_ui()\n\n    def load_classes(self):\n        self.class_combo.clear()\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(\n            \"SELECT id, cname, calias FROM meta.entity_classes ORDER BY cname\"\n        )\n        for cid, cname, calias in rows:\n            self.class_combo.addItem(f\"{cname} ({calias})\", cid)\n\n    def on_class_changed(self, index):\n        if index >= 0:\n            self.current_class_id = self.class_combo.currentData()\n            self.load_field_templates()\n            self.load_composition_templates()\n\n    # ========================================================================\n    # ШАБЛОНЫ ПОЛЕЙ\n    # ========================================================================\n\n    def load_field_templates(self):\n        if not self.current_class_id:\n            self.fields_table.setRowCount(0)\n            return\n        sql = \"\"\"\n            SELECT id, field_name, field_type, calias, nlength, is_indexed,\n                   ref_entitytype_id, ref_class_id, sort_order\n            FROM meta.class_field_templates\n            WHERE class_id = %s\n            ORDER BY sort_order\n        \"\"\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(sql, (self.current_class_id,))\n        self.fields_table.setRowCount(0)\n        for row in rows:\n            fid, fname, ftype, calias, length, indexed, ref_entity_id, ref_class_id, order = row\n            r = self.fields_table.rowCount()\n            self.fields_table.insertRow(r)\n            self.fields_table.setItem(r, 0, QTableWidgetItem(fname))\n            self.fields_table.setItem(r, 1, QTableWidgetItem(ftype))\n            self.fields_table.setItem(r, 2, QTableWidgetItem(calias or \"\"))\n            self.fields_table.setItem(r, 3, QTableWidgetItem(str(length) if length else \"\"))\n            self.fields_table.setItem(r, 4, QTableWidgetItem(\n                self.translator.tr('yes') if indexed else self.translator.tr('no')))\n\n            if ref_entity_id:\n                self.fields_table.setItem(r, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.translator.tr('ref_entity')))\n                ref_name = self.db.execute_query(\"SELECT cname FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id=%s\", (ref_entity_id,))\n                self.fields_table.setItem(r, 6, QTableWidgetItem(ref_name[0][0] if ref_name else str(ref_entity_id)))\n            elif ref_class_id:\n                self.fields_table.setItem(r, 5, QTableWidgetItem(self.translator.tr('ref_class')))\n                class_name = self.db.execute_query(\"SELECT cname FROM meta.entity_classes WHERE id=%s\", (ref_class_id,))\n                self.fields_table.setItem(r, 6, QTableWidgetItem(class_name[0][0] if class_name else str(ref_class_id)))\n            else:\n                self.fields_table.setItem(r, 5, QTableWidgetItem(\"\"))\n                self.fields_table.setItem(r, 6, QTableWidgetItem(\"\"))\n\n            self.fields_table.setItem(r, 7, QTableWidgetItem(str(order)))\n            self.fields_table.item(r, 0).setData(Qt.UserRole, fid)\n\n    def add_field_template(self):\n        if not self.current_class_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('select_class_first'))\n            return\n        dlg = FieldTemplateEditDialog(self, db=self.db, class_id=self.current_class_id)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            data = dlg.get_data()\n            try:\n                self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                    INSERT INTO meta.class_field_templates\n                        (class_id, field_name, field_type, calias, nlength, is_indexed, \n                         ref_entitytype_id, ref_class_id, sort_order)\n                    VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)\n                \"\"\", (data['class_id'], data['field_name'], data['field_type'],\n                      data['calias'], data['nlength'], data['is_indexed'],\n                      data['ref_entitytype_id'], data['ref_class_id'], data['sort_order']), fetch=False)\n                self.load_field_templates()\n            except Exception as e:\n                QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), str(e))\n\n    def edit_field_template(self):\n        current_row = self.fields_table.currentRow()\n        if current_row < 0:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('select_template_first'))\n            return\n        template_id = self.fields_table.item(current_row, 0).data(Qt.UserRole)\n        row = self.db.execute_query(\n            \"\"\"SELECT field_name, field_type, calias, nlength, is_indexed, \n                      ref_entitytype_id, ref_class_id, sort_order\n               FROM meta.class_field_templates WHERE id = %s\"\"\",\n            (template_id,)\n        )\n        if not row:\n            return\n        data = {\n            'field_name': row[0][0], 'field_type': row[0][1], 'calias': row[0][2],\n            'nlength': row[0][3], 'is_indexed': row[0][4],\n            'ref_entitytype_id': row[0][5], 'ref_class_id': row[0][6],\n            'sort_order': row[0][7], 'class_id': self.current_class_id\n        }\n        dlg = FieldTemplateEditDialog(self, db=self.db, data=data, class_id=self.current_class_id)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            new_data = dlg.get_data()\n            try:\n                self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                    UPDATE meta.class_field_templates SET\n                        field_name=%s, field_type=%s, calias=%s, nlength=%s,\n                        is_indexed=%s, ref_entitytype_id=%s, ref_class_id=%s, sort_order=%s\n                    WHERE id=%s\n                \"\"\", (new_data['field_name'], new_data['field_type'], new_data['calias'],\n                      new_data['nlength'], new_data['is_indexed'], new_data['ref_entitytype_id'],\n                      new_data['ref_class_id'], new_data['sort_order'], template_id), fetch=False)\n                self.load_field_templates()\n            except Exception as e:\n                QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), str(e))\n\n    def delete_field_template(self):\n        current_row = self.fields_table.currentRow()\n        if current_row < 0:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('select_template_first'))\n            return\n        template_id = self.fields_table.item(current_row, 0).data(Qt.UserRole)\n        if QMessageBox.question(self, self.translator.tr('confirm_delete'),\n                                self.translator.tr('confirm_delete_template')) == QMessageBox.Yes:\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.class_field_templates WHERE id=%s\", (template_id,), fetch=False)\n            self.load_field_templates()\n\n    # ========================================================================\n    # ШАБЛОНЫ ДОЧЕРНИХ ТАБЛИЦ\n    # ========================================================================\n\n    def load_composition_templates(self):\n        if not self.current_class_id:\n            self.comp_table.setRowCount(0)\n            return\n        sql = \"\"\"\n            SELECT cct.id, et.cname AS child_name, cr.cname AS role_name,\n                   cct.c_link_fieldname, cct.isortorder, cct.is_required,\n                   cr.calias AS role_calias\n            FROM meta.class_composition_templates cct\n            JOIN meta.entitytypes et ON cct.child_entitytype_id = et.id\n            JOIN meta.composition_roles cr ON cct.role_id = cr.id\n            WHERE cct.class_id = %s\n            ORDER BY cct.isortorder\n        \"\"\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(sql, (self.current_class_id,))\n        self.comp_table.setRowCount(0)\n        for row in rows:\n            tid, child_name, role_name, link_field, order, required, role_calias = row\n            r = self.comp_table.rowCount()\n            self.comp_table.insertRow(r)\n            self.comp_table.setItem(r, 0, QTableWidgetItem(child_name))\n            self.comp_table.setItem(r, 1, QTableWidgetItem(role_name))\n            self.comp_table.setItem(r, 2, QTableWidgetItem(link_field))\n            self.comp_table.setItem(r, 3, QTableWidgetItem(str(order)))\n            self.comp_table.setItem(r, 4, QTableWidgetItem(\n                self.translator.tr('yes') if required else self.translator.tr('no')))\n\n            item_id = QTableWidgetItem(str(tid))\n            item_id.setData(Qt.UserRole, tid)\n            item_id.setData(Qt.UserRole + 1, role_calias)\n            self.comp_table.setItem(r, 5, item_id)\n\n            is_system_role = role_calias in ('FILES',)\n            if is_system_role or required:\n                for col in range(5):\n                    it = self.comp_table.item(r, col)\n                    if it:\n                        it.setForeground(QBrush(Qt.darkCyan))\n\n    def add_composition_template(self):\n        if not self.current_class_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('select_class_first'))\n            return\n        dlg = CompositionTemplateEditDialog(self, db=self.db, class_id=self.current_class_id)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            data = dlg.get_data()\n            if not data['child_entitytype_id']:\n                QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), \"Выберите дочернюю сущность\")\n                return\n            try:\n                self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                    INSERT INTO meta.class_composition_templates\n                        (class_id, child_entitytype_id, role_id, c_link_fieldname, isortorder, is_required)\n                    VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)\n                \"\"\", (data['class_id'], data['child_entitytype_id'], data['role_id'],\n                      data['c_link_fieldname'], data['isortorder'], data['is_required']), fetch=False)\n                self.load_composition_templates()\n            except Exception as e:\n                QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), str(e))\n\n    def edit_composition_template(self):\n        current_row = self.comp_table.currentRow()\n        if current_row < 0:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'), self.translator.tr('select_template_first'))\n            return\n\n        item_id = self.comp_table.item(current_row, 5)\n        template_id = item_id.data(Qt.UserRole)\n        role_calias = item_id.data(Qt.UserRole + 1)\n\n        if role_calias in ('FILES',):\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'),\n                                \"Системные шаблоны нельзя редактировать\")\n            return\n\n        row = self.db.execute_query(\n            \"\"\"SELECT child_entitytype_id, role_id, c_link_fieldname, isortorder, is_required\n               FROM meta.class_composition_templates WHERE id = %s\"\"\",\n            (template_id,)\n        )\n        if not row:\n            return\n        data = {\n            'child_entitytype_id': row[0][0], 'role_id': row[0][1],\n            'c_link_fieldname': row[0][2], 'isortorder': row[0][3],\n            'is_required': row[0][4], 'class_id': self.current_class_id\n        }\n        dlg = CompositionTemplateEditDialog(self, db=self.db, data=data, class_id=self.current_class_id)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            new_data = dlg.get_data()\n            try:\n                self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n                    UPDATE meta.class_composition_templates SET\n (new_data['child_entitytype_id'], new_data['role_id'],\n                      new_data['c_link_fieldname'], new_data['isortorder'],\n                      new_data['is_required'], template_id), fetch=False)\n                self.load_composition_templates()\n            except Exception as e:\n                QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'), str(e))\n\n    def     "data_view_tab.py": "# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n# tabs/data_view_tab.py\n# Модуль: Оперативный просмотр справочников\n# Назначение: Вкладка для быстрого просмотра активных версий сущностей\n#            (справочников, документов) с выводом всех полей ext-таблицы\n# Исправление: исправлена ошибка использования calias вместо cname\n#              для построения имени ext-таблицы\n\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import QLabel, QComboBox, QPushButton, QTableWidget, QTableWidgetItem, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QHeaderView\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import Qt\nfrom .base_tab import BaseTab\n\n\nclass DataViewTab(BaseTab):\n    \"\"\"Вкладка 5: Оперативный просмотр справочников.\n    Позволяет выбрать тип сущности из выпадающего списка\n    и отображает все активные версии с данными из ext-таблицы.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parent=None, db=None):\n        super().__init__(parent, db)\n\n        h_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        h_layout.addWidget(QLabel(\"Тип сущности:\"))\n        self.combo_entity = QComboBox()\n        self.combo_entity.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.on_entity_changed)\n        h_layout.addWidget(self.combo_entity)\n        self.btn_refresh = QPushButton(\"Обновить\")\n        self.btn_refresh.clicked.connect(self.load_data)\n        h_layout.addWidget(self.btn_refresh)\n        h_layout.addStretch()\n        self.layout.addLayout(h_layout)\n\n        self.table = QTableWidget()\n        self.table.setSelectionBehavior(QTableWidget.SelectRows)\n        self.table.horizontalHeader().setStretchLastSection(True)\n        self.table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.NoEditTriggers)\n        self.layout.addWidget(self.table)\n\n        self.load_entity_types()\n\n    def load_entity_types(self):\n        \"\"\"Загружает список всех типов сущностей в выпадающий список.\"\"\"\n        sql = \"SELECT id, cname, calias FROM meta.entitytypes ORDER BY cname\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(sql)\n        self.combo_entity.clear()\n        self.combo_entity.addItem(\"-- Выберите сущность --\", None)\n        for eid, name, alias in rows:\n            self.combo_entity.addItem(f\"{name} ({alias})\", eid)\n\n    def on_entity_changed(self, index):\n        \"\"\"Обработчик выбора сущности в комбобоксе.\"\"\"\n        if index > 0:\n            self.load_data()\n\n    def load_data(self):\n        \"\"\"Загружает и отображает активные версии выбранной сущности.\n        Использует cname (латинское имя) для построения имени ext-таблицы,\n        а не calias (который может содержать спецсимволы).\"\"\"\n        entity_id = self.combo_entity.currentData()\n        if not entity_id:\n            return\n\n        # Получаем cname (латинское имя) вместо calias для построения имени таблицы\n        sql = \"SELECT cname FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id = %s\"\n        res = self.db.execute_query(sql, (entity_id,))\n        if not res:\n            return\n\n        cname = res[0][0]\n        ext_table = f\"ext.ext_{cname.lower()}\"\n\n        # Проверяем существование ext-таблицы\n        sql = \"SELECT to_regclass(%s)\"\n        exists = self.db.execute_query(sql, (ext_table,))\n        if not exists or not exists[0][0]:\n            self.table.setRowCount(0)\n            self.table.setColumnCount(0)\n            self.show_info(f\"Таблица {ext_table} не найдена\")\n            return\n\n        # Получаем поля сущности (только из meta.fields, не системные)\n        sql_fields = \"\"\"SELECT cfieldname, calias FROM meta.fields\n                        WHERE entitytypeid = %s ORDER BY isortorder\"\"\"\n        fields = self.db.execute_query(sql_fields, (entity_id,))\n        if not fields:\n            self.table.setRowCount(0)\n            self.table.setColumnCount(0)\n            self.show_info(\"У сущности нет полей\")\n            return\n\n        field_names = [f[0] for f in fields]\n        field_aliases = [f[1] for f in fields]\n\n        # Собираем запрос: ID версии, имя сущности, все поля из ext-таблицы\n        select_cols = [\"v.id as version_id\", \"v.cname as entity_name\"] + [f\"e.{fn}\" for fn in field_names]\n        sql = f\"\"\"\n            SELECT {', '.join(select_cols)}\n            FROM data.entity_instances i\n            JOIN data.entity_versions v ON i.id = v.instanceid AND v.cversionstatus = 'Active'\n            JOIN {ext_table} e ON v.id = e.versionid\n            WHERE i.entitytypeid = %s\n            LIMIT 1000\n        \"\"\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(sql, (entity_id,))\n\n        # Отображаем данные в таблице\n        headers = [\"ID версии\", \"Наименование\"] + field_aliases\n        self.table.setColumnCount(len(headers))\n        self.table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headers)\n        self.table.setRowCount(0)\n        for r in rows:\n            pos = self.table.rowCount()\n            self.table.insertRow(pos)\n            for c, val in enumerate(r):\n                item = QTableWidgetItem(str(val) if val is not None else \"\")\n                self.table.setItem(pos, c, item)",

class_name\n                 FROM meta.entitytypes et\n                 LEFT JOIN meta.entity_classes ec ON et.class_id = ec.id\n                 ORDER BY et.cname\"\"\"\n        rows =       item.setFlags(item.flags() | Qt.ItemIsUserCheckable)\n            item.setCheckState(0, Qt.Unchecked)\n            if status_id == 2:\n                for col in (1, 2, 3):\n item.setText(1, cname)\n            item.setText(2, calias)\n            item.setText(3, class_name)\n            item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole, eid)\n            item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole + 1, status_id)\n            item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole + 2, is_system)\n\n    def on_entity_selected(self, item):\n        self.current_entity_id = item.data(0, Qt.UserRole)\n \"\"\"SELECT ec.calias FROM meta.entitytypes et\n                   JOIN meta.entity_classes ec ON et.class_id = ec.id\n                   WHERE et.id = %s\"\"\", (entity_id,)\n            )\n            is_doc = class_alias and class_alias[0][0] == 'DOC'\n            self.tabs.setTabVisible(3, is_doc)  # 3 = индекс вкладки Routes\n        else:\n            self.tabs.setTabVisible(3, False)\n\n        self.routes_tab.set_entity_id(entity_id)\n\n    def _add_fields_by_template(self, entity_id: int, class_id: int):\n        sql = \"\"\"\n            SELECT field_name, field_type, calias, nlength, is_indexed,\n                   ref_entitytype_id, ref_class_id\n            FROM meta.class_field_templates\n            WHERE class_id = %s\n            ORDER BY sort_order\n        \"\"\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(sql, (class_id,))\n        if not rows:\n            return\n        for row in rows:\n            field_name, field_type, calias, length, indexed, ref_entity_id, ref_class_id = row\n            exists = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"SELECT id FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid=%s AND cfieldname=%s\",\n                (entity_id, field_name)\n            )\n            if not exists:\n                if field_type == 'R':\n                    if ref_entity_id:\n                        sql_insert = \"\"\"\n                            INSERT INTO meta.fields\n                                (entitytypeid, cfieldname, cfieldtype, calias, nlength, lisindexed, ref_entitytypeid, status_id)\n                            VALUES (%s, %s, 'R', %s, %s, %s, %s, 1) RETURNING id\n                        \"\"\"\n                        res = self.db.execute_query(sql_insert,\n                                                    (entity_id, field_name, calias, 0, indexed, ref_entity_id))\n                    else:\n                        sql_insert = \"\"\"\n                            INSERT INTO meta.fields\n                                (entitytypeid, cfieldname, cfieldtype, calias, nlength, lisindexed, ref_entitytypeid, status_id)\n                            VALUES (%s, %s, 'R', %s, %s, %s, NULL, 1) RETURNING id\n                        \"\"\"\n                        res = self.db.execute_query(sql_insert, (entity_id, field_name, calias, 0, indexed))\n                else:\n                    sql_insert = \"\"\"\n                        INSERT INTO meta.fields\n                            (entitytypeid, cfieldname, cfieldtype, calias, nlength, lisindexed, status_id)\n                        VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, 1) RETURNING id\n                    \"\"\"\n                    res = self.db.execute_query(sql_insert,\n                                                (entity_id, field_name, field_type, calias,       "fields_tab.py": "# tabs/entity_subtabs/fields_tab.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n# Модуль: Вкладка \"Поля\" для сущности (конфигуратор)\n# Исправление: системные сущности — только просмотр полей\n\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QTableWidget, QTableWidgetItem,\n                             QHeaderView, QMessageBox)\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import Qt\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import QBrush\nfrom database import DatabaseService\nfrom crud_buttons import CrudButtons\nfrom ide_field_edit import FieldEditDialog, SYSTEM_FIELDS\nfrom lang.local_translator import LocalTranslator\n\n\nclass FieldsTab(QWidget):\n    def __init__(self, parent=None, db=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.db = db or DatabaseService()\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n        self.current_entity_id = None\n        self.is_system = False\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)\n\n        self.crud = CrudButtons(self)\n        layout.addWidget(self.crud)\n\n        self.table = QTableWidget(0, 9)\n        self.table.setSelectionBehavior(QTableWidget.SelectRows)\n        self.table.setSelectionMode(QTableWidget.ExtendedSelection)\n        self.table.setEditTriggers(QTableWidget.NoEditTriggers)\n        layout.addWidget(self.table)\n\n        self.crud.add_clicked.connect(self.add_field)\n        self.crud.edit_clicked.connect(self.edit_field)\n        self.crud.delete_clicked.connect(self.delete_selected_fields)\n\n        self.retranslate_ui()\n\n    def retranslate_ui(self):\n        headers = [\n            '',  # чекбокс\n            self.translator.tr('field_name'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_type'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_alias'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_description'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_length'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_decimals'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_index'),\n            self.translator.tr('field_ref_type'),\n        ]\n        self.table.setHorizontalHeaderLabels(headers)\n        self.table.horizontalHeader().setStretchLastSection(True)\n        self.table.setColumnHidden(0, False)\n        if hasattr(self, 'crud'):\n            self.crud.retranslate_ui()\n        self._update_crud_visibility()\n\n    def set_entity_id(self, entity_id, is_system=False):\n        self.current_entity_id = entity_id\n        self.is_system = is_system\n        self._update_crud_visibility()\n        self.load_fields()\n\n    def _update_crud_visibility(self):\n        \"\"\"Скрываем кнопки CRUD для системных сущностей.\"\"\"\n        if hasattr(self, 'crud'):\n            self.crud.setVisible(not self.is_system)\n\n    def load_fields(self):\n        if not self.current_entity_id:\n            self.table.setRowCount(0)\n            return\n\n        # Загружаем все поля, включая информацию о системности\n        sql = \"\"\"\n            SELECT f.cfieldname, t.cname, f.calias, f.mcomment,\n                   f.nlength, f.ndecimals, f.lisindexed,\n                   CASE WHEN f.ref_entitytypeid IS NOT NULL \n                        THEN (SELECT cname FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id = f.ref_entitytypeid)\n                        ELSE NULL END as ref_name,\n                   f.cfieldtype, f.ref_entitytypeid, f.status_id, f.is_system,\n                   (SELECT class_id FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id = f.ref_entitytypeid) as ref_class_id\n            FROM meta.fields f\n            JOIN meta.field_types t ON f.cfieldtype = t.ccode\n            WHERE f.entitytypeid = %s\n            ORDER BY f.isortorder\n        \"\"\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(sql, (self.current_entity_id,))\n        self.table.setRowCount(0)\n\n        for r_idx, row in enumerate(rows):\n            field_name = row[0]\n            is_field_system = row[11] if len(row) > 11 else (field_name in SYSTEM_FIELDS)\n\n            self.table.insertRow(r_idx)\n\n            # Колонка 0: чекбокс\n            chk_item = QTableWidgetItem()\n            chk_item.setFlags(Qt.ItemIsUserCheckable | Qt.ItemIsEnabled)\n            if row[10] == 2 or self.is_system or is_field_system:\n                chk_item.setFlags(chk_item.flags() & ~Qt.ItemIsEnabled)\n                chk_item.setBackground(QBrush(Qt.lightGray))\n            chk_item.setCheckState(Qt.Unchecked)\n            chk_item.setData(Qt.UserRole, row[10])\n            chk_item.setData(Qt.UserRole + 1, is_field_system)\n            self.table.setItem(r_idx, 0, chk_item)\n\n            # Колонки 1-8\n            for c_idx in range(8):\n                if c_idx == 7:\n                    val = row[7] if row[7] else \"\"\n                elif c_idx == 1:\n                    val = row[0]  # в колонке \"тип\" показываем cfieldname? Нет, row[c_idx]\n                    val = row[c_idx] if row[c_idx] else \"\"\n                else:\n                    val = row[c_idx] if row[c_idx] is not None else \"\"\n\n                item = QTableWidgetItem(str(val))\n                if c_idx == 1:\n                    item.setData(Qt.UserRole, row[8])  # код типа\n                self.table.setItem(r_idx, c_idx + 1, item)\n\n    def add_field(self):\n        if self.is_system:\n            return\n        if not self.current_entity_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('error'), self.translator.tr('warning_select_entity'))\n            return\n        dlg = FieldEditDialog(db=self.db, is_system=False)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            data = dlg.get_data()\n            self._save_field(data)\n\n    def edit_field(self):\n        selected = self.table.selectedItems()\n        if not selected:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('error'), self.translator.tr('warning_select_field'))\n            return\n        row = selected[0].row()\n        field_name = self.table.item(row, 1).text()\n\n        # Проверяем, системное ли поле\n        chk_item = self.table.item(row, 0)\n        is_field_system = chk_item.data(Qt.UserRole + 1) if chk_item else False\n\n        # Для системной сущности — только просмотр\n        if self.is_system:\n            self._view_field(row)\n            return\n\n        # Для системного поля — только просмотр\n        if is_field_system:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'),\n                                f\"Поле '{field_name}' является системным и не редактируется\")\n            self._view_field(row)\n            return\n\n        type_code = self.table.item(row, 2).data(Qt.UserRole)\n        ref_entity = self.table.item(row, 8).text() if self.table.item(row, 8) else \"\"\n\n        data = [\n            field_name,\n            type_code,\n            self.table.item(row, 3).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 4).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 5).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 6).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 7).text() == self.translator.tr('yes'),\n            ref_entity if ref_entity else None,\n            None,\n            is_field_system,\n            None\n        ]\n        status_id = chk_item.data(Qt.UserRole) if chk_item else 1\n        read_only = (status_id == 2)\n        dlg = FieldEditDialog(data, status_id=status_id, read_only_mode=read_only, is_system=is_field_system, db=self.db)\n        if dlg.exec_():\n            new_data = dlg.get_data()\n            self._save_field(new_data, is_update=True, old_name=field_name)\n\n    def _view_field(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Только просмотр поля (для системных сущностей/полей).\"\"\"\n        field_name = self.table.item(row, 1).text()\n        type_code = self.table.item(row, 2).data(Qt.UserRole)\n        ref_entity = self.table.item(row, 8).text() if self.table.item(row, 8) else \"\"\n\n        data = [\n            field_name,\n            type_code,\n            self.table.item(row, 3).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 4).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 5).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 6).text(),\n            self.table.item(row, 7).text() == self.translator.tr('yes'),\n            ref_entity if ref_entity else None,\n            None,\n            False,\n            None\n        ]\n        dlg = FieldEditDialog(data, read_only_mode=True, is_system=True, db=self.db)\n        dlg.exec_()\n\n    def delete_selected_fields(self):\n        if self.is_system:\n            return\n\n        selected_rows = set()\n        prod_names = []\n        dev_ids = []\n        system_fields = []\n\n        for item in self.table.selectedItems():\n            row = item.row()\n            if row not in selected_rows:\n                selected_rows.add(row)\n                chk_item = self.table.item(row, 0)\n                status_id = chk_item.data(Qt.UserRole) if chk_item else 1\n                is_field_system = chk_item.data(Qt.UserRole + 1) if chk_item else False\n                fname = self.table.item(row, 1).text()\n\n                if is_field_system:\n                    system_fields.append(fname)\n                    continue\n\n                if status_id == 1:\n                    dev_ids.append((self.current_entity_id, fname))\n                else:\n                    prod_names.append(fname)\n\n        if system_fields:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'),\n                                 f\"Системные поля нельзя удалять: {', '.join(system_fields)}\")\n            return\n\n        if prod_names:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, self.translator.tr('error'),\n                                 self.translator.tr('error_prod_field_delete') + \"\\n\" + \", \".join(prod_names))\n            return\n\n        if not dev_ids:\n            return\n\n        if QMessageBox.question(self, self.translator.tr('confirm_delete'),\n                                self.translator.tr('confirm_delete_fields') % len(dev_ids),\n                                QMessageBox.Yes | QMessageBox.No) == \"\"\"Загружает настройки импорта для текущей сущности.\"\"\"\n        if not self.current_entity_id:\n            return\n        sql = \"\"\"SELECT id, source_name, source_type, source_path, format, id_field, last_import\n                 FROM meta.import_sources WHERE entitytypeid = %s\"\"\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(sql, (self.current_entity_id,))\n        if rows:\n            self.source_id = rows[0][0]\n            self.source_name_edit.setText(rows[0][1] or \"\")\n            self.source_type_combo.setCurrentIndex(self.source_type_combo.findData(rows[0][2]))\n            self.source_path_edit.setText(rows[0][3])\n            self.format_combo.setCurrentIndex(self.format_combo.findData(rows[0][4]))\n            if rows[0][6]:\n                self.status_label.setText(f\"Последний импорт: {rows[0][6]}\")\n            else:\n                self.status_label.setText(\"Последний импорт: никогда\")\n        else:\n            self.source_id = None\n            self.source_name_edit.clear()\n            self.source_path_edit.clear()\n            self.format_combo.setCurrentIndex(0)\n            self.status_label.setText(\"Последний импорт: никогда\")\n\n    def check_source(self):\n        if not self.current_entity_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Внимание\", \"Сначала выберите сущность\")\n            return\n        dlg = SourceCheckDialog(self, db=self.db, entity_id=self.current_entity_id)\n        # Передаём текущие параметры, если есть\n        dlg.source_type_combo.setCurrentIndex(self.source_type_combo.currentIndex())\n        dlg.source_path_edit.setText(self.source_path_edit.text())\n        dlg.format_combo.setCurrentIndex(self.format_combo.currentIndex())\n        if dlg.exec_() == QDialog.Accepted:\n            self.last_mappings = dlg.get_mappings()\n            QMessageBox.information(self, translator.tr(\"info\"), \"Сопоставление полей выполнено. Нажмите 'Сохранить настройки' для сохранения.\")\n\n    def save_settings(self):\n        if not self.current_entity_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Внимание\", \"Сначала выберите сущность\")\n            return\n        if not hasattr(self, 'last_mappings') or not self.last_mappings:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Внимание\", \"Сначала выполните проверку источника и сопоставление полей\")\n            return\n\n        source_type = self.source_type_combo.currentData()\n        source_path = self.source_path_edit.text().strip()\n        fmt = self.format_combo.currentData()\n        source_name = self.source_name_edit.text().strip()\n\n        if not source_path:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, translator.tr(\"error\"), \"Укажите путь к источнику\")\n            return\n\n        try:\n            # Находим id_field (первый маппинг с target='sourceid')\n            id_field = None\n            for m in self.last_mappings:\n                if m.target_field == 'sourceid':\n                    id_field = m.source_field\n                    break\n\n            # Сохраняем или обновляем запись в import_sources\n            if self.source_id:\n                sql = \"\"\"UPDATE meta.import_sources SET\n                         source_name=%s, source_type=%s, source_path=%s, format=%s, id_field=%s, updated_at=now()\n                         WHERE id=%s\"\"\"\n                self.db.execute_query(sql, (source_name, source_type, source_path, fmt, id_field, self.source_id), fetch=False)\n            else:\n                sql = \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.import_sources\n                         (entitytypeid, source_name, source_type, source_path, format, id_field)\n                         VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s) RETURNING id\"\"\"\n                res = self.db.execute_query(sql, (self.current_entity_id, source_name, source_type, source_path, fmt, id_field))\n                if res:\n                    self.source_id = res[0][0]\n\n            # Удаляем старые маппинги\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.import_mappings WHERE import_source_id = %s\", (self.source_id,), fetch=False)\n\n            # Для каждого маппинга создаём или обновляем поле в meta.fields (если нужно) и вставляем запись в import_mappings\n            for mapping in self.last_mappings:\n                if mapping.target_field == 'sourceid':\n                    # sourceid уже создаётся автоматически, просто сохраняем маппинг\n                    pass\n                elif mapping.is_reference:\n                    # Для ссылочного поля: убеждаемся, что поле с именем ref_field_name существует и имеет тип 'R'\n                    # Проверяем, есть ли уже такое поле\n                    sql_check = \"SELECT id FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid=%s AND cfieldname=%s\"\n                    exists = self.db.execute_query(sql_check, (self.current_entity_id, mapping.ref_field_name))\n                    if not exists:\n                        # Создаём поле типа 'R'\n                        sql_insert = \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.fields\n                                         (entitytypeid, cfieldname, cfieldtype, calias, nlength, ndecimals, lisindexed, ref_entitytypeid, status_id)\n                                         VALUES (%s, %s, 'R', %s, 0, 0, false, %s, 1) RETURNING id\"\"\"\n                        target_entity_name = self.db.execute_query(\"SELECT cname FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id=%s\", (mapping.ref_entitytype_id,))\n                        alias = f\"Ссылка на {target_entity_name[0][0]}\" if target_entity_name else \"Ссылка\"\n                        self.db.execute_query(sql_insert, (self.current_entity_id, mapping.ref_field_name, alias, mapping.ref_entitytype_id), fetch=False)\n                    # Сохраняем маппинг с target = ref_field_name\n                    target = mapping.ref_field_name\n                else:\n                    target = mapping.target_field\n\n                # Вставляем запись в import_mappings (для sourceid тоже вставляем, но is_reference=false)\n                sql_ins_map = \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.import_mappings\n                                 (import_source_id, target_field, source_field, is_reference, ref_entitytypeid, ref_field_name)\n                                 VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)\"\"\"\n                self.db.execute_query(sql_ins_map, (self.source_id, target, mapping.source_field,\n                                                    mapping.is_reference, mapping.ref_entitytype_id, mapping.ref_field_name), fetch=False)\n\n            QMessageBox.information(self, translator.tr(\"info\"), \"Настройки импорта сохранены\")\n            self.load_settings()  # обновим статус\n        except Exception as e:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, translator.tr(\"error\"), f\"Не удалось сохранить настройки: {str(e)}\")\n\n    def run_import(self):\n        if not self.current_entity_id or not self.source_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, \"Внимание\", \"Сначала сохраните настройки импорта\")\n            return\n\n        # Загружаем настройки из БД\n        settings = load_source_settings(self.db, self.source_id)\n        if not settings:\n            QMessageBox.critical(self, translator.tr(\"error\"), \"Не удалось загрузить настройки импорта\")\n            return\n\n        # Добавляем id в settings для использования в engine (для обновления last_import)\n        settings.id = self.source_id\n\n        engine = ImportEngine(self.db, settings, self.current_entity_id)\n        try:\n            # В будущем можно добавить прогресс-бар и выполнение в отдельном потоке\n            engine.run()\n            QMessageBox.information(self, translator.tr(\"info\"), \"Импорт успешно завершён\")\n            self.load_settings()  #
