      "import_models.py": "\n\n# import_models.py\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Optional, List\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass Mapping:\n    \"\"\"Сопоставление одного поля.\"\"\"\n    target_field: str           # имя поля в сущности (или специальное 'sourceid')\n    source_field: str           # поле в источнике\n    is_reference: bool = False\n    ref_entitytype_id: Optional[int] = None   # для ссылок\n    ref_field_name: Optional[str] = None      # имя создаваемого ссылочного поля\n\n\n@dataclass\nclass SourceSettings:\n    \"\"\"Настройки источника импорта.\"\"\"\n    source_type: str            # 'F' или 'U'\n    source_path: str\n    format: str                 # 'J', 'X', 'D'\n    source_name: str = \"\"\n    id_field: str = \"\"          # поле в источнике, которое будет sourceid\n    mappings: List[Mapping] = None",
      "import_readers.py": "\n\n# import_readers.py\nimport json\nimport xml.etree.ElementTree as ET\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Iterator\n\ntry:\n    from dbfread import DBF\n    DBF_AVAILABLE = True\nexcept ImportError:\n    DBF_AVAILABLE = False\n\n\nclass BaseReader(ABC):\n    \"\"\"Абстрактный читатель источника данных.\"\"\"\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def get_fields(self) -> List[str]:\n        \"\"\"Возвращает список имён полей в источнике.\"\"\"\n        pass\n\n    @abstractmethod\n    def __iter__(self) -> Iterator[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        \"\"\"Итератор по записям, каждая запись – словарь поле->значение.\"\"\"\n        pass\n\n\nclass JsonReader(BaseReader):\n    def __init__(self, path: str):\n        self.path = path\n        with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            data = json.load(f)\n        if isinstance(data, list):\n            self.records = data\n        else:\n            self.records = [data]\n\n    def get_fields(self) -> List[str]:\n        if self.records:\n            return list(self.records[0].keys())\n        return []\n\n    def __iter__(self) -> Iterator[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        for rec in self.records:\n            yield rec\n\n\nclass XmlReader(BaseReader):\n    def __init__(self, path: str):\n        self.path = path\n        self.tree = ET.parse(path)\n        self.root = self.tree.getroot()\n        # Предполагаем, что записи – это дочерние элементы корня\n        self.records = list(self.root)\n\n    def get_fields(self) -> List[str]:\n        if self.records:\n            # Собираем все возможные теги из первого элемента\n            return [child.tag for child in self.records[0]]\n        return []\n\n    def __iter__(self) -> Iterator[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        for elem in self.records:\n            rec = {child.tag: child.text for child in elem}\n            yield rec\n\n\nclass DbfReader(BaseReader):\n    def __init__(self, path: str):\n        if not DBF_AVAILABLE:\n            raise ImportError(\"Библиотека dbfread не установлена. Установите: pip install dbfread\")\n        self.table = DBF(path, ignore_missing_memofile=True)\n        self.records = list(self.table)\n\n    def get_fields(self) -> List[str]:\n        return [field.name for field in self.table.fields]\n\n    def __iter__(self) -> Iterator[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        for rec in self.records:\n            yield dict(rec)",

      "import_utils.py": "# import_utils.py\nfrom database import DatabaseService\nfrom typing import Dict, Optional, List, Tuple\n\n\ndef get_entity_cname(db: DatabaseService, entitytype_id: int) -> Optional[str]:\n    \"\"\"Возвращает системное имя сущности (cname) по её ID.\"\"\"\n    res = db.execute_query(\"SELECT cname FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id=%s\", (entitytype_id,))\n    return res[0][0] if res else None\n\n\ndef ensure_sourceid_field(db: DatabaseService, entitytype_id: int, field_type: str = 'C', length: int = 100) -> None:\n    \"\"\"\n    Проверяет наличие поля sourceid в ext-таблице и в meta.fields, создаёт при необходимости.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Проверяем в meta.fields\n    res = db.execute_query(\"SELECT id FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid=%s AND cfieldname='sourceid'\", (entitytype_id,))\n    if not res:\n        # Создаём поле\n        sql = \"\"\"INSERT INTO meta.fields\n                 (entitytypeid, cfieldname, cfieldtype, calias, nlength, lisindexed, status_id)\n                 VALUES (%s, 'sourceid', %s, 'Source ID', %s, true, 1) RETURNING id\"\"\"\n        new_id = db.execute_query(sql, (entitytype_id, field_type, length))\n        if new_id:\n            # Вызываем синхронизацию\n            db.execute_procedure(\"meta.p_field_sync\", (new_id[0][0],))\n    # Поле уже существует – ничего не делаем\n\n\ndef load_reference_mappings(db: DatabaseService, ref_entitytype_id: int) -> Dict[str, int]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Загружает маппинг sourceid -> instanceid для указанной сущности.\n    Возвращает словарь {sourceid_value: instanceid}.\n    \"\"\"\n    cname = get_entity_cname(db, ref_entitytype_id)\n    if not cname:\n        return {}\n    ext_table = f\"ext.ext_{cname}\"\n    sql = f\"\"\"\n        SELECT e.sourceid, v.instanceid\n        FROM {ext_table} e\n        JOIN data.entity_versions v ON v.id = e.versionid\n        WHERE e.sourceid IS NOT NULL\n    \"\"\"\n    rows = db.execute_query(sql)\n    return {str(row[0]): row[1] for row in rows}\n\n\ndef load_source_settings(db: DatabaseService, import_source_id: int) -> Optional['SourceSettings']:\n    \"\"\"\n    Загружает настройки из БД в объект SourceSettings.\n    \"\"\"\n    from import_models import SourceSettings, Mapping\n\n    # Загружаем маппинги\n    sql_map = \"\"\"SELECT target_field, source_field, is_reference, ref_entitytypeid, ref_field_name\n                 FROM meta.import_mappings\n                 WHERE import_source_id = %s\n                 ORDER BY id\"\"\"\n    map_rows = db.execute_query(sql_map, (import_source_id,))\n\n    mappings = []\n    for row in map_rows:\n        target, source, is_ref, ref_etype, ref_fname = row\n        mappings.append(Mapping(\n            target_field=target,\n            source_field=source,\n            is_reference=is_ref,\n            ref_entitytype_id=ref_etype,\n            ref_field_name=ref_fname\n        ))\n\n    return SourceSettings(\n        source_type=source_type,\n        source_path=source_path,\n        format=fmt,\n        source_name=source_name,\n        id_field=id_field,\n        mappings=mappings\n    )",

delete_element(self):\n        element_id = self.get_selected_id()\n        if not element_id:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'),\n                                self.translator.tr('warning_select_element'))\n            return\n\n        # Проверяем, есть ли дочерние элементы\n        sql = \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meta.form_elements WHERE parentid = %s\"\n        res = self.db.execute_query(sql, (element_id,))\n        child_count = res[0][0] if res else 0\n\n        if child_count > 0:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'),\n                                self.translator.tr('warning_element_has_children'))\n            return\n\n        if QMessageBox.question(self, self.translator.tr('confirm_delete'),\n                                self.translator.tr('confirm_delete_element')) == QMessageBox.Yes:\n            self.db.execute_query(\"DELETE FROM meta.form_elements WHERE id = %s\", (element_id,), fetch=False)\n            self.load_elements()\n\n    def _move_item(self, delta):\n        \"\"\"Перемещает элемент вверх/вниз (меняет isortorder)\"\"\"\n        element_id = self.get_selected_id()\n        if not element_id:\n            return\n\n        # Получаем текущий элемент и его родителя\n        sql = \"SELECT parentid, isortorder FROM meta.form_elements WHERE id = %s\"\n        row = self.db.execute_query(sql, (element_id,))\n        if not row:\n            return\n        parent_id, current_sort = row[0]\n\n        new_sort = current_sort + delta\n        if new_sort < 0:\n            new_sort = 0\n\n        # Обновляем порядок\n        self.db.execute_query(\n            \"UPDATE meta.form_elements SET isortorder = %s WHERE id = %s\",\n            (new_sort, element_id), fetch=False\n        )\n\n        # Пересортировываем элементы с тем же родителем\n        if parent_id:\n            sql = \"\"\"\n                UPDATE meta.form_elements \n                SET isortorder = new_sort\n                FROM (\n                    SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY isortorder) * 10 as new_sort\n                    FROM meta.form_elements\n                    WHERE parentid = %s\n                ) AS sorted\n                WHERE meta.form_elements.id = sorted.id\n            \"\"\"\n            self.db.execute_query(sql, (parent_id,), fetch=False)\n        else:\n            sql = \"\"\"\n                UPDATE meta.form_elements \n                SET isortorder = new_sort\n                FROM (\n                    SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY isortorder) * 10 as new_sort\n                    FROM meta.form_elements\n                    WHERE formid = %s AND parentid IS NULL\n                ) AS sorted\n                WHERE meta.form_elements.id = sorted.id\n            \"\"\"\n            self.db.execute_query(sql, (self.form_id,), fetch=False)\n\n        self.load_elements()\n\n    def move_up(self):\n        self._move_item(-10)\n\n    def move_down(self):\n        self._move_item(10)",

      "form_designer_launcher.py": "# /home/sergey/Documents/configurate/tabs/forms/form_designer_launcher.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nimport os\nimport json\nimport subprocess\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import QMessageBox, QApplication\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import QObject, Signal, QTimer\n\nfrom lang.local_translator import LocalTranslator\n\n\nclass FormDesignerLauncher(QObject):\n    \"\"\"Запуск Qt Designer с файловой синхронизацией\"\"\"\n\n    form_saved = Signal(dict)\n\n    def __init__(self, parent=None, db=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.parent = parent\n        self.db = db\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n        self.ui_file_path = None\n        self.form_alias = None\n\n        # Каталог для хранения .ui файлов\n        self.forms_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(__file__))), \"forms\")\n        os.makedirs(self.forms_dir, exist_ok=True)\n\n    def launch(self, form_json, form_alias):\n        \"\"\"Запускает Qt Designer с формой\"\"\"\n        self.form_alias = form_alias\n        self.ui_file_path = os.path.join(self.forms_dir, f\"{form_alias}.ui\")\n\n        # 1. Создаём .ui файл из JSON (или пустой)\n        self._create_ui_file(form_json)\n\n        # 2. Запускаем Qt Designer и ждём\n        try:\n            subprocess.run(['designer', self.ui_file_path], check=False)\n\n            # 3. После закрытия загружаем результат\n            QTimer.singleShot(500, self._load_result)\n\n        except FileNotFoundError:\n            QMessageBox.critical(\n                self.parent,\n                self.translator.tr('error'),\n                self.translator.tr('designer_not_found')\n            )\n\n    def _create_ui_file(self, form_json):\n        \"\"\"Создаёт .ui файл из JSON\"\"\"\n        # Подготовка JSON\n        if not form_json:\n            ui_content = self._get_empty_ui()\n        elif isinstance(form_json, str):\n            try:\n                form_dict = json.loads(form_json)\n                ui_content = self._json_to_ui(form_dict)\n            except json.JSONDecodeError:\n                ui_content = self._get_empty_ui()\n        else:\n            ui_content = self._json_to_ui(form_json)\n\n        # Записываем файл\n        with open(self.ui_file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            f.write(ui_content)\n\n    def _get_empty_ui(self):\n        \"\"\"Возвращает пустой .ui файл\"\"\"\n        return '''<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n<ui version=\"5.0\">\n <class>Form</class>\n <widget class=\"QWidget\" name=\"Form\">\n  <property name=\"geometry\">\n   <rect>\n    <x>0</x>\n    <y>0</y>\n    <width>800</width>\n    <height>600</height>\n   </rect>\n  </property>\n  <property name=\"windowTitle\">\n   <string>Новая форма</string>\n  </property>\n </widget>\n</ui>'''\n\n    def _json_to_ui(self, form_json):\n        \"\"\"Конвертирует JSON в .ui XML\"\"\"\n        form_name = form_json.get('objectName', 'Form')\n        window_title = form_json.get('windowTitle', 'Новая форма')\n        width = form_json.get('geometry', {}).get('width', 800)\n        height = form_json.get('geometry', {}).get('height', 600)\n\n        return f'''<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n<ui version=\"5.0\">\n <class>{form_name}</class>\n <widget class=\"QWidget\" name=\"{form_name}\">\n  <property name=\"geometry\">\n   <rect>\n    <x>0</x>\n    <y>0</y>\n    <width>{width}</width>\n    <height>{height}</height>\n   </rect>\n  </property>\n  <property name=\"windowTitle\">\n   <string>{window_title}</string>\n  </property>\n </widget>\n</ui>'''\n\n    def _load_result(self):\n        \"\"\"Загружает результат из .ui файла в JSON\"\"\"\n        if not self.ui_file_path or not os.path.exists(self.ui_file_path):\n            return\n\n        try:\n            form_json = self._ui_to_json(self.ui_file_path)\n            if form_json:\n                self.form_saved.emit(form_json)\n        except Exception as e:\n            QMessageBox.critical(\n                self.parent,\n                self.translator.tr('error'),\n                f\"{self.translator.tr('designer_reload_error')}: {str(e)}\"\n            )\n        finally:\n            # 4. Удаляем .ui файл\n            self._cleanup()\n\n    def _ui_to_json(self, ui_file_path):\n        \"\"\"Загружает JSON из .ui файла\"\"\"\n        import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET\n\n        tree = ET.parse(ui_file_path)\n        root = tree.getroot()\n\n        main_widget = root.find('.//widget')\n        if main_widget is None:\n            return None\n\n        form_name = main_widget.get('name', 'Form')\n\n        window_title_elem = root.find('.//property[@name=\"windowTitle\"]/string')\n        window_title = window_title_elem.text if window_title_elem is not None else 'Новая форма'\n\n        width, height = 800, 600\n        width_elem = root.find('.//property[@name=\"geometry\"]/rect/width')\n        height_elem = root.find('.//property[@name=\"geometry\"]/rect/height')\n        if width_elem is not None and width_elem.text:\n            width = int(width_elem.text)\n        if height_elem is not None and height_elem.text:\n            height = int(height_elem.text)\n\n        return {\n            \"class\": \"MozartForm\",\n            \"objectName\": form_name,\n            \"windowTitle\": window_title,\n            \"geometry\": {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": width, \"height\": height},\n            \"widgets\": [],\n            \"connections\": [],\n            \"custom_properties\": {}\n        }\n\n    def _cleanup(self):\n        \"\"\"Удаляет временный .ui файл\"\"\"\n        if self.ui_file_path and os.path.exists(self.ui_file_path):\n            try:\n                os.unlink(self.ui_file_path)\n            except:\n                pass",

Убеждаемся, что form_json — это словарь\n    if isinstance(form_json, str):\n        try:\n            import json\n            form_json = json.loads(form_json)\n        except:\n            form_json = get_empty_form_json()\n\n    if not form_json:\n        form_json = get_empty_form_json()\n\n    fd, temp_file = tempfile.mkstemp(suffix='.ui', prefix='mozart_form_')\n    os.close(fd)\n    json_to_ui(json_data=form_json, output_ui_path=temp_file)\n    return temp_file\n\n\ndef load_from_ui_file(ui_file_path):\n    \"\"\"Загружает форму из .ui файла и возвращает JSON\"\"\"\n    from utils.ui_to_json import convert_ui_to_json\n    return convert_ui_to_json(ui_file_path=ui_file_path)",
      "form_wizard.py": "# /home/sergey/Documents/configurate/tabs/forms/form_wizard.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nimport json\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (\n    QWizard, QWizardPage, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QLabel,\n    QComboBox, QListWidget, QListWidgetItem, QCheckBox,\n    QPushButton, QMessageBox, QGridLayout, QGroupBox\n)\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import Qt, Signal\n\nfrom lang.local_translator import LocalTranslator\nfrom database import DatabaseService\n\n\nclass FormWizard(QWizard):\n    \"\"\"Волшебник создания форм\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, db, entity_id=None, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.db = db\n        self.entity_id = entity_id\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n\n        self.setWindowTitle(self.translator.tr('wizard_title'))\n        self.resize(800, 600)\n\n        # Страницы\n        self.entity_page = EntitySelectPage(db, self)\n        self.type_page = FormTypePage(self)\n        self.fields_page = FieldsSelectPage(db, self)\n\n        self.addPage(self.entity_page)\n        self.addPage(self.type_page)\n        self.addPage(self.fields_page)\n\n        # Если entity_id передан, пропускаем страницу выбора\n        if entity_id:\n            self.entity_page.entity_id = entity_id\n            self.entity_page.load_entity_info()\n\n    def get_result(self):\n        \"\"\"Возвращает результат мастера\"\"\"\n        return {\n            'entity_id': self.entity_page.entity_id,\n            'form_type': self.type_page.get_form_type(),\n            'form_name': self.type_page.get_form_name(),\n            'form_alias': self.type_page.get_form_alias(),\n            'selected_fields': self.fields_page.get_selected_fields(),\n            'is_grid': self.type_page.is_grid_mode()\n        }\n\n\nclass EntitySelectPage(QWizardPage):\n    \"\"\"Страница выбора сущности\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, db, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.db = db\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n        self.entity_id = None\n\n        self.setTitle(self.translator.tr('entity_page_title'))\n        self.setSubTitle(self.translator.tr('entity_page_subtitle'))\n\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n\n        self.combo_entity = QComboBox()\n        self.combo_entity.currentIndexChanged.connect(self.on_entity_changed)\n        layout.addWidget(QLabel(self.translator.tr('select_entity')))\n        layout.addWidget(self.combo_entity)\n\n        self.info_label = QLabel()\n        self.info_label.setWordWrap(True)\n        layout.addWidget(self.info_label)\n\n        layout.addStretch()\n\n        self.load_entities()\n\n    def load_entities(self):\n        \"\"\"Загружает список сущностей\"\"\"\n        rows = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT id, cname, calias, class_id \n            FROM meta.entitytypes \n            ORDER BY cname\n        \"\"\")\n\n        self.combo_entity.clear()\n        self.combo_entity.addItem(self.translator.tr('select_entity_hint'), None)\n\n        for row in rows:\n            eid, cname, calias, class_id = row\n            # Определяем класс сущности\n            class_res = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"SELECT calias FROM meta.entity_classes WHERE id = %s\", (class_id,)\n            )\n            class_alias = class_res[0][0] if class_res else \"DICT\"\n            self.combo_entity.addItem(f\"{cname} ({calias}) - {class_alias}\", eid)\n\n    def on_entity_changed(self, index):\n        \"\"\"При выборе сущности\"\"\"\n        self.entity_id = self.combo_entity.currentData()\n        self.load_entity_info()\n        self.completeChanged.emit()\n\n    def load_entity_info(self):\n        \"\"\"Загружает информацию о сущности\"\"\"\n        if not self.entity_id:\n            self.info_label.setText(\"\")\n            return\n\n        # Получаем количество полей\n        fields_count = self.db.execute_query(\n            \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meta.fields WHERE entitytypeid = %s\", (self.entity_id,)\n        )\n        fields_count = fields_count[0][0] if fields_count else 0\n\n        # Получаем класс сущности\n        class_res = self.db.execute_query(\"\"\"\n            SELECT ec.calias, ec.cname \n            FROM meta.entitytypes et\n            JOIN meta.entity_classes ec ON et.class_id = ec.id\n            WHERE et.id = %s\n        \"\"\", (self.entity_id,))\n\n        class_info = f\"{class_res[0][1]} ({class_res[0][0]})\" if class_res else \"DICT\"\n\n        self.info_label.setText(\n            f\"{self.translator.tr('entity_info')}:\\n\"\n            f\"  • {self.translator.tr('fields_count')}: {fields_count}\\n\"\n            f\"  • {self.translator.tr('entity_class')}: {class_info}\"\n        )\n\n    def isComplete(self):\n        return self.entity_id is not None\n\n\nclass FormTypePage(QWizardPage):\n    \"\"\"Страница выбора типа формы\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.translator = LocalTranslator()\n\n        self.setTitle(self.translator.tr('type_page_title'))\n        self.setSubTitle(self.translator.tr('type_page_subtitle'))\n\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n\n        #        }\n\n        # parent=None для независимости от DBWorkDialog\n        dlg = FormPropertiesDialog(None, data, db=self.db, form_id=form_id)\n        if dlg.exec_() == QDialog.Accepted:\n form_id:\n            return\n\n        # Проверяем, есть ли элементы у формы\n        res = self.db.execute_query(\n            \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meta.form_elements WHERE formid = %s\",\n            (form_id,)\n        )\n        count = res[0][0] if res else 0\n\n        msg = self.translator.tr('confirm_delete_form')\n        if count > 0:\n            msg += f\"\\n\\n{self.translator.tr('warning_form_has_elements')}: {count}\"\n\n        reply = QMessageBox.question(\n            self,\n            self.translator.tr('confirm_delete'),\n            msg,\n            QMessageBox.Yes | QMessageBox.No\n        )\n\n        if reply == QMessageBox.Yes:\n            self.db.execute_query(\n                \"DELETE FROM meta.form_elements WHERE formid = %s\",\n                (form_id,),\n                fetch=False\n            )\n            self.db.execute_query(\n                \"DELETE FROM meta.forms WHERE id = %s\",\n                (form_id,),\n                fetch=False\n            )\n            self.load_forms()\n\n    def _save_form(self, data, form_id=None):\n        \"\"\"Сохраняет форму в БД\"\"\"\n        mstate = data.get(\"mstate_json\")\n        if isinstance(mstate, dict):\n            mstate = json.dumps(mstate, ensure_ascii=False)\n\n        if form_id:\n            sql = \"\"\"\n                UPDATE meta.forms \n                SET cname=%s, calias=%s, ientitytypeid=%s, mstate_json=%s\n                WHERE id=%s\n            \"\"\"\n            self.db.execute_query(sql, (\n                data[\"cname\"], data[\"calias\"],\n                data[\"ientitytypeid\"], mstate, form_id\n            ), fetch=False)\n        else:\n            sql = \"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO meta.forms (cname, calias, ientitytypeid, mstate_json)\n                VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s) RETURNING id\n            \"\"\"\n            res = self.db.execute_query(sql, (\n                data[\"cname\"], data[\"calias\"], data[\"ientitytypeid\"], mstate\n            ))\n            if res:\n                form_id = res[0][0]\n\n        self.load_forms()\n        return form_id\n\n    def _create_form_from_wizard(self, result):\n        \"\"\"Создаёт форму по результатам мастера\"\"\"\n        # Генерируем JSON формы на основе выбранных полей\n        form_json = result['entity_id'],\n            'mstate_json': form_json\n        })\n\n        if form_id:\n            QMessageBox.information(\n                self,\n                self.translator.tr('info'),\n                self.translator.tr('form_created_success')\n            )\n\n    def _generate_form_json(self, result):\n        \"\"\"Генерирует JSON формы на основе выбранных полей\"\"\"\n        if result['is_grid']:\n            return self._generate_grid_form_json(result)\n        else:\n            return self._generate_edit_form_json(result)\n\n    def _generate_grid_form_json(self, result):\n        \"\"\"Генерирует JSON для табличной формы\"\"\"\n        columns = []\n        for field in result['selected_fields']:\n            # Получаем информацию о поле\n            field_info = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT calias, cfieldtype \n                FROM meta.fields \n                WHERE cfieldname = %s AND entitytypeid = %s\n                \"\"\",\n                (field, result['entity_id'])\n            )\n            if field_info:\n                columns.append({\n                    \"field\": field,\n                    \"header\": field_info[0][0],\n                    \"width\": 150\n                })\n\n        return {\n            \"class\": \"MozartForm\",\n            \"objectName\": result['form_alias'],\n            \"windowTitle\": result['form_name'],\n            \"geometry\": {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": 1000, \"height\": 600},\n            \"widgets\": [\n                {\n                    \"class\": \"MozartGrid\",\n                    \"name\": \"grid_main\",\n                    \"geometry\": {\"x\": 10, \"y\": 10, \"width\": 980, \"height\": 500},\n                    \"properties\": {\n                        \"columns_json\": json.dumps(columns),\n                        \"allow_filter\": True,\n                        \"allow_sort\": True\n                    }\n                }\n            ],\n            \"toolbar\": [\n                {\"text\": self.translator.tr('btn_add'), \"action\": \"add\", \"icon\": \"add\"},\n                {\"text\": self.translator.tr('btn_edit'), \"action\": \"edit\", \"icon\": \"edit\"},\n                {\"text\": self.translator.tr('btn_delete'), \"action\": \"delete\", \"icon\": }\n\n    def _generate_edit_form_json(self, result):\n        \"\"\"Генерирует JSON для формы редактирования\"\"\"\n        controls = []\n        y = 10\n\n        # Получаем класс контрола по типу поля\n        def get_control_type(field_type):\n            type_map = {\n                'C': 'TextBox',\n                'I': 'NumberBox',\n                'N': 'NumberBox',\n                'D': 'DateBox',\n                'T': 'DateBox',\n                'L': 'CheckBox',\n                'M': 'Memo',\n                'R': 'Reference'\n            }\n            return type_map.get(field_type, 'TextBox')\n\n        for field in result['selected_fields']:\n            field_info = self.db.execute_query(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT calias, cfieldtype \n                FROM meta.fields \n                WHERE cfieldname = %s AND entitytypeid = %s\n                \"\"\",\n                (field, result['entity_id'])\n            )\n            if field_info:\n                calias = field_info[0][0]\n                field_type = field_info[0][1]\n                control_type = get_control_type(field_type)\n\n                control = {\n                    \"class\": f\"Mozart{control_type}\",\n                    \"name\": field,\n                    \"geometry\": {\"x\": 10, \"y\": y, \"width\": 300, \"height\": 30},\n                    \"properties\": {\n                        \"label\": calias,\n                        \"binding_field\": field\n                    }\n                }\n\n                # Для ссылочных полей добавляем entity_alias\n                if field_type == 'R':\n                    # Получаем целевую сущность для ссылки\n                    ref_res = self.db.execute_query(\n                        \"\"\"\n                        SELECT ref_entitytypeid \n                        FROM meta.fields \n                        WHERE cfieldname = %s AND entitytypeid = %s\n                        \"\"\",\n                        (field, result['entity_id'])\n                    )\n                    if ref_res and ref_res[0][0]:\n                        ref_entity = self.db.execute_query(\n                            \"SELECT calias FROM meta.entitytypes WHERE id = %s\",\n                            (ref_res[0][0],)\n                        )\n                        if ref_entity:\n                            control[\"properties\"][\"entity_alias\"] = ref_entity[0][0]\n                            control[\"properties\"][\"display_field\"] = \"cname\"\n\n                controls.append(control)\n                y += 40\n\n        # Вычисляем высоту формы\n        height = min(800, y + 100)\n\n        return {\n            \"class\": \"MozartForm\",\n            \"objectName\": result['form_alias'],\n            \"windowTitle\": result['form_name'],\n            \"geometry\": {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": 600, \"height\": height},\n            \"widgets\": controls,\n            \"toolbar\": [\n                {\"text\": self.translator.tr('btn_save'), \"action\": \"save\", \"icon\": \"save\"},\n                {\"text\": self.translator.tr('btn_cancel'), \"action\": \"cancel\", \"icon\": \"cancel\"}\n            ],\n            \"custom_properties\": {\n                \"entity_alias\": result.get('entity_alias', u ON urc.userid = u.id\n                 JOIN auth.roles r ON urc.roleid = r.id\n                 JOIN auth.balanceunits bu ON urc.balanceunitid = bu.id\n                 ORDER BY urc.id\"\"\"\n col, item)\n\n    def get_selected_id(self):\n        row = self.table.currentRow()\n        if row >= 0:\n            item = self.table.item(row, 0)\n            if item:\n                return item.data(Qt.UserRole)\n        return None\n\n    def get_users_list(self):\n        return self.db.execute_query(\"SELECT id, clogin FROM auth.users ORDER BY clogin\")\n\n    def FROM auth.balanceunits ORDER BY cname\")\n\n    def add_context(self):\n        users = self.get_users_list()\n        roles = self.get_roles_list()\n        bus = self.get_bus_list()\n\n        if Exception as e:\n                if \"already has an interface role\" in str(e):\n                    self.show_error(\"Нельзя назначить пользователю две интерфейсные роли в одной балансовой data[\"roleid\"] == current_roleid and\n                    data[\"balanceunitid\"] == current_buid):\n                return\n\n            try:\n                sql = \"\"\"UPDATE auth.userrolecontext\n                         SET userid=%s, roleid=%s, balanceunitid=%s\n                         WHERE id=%s\"\"\"\n                self.db.execute_query(sql, (data[\"userid\"], data[\"roleid\"],\n                                            data[\"balanceunitid\"], ctx_id), fetch=False)\n                self.load_data()\n            except Exception as e:\n                if tree_item.setText(2, form_name)\n            tree_item.setText(3, self.translator.tr('yes') if lisactive else self.translator.tr('no'))\n            tree_item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole, item_id)\n            tree_item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole + 1, parent_id)\n            tree_item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole + 2, sortorder)\n            tree_item.setData(0, Qt.UserRole + 3, iformid)\n\n parent_id in items:\n                items[parent_id].addChild(tree_item)\n            else:\n                self.tree.addTopLevelItem(tree_item)\n\n        self.tree.expandAll()\n\n    def _move_item(self, delta):\n        item = self.get_selected_item()\n        if not item:\n            QMessageBox.warning(self, self.translator.tr('warning'),\n                                self.translator.tr('warning_select_record'))\n            return\n\n        item_id = item.data(0, Qt.UserRole)\n        parent_id = item.data(0, Qt.UserRole + 1)\n        current_sort = item.data(0, Qt.UserRole + 2)\n        new_sort = current_sort + delta\n\n        if new_sort < 0:\n            new_sort = 0\n\n        # Обновляем порядок\n        sql = \"UPDATE meta.menu SET isortorder = %s WHERE id = %s\"\n        self.db.execute_query(sql, (new_sort, item_id), fetch=False)\n\n        # Пересортировываем элементы с тем же родителем\n        if parent_id:\n            sql = \"\"\"\n   "tensor_crypto.py": "# tensor_crypto.py\n\nimport random\nimport numpy as np\nfrom hashlib import sha256\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Арифметика в конечном поле GF(p)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nclass GFp:\n    \"\"\"Элемент поля Fp (простое p).\"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, value, p):\n        self.p = p\n        self.value = value % p\n\n    def __add__(self, other):\n        return GFp((self.value + other.value) % self.p, self.p)\n    def __sub__(self, other):\n        return GFp((self.value - other.value) % self.p, self.p)\n    def __mul__(self, other):\n        return GFp((self.value * other.value) % self.p, self.p)\n    def __truediv__(self, other):\n        inv = pow(other.value, self.p-2, self.p)\n        return GFp((self.value * inv) % self.p, self.p)\n    def __neg__(self):\n        return GFp((-self.value) % self.p, self.p)\n    def __eq__(self, other):\n        return self.value == other.value and self.p == other.p\n    def __int__(self):\n        return self.value\n    def __repr__(self):\n        return str(self.value)\n\ndef random_element(p):\n    return GFp(random.randrange(p), p)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Матрицы n x n над GF(p)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nclass Matrix:\n    def __init__(self, n, p, data=None):\n        self.n = n\n        self.p = p\n        if data is not None:\n            self.data = data\n        else:\n            self.data = [[GFp(0, p) for _ in range(n)] for _ in range(n)]\n\n    def __getitem__(self, idx):\n        return self.data[idx]\n\n    def __setitem__(self, idx, val):\n        self.data[idx] = val\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def identity(n, p):\n        m = Matrix(n, p)\n        for i in range(n):\n            m[i][i] = GFp(1, p)\n        return m\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def random_invertible(n, p):\n        \"\"\"Генерация случайной обратимой матрицы через LU-подобный метод.\"\"\"\n        # Создаём верхнетреугольную с единицами на диагонали и случайными наддиагональными\n        # и нижнетреугольную со случайными поддиагональными и диагональю 1.\n        # Перемножаем, получаем обратимую.\n        L = Matrix.identity(n, p)\n        U = Matrix.identity(n, p)\n        for i in range(n):\n            for j in range(i+1, n):\n                L[j][i] = random_element(p)\n                U[i][j] = random_element(p)\n        # Перемножаем L * U\n        M = Matrix(n, p)\n        for i in range(n):\n            for j in range(n):\n                s = GFp(0, p)\n                for k in range(n):\n                    s = s + L[i][k] * U[k][j]\n                M[i][j] = s\n        return M\n\n    def inverse(self):\n        \"\"\"Обратная матрица методом Гаусса-Жордана.\"\"\"\n        n = self.n\n        # Расширенная матрица [A | I]\n        a = [[self[i][j] for j in range(n)] for i in range(n)]\n        inv = [[GFp(1, p) if i==j else GFp(0, p) for j in range(n)] for i in range(n)]\n\n        for col in range(n):\n            # поиск ненулевого элемента в столбце col\n            pivot_row = col\n            while pivot_row < n and a[pivot_row][col] == GFp(0, self.p):\n                pivot_row += 1\n            if pivot_row == n:\n                raise ValueError(\"Matrix is singular\")\n            if pivot_row != col:\n                a[col], a[pivot_row] = a[pivot_row], a[col]\n                inv[col], inv[pivot_row] = inv[pivot_row], inv[col]\n\n            pivot = a[col][col]\n            inv_pivot = GFp(1, self.p) / pivot\n            for j in range(n):\n                a[col][j] = a[col][j] * inv_pivot\n                inv[col][j] = inv[col][j] * inv_pivot\n\n            for r in range(n):\n                if r != col:\n                    factor = a[r][col]\n                    if factor != GFp(0, self.p):\n                        for j in range(n):\n                            a[r][j] = a[r][j] - factor * a[col][j]\n                            inv[r][j] = inv[r][j] - factor * inv[col][j]\n\n        result = Matrix(n, self.p)\n        for i in range(n):\n            for j in range(n):\n                result[i][j] = inv[i][j]\n        return result\n\n    def __mul__(self, other):\n        \"\"\"Умножение матриц.\"\"\"\n        n = self.n\n        result = Matrix(n, self.p)\n        for i in range(n):\n            for k in range(n):\n                aik = self[i][k]\n                if aik != GFp(0, self.p):\n                    for j in range(n):\n                        result[i][j] = result[i][j] + aik * other[k][j]\n        return result\n\n    def to_bytes(self):\n        \"\"\"Сериализация матрицы в байты (для хэширования).\"\"\"\n        data = b''\n        for i in range(self.n):\n            for j in range(self.n):\n                data += int(self[i][j]).to_bytes(2, 'big')  # т.к. p < 2^16\n        return data\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# 3-тензоры n x n x n над GF(p)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nclass Tensor3:\n    def __init__(self, n, p, data=None):\n        self.n = n\n        self.p = p\n        if data is not None:\n            self.data = data\n        else:\n            self.data = np.empty((n, n, n), dtype=object)\n            for i in range(n):\n                for j in range(n):\n                    for k in range(n):\n                        self.data[i,j,k] = GFp(0, p)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def fixed_tensor(n, p):\n        \"\"\"\n        Эталонный тензор T0 с ненулевыми элементами только при i=j и k=1.\n        T0[i,i,1] = 1 для всех i.\n        Индексы: 0..n-1.\n        \"\"\"\n        T = Tensor3(n, p)\n        for i in range(n):\n            T.data[i,i,1] = GFp(1, p)\n        return T\n\n    def apply_isometry(self, A, B, C):\n        \"\"\"Применяет (A, B, C) к тензору: возвращает новый тензор.\"\"\"\n        n = self.n\n        p = self.p\n\n        # Преобразование по первому измерению\n        T1 = np.empty((n, n, n), dtype=object)\n        for i in range(n):\n            for i1 in range(n):\n                coeff = A[i][i1]\n                if coeff != GFp(0, p):\n                    for j in range(n):\n                        for k in range(n):\n                            if i == 0 and j == 0 and k == 0:\n                                T1[i,j,k] = coeff * self.data[i1,j,k]\n                            else:\n                                T1[i,j,k] = T1[i,j,k] + coeff * self.data[i1,j,k]\n\n        # по второму измерению\n        T2 = np.empty((n, n, n), dtype=object)\n        for j in range(n):\n            for j1 in range(n):\n                coeff = B[j][j1]\n                if coeff != GFp(0, p):\n                    for i in range(n):\n                        for k in range(n):\n                            if i == 0 and j == 0 and k == 0:\n                                T2[i,j,k] = coeff * T1[i,j1,k]\n                            else:\n                                T2[i,j,k] = T2[i,j,k] + coeff * T1[i,j1,k]\n\n        # по третьему измерению\n        T3 = np.empty((n, n, n), dtype=object)\n        for k in range(n):\n            for k1 in range(n):\n                coeff = C[k][k1]\n                if coeff != GFp(0, p):\n                    for i in range(n):\n                        for j in range(n):\n                            if i == 0 and j == 0 and k == 0:\n                                T3[i,j,k] = coeff * T2[i,j,k1]\n                            else:\n                                T3[i,j,k] = T3[i,j,k] + coeff * T2[i,j,k1]\n\n        result = Tensor3(n, p)\n        result.data = T3\n        return result\n\n    def __repr__(self):\n        return f\"Tensor3({self.n}, {self.p})\"\n\n    def to_bytes(self):\n        \"\"\"Сериализация тензора в байты.\"\"\"\n        data = b''\n        for i in range(self.n):\n            for j in range(self.n):\n                for k in range(self.n):\n                    data += int(self.data[i,j,k]).to_bytes(2, 'big')\n        return data\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Параметры системы (должны быть одинаковы у всех участников)\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\nP = 65521        # простое число (2^16 - 15)\nN = 16           # размерность тензора (можно увеличить до 32 для безопасности)\nT0 = Tensor3.fixed_tensor(N, P)\n\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\n# Основные функции криптосистемы\n# ------------------------------------------------------------\ndef generate_keypair():\n    \"\"\"Генерирует пару (публичный тензор, секретные матрицы).\"\"\"\n    B = Matrix.random_invertible(N, P)\n    C = Matrix.random_invertible(N, P)\n    I = Matrix.identity(N, P)\n    T_pub = T0.apply_isometry(I, B, C)\n    return T_pub, (B, C)\n\ndef message_to_matrix(message: bytes, n: int, p: int) -> Matrix:\n    \"\"\"\n    Преобразует байтовое сообщение в матрицу n x n над GF(p).\n    Сообщение дополняется хэшем для обеспечения целостности и произвольной длины.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Вычисляем хэш сообщения (32 байта) и добавляем в начало\n    h = sha256(message).digest()\n    data = h + message\n    # Дополняем нулями до n*n*2 байт (т.к. каждый элемент матрицы кодируется 2 байтами)\n    total_cells = n * n\n    needed = total_cells * 2\n    if len(data) < needed:\n        data += b'\\x00' * (needed - len(data))\n    else:\n        data = data[:needed]\n    # Разбиваем на пары байт и превращаем в числа\n    M = Matrix(n, p)\n    idx = 0\n    for i in range(n):\n        for j in range(n):\n            val = data[idx] * 256 + data[idx+1]\n            M[i][j] = GFp(val, p)\n            idx += 2\n    return M\n\ndef matrix_to_message(M: Matrix) -> bytes:\n    \"\"\"\n    Извлекает сообщение из матрицы.\n    Ожидается, что первые 32 байта – хэш, затем само сообщение, затем дополнение.\n    \"\"\"\n    n = M.n\n    # Собираем байты\n    data = b''\n    for i in range(n):\n        for j in range(n):\n            v = int(M[i][j])\n            data += v.to_bytes(2, 'big')\n    # Извлекаем хэш (первые 32 байта) и остальное\n    h_received = data[:32]\n    rest = data[32:]\n    # Ищем нулевое дополнение в конце\n    rest = rest.rstrip(b'\\x00')\n    # Проверяем хэш\n    h_calc = sha256(rest).digest()\n    if h_received != h_calc:\n        raise ValueError(\"Контрольная сумма не совпадает – сообщение повреждено\")\n    return rest\n\ndef encrypt(public_tensor: Tensor3, message: bytes) -> Tensor3:\n    \"\"\"Шифрует сообщение с использованием публичного тензора.\"\"\"\n    X = message_to_matrix(message, public_tensor.n, public_tensor.p)\n    I = Matrix.identity(public_tensor.n, public_tensor.p)\n    # Вычисляем Y = (X, I, I) · T_pub\n    Y = public_tensor.apply_isometry(X, I, I)\n    return Y\n\ndef decrypt(secret_matrices, cipher_tensor: Tensor3) -> bytes:\n    \"\"\"Дешифрует тензор, используя секретные матрицы (B, C).\"\"\"\n    B, C = secret_matrices\n    n = cipher_tensor.n\n    p = cipher_tensor.p\n    I = Matrix.identity(n, p)\n    Binv = B.inverse()\n    Cinv = C.inverse()\n    # Z = (I, Binv, Cinv) · Y\n    Z = cipher_tensor.apply_isometry(I, Binv, Cinv)\n    # Извлекаем матрицу X из слоя k=1 (индекс 1)\n    X = Matrix(n, p)\n    for i in range(n):\n        for j in range(n):\n            X[i][j] = Z.data[i,j,1]\n    return matrix_to_message(X)",
  "tensor_crypto_cell.py": "import numpy as np\nimport os\nfrom cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.aead import AESGCM\n\nclass TensorLWE:\n    def __init__(self, n=8, q=1021, use_rip=True):\n        self.n = n\n        self.q = q\n        self.use_rip = use_rip\n\n        # Секретный тензор S (разреженный, чтобы шум был мал)\n        self.S = np.random.choice([-1, 0, 1], size=(n, n, n), p=[0.1, 0.8, 0.1])\n\n        # Разрыв ткани (опционально)\n        if use_rip:\n            self.axis_rip = tuple(np.random.permutation(3))\n            self.slice_rip = np.random.permutation(n)\n            self.S_fixed = self._rip(self.S)\n        else:\n            self.S_fixed = self.S\n\n        # Публичный ключ: A случайный, B = A * S_fixed + E (малый шум)\n        self.A = np.random.randint(0, q, size=(n, n, n), dtype=np.int64)\n        self.E = np.random.randint(-1, 2, size=(n, n, n), dtype=np.int64)\n        self.B = (np.einsum('iab,abk->ibk', self.A, self.S_fixed) + self.E) % q\n\n    def _rip(self, T):\n        T = np.transpose(T, self.axis_rip)\n        return np.take(T, self.slice_rip, axis=0)\n\n    def _contract(self, R, T):\n        return np.einsum('iab,abk->ibk', R, T) % self.q\n\n    def encrypt_bit(self, bit, A, B):\n        R = np.random.choice([-1, 0, 1], size=(self.n, self.n, self.n), p=[0.1, 0.8, 0.1])\n        m = bit * (self.q // 2)\n        m_tensor = np.full((self.n, self.n, self.n), m, dtype=np.int64)\n        U = self._contract(R, A)\n        V = (self._contract(R, B) + m_tensor) % self.q\n        return U, V\n\n    def decrypt_bit(self, U, V):\n        diff = (V - self._contract(U, self.S_fixed)) % self.q\n        diff = np.minimum(diff, self.q - diff)\n        return 1 if np.mean(diff) > self.q // 4 else 0\n\n    # --- Методы для байтов ---\n    def encrypt_bytes(self, data: bytes, A, B) -> list:\n        bits = []\n        for byte in data:\n            for i in range(8):\n                bits.append((byte >> (7 - i)) & 1)\n        cipher = []\n        for b in bits:\n            U, V = self.encrypt_bit(b, A, B)\n            cipher.append((U, V))\n        return cipher\n\n    def decrypt_bytes(self, cipher: list) -> bytes:\n        bits = [self.decrypt_bit(U, V) for (U, V) in cipher]\n        byte_list = []\n        for i in range(0, len(bits), 8):\n            if i + 8 <= len(bits):\n                byte = 0\n                for j in range(8):\n                    byte = (byte << 1) | bits[i + j]\n                byte_list.append(byte)\n        return bytes(byte_list)\n\n\ndef generate_keypair(n=4, q=1021, use_rip=True):\n    bob = TensorLWE(n, q, use_rip)\n    return bob, (bob.A, bob.B)\n\n\ndef encrypt_session_key(public_key, symmetric_key: bytes) -> list:\n    A, B = public_key\n    tmp = TensorLWE(n=A.shape[0], q=1021, use_rip=True)\n    return tmp.encrypt_bytes(symmetric_key, A, B)\n\n\ndef decrypt_session_key(private_bob, ciphertext: list) -> bytes:\n    return private_bob.decrypt_bytes(ciphertext)\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    # 1. Генерация ключей Боба\n    bob, bob_pub = generate_keypair(n=4, q=1021, use_rip=True)\n\n    # 2. Сессионный ключ (32 байта для AES-256)\n    session_key = os.urandom(32)\n    print(f\"Сессионный ключ (hex): {session_key.hex()}\")\n\n    # 3. Алиса шифрует ключ публичным ключом Боба\n    enc_key = encrypt_session_key(bob_pub, session_key)\n\n    # 4. Боб расшифровывает\n    dec_key = decrypt_session_key(bob, enc_key)\n    assert session_key == dec_key, \"Ошибка: ключи не совпадают\"\n    print(\"✅ Сессионный ключ успешно передан через TensorLWE\")\n\n    # 5. Текст для шифрования (Евгений Онегин)\n    onegin = (\n        \"Мой дядя самых честных правил,\\n\"\n        \"Когда не в шутку занемог,\\n\"\n        \"Он уважать себя заставил\\n\"\n        \"И лучше выдумать не мог.\\n\"\n        \"Его пример другим наука;\\n\"\n        \"Но, боже мой, какая скука\\n\"\n        \"С больным сидеть и день и ночь,\\n\"\n        \"Не отходя ни шагу прочь!\\n\"\n        \"Какое низкое коварство\\n\"\n        \"Полуживого забавлять,\\n\"\n        \"Ему подушки поправлять,\\n\"\n        \"Печально подносить лекарство,\\n\"\n        \"Вздыхать и думать про себя:\\n\"\n        \"Когда же чёрт возьмёт тебя!\"\n    )\n\n    # 6. AES-GCM шифрование\n    aes = AESGCM(session_key)\n    nonce = os.urandom(12)\n    ciphertext = aes.encrypt(nonce, onegin.encode('utf-8'), None)\n\n    # 7. Расшифровка\n    decrypted_text = aes.decrypt(nonce, ciphertext, None).decode('utf-8')\n\n    print(\"\\n--- Расшифрованный текст ---\")\n    print(decrypted_text)\n\n    if decrypted_text == onegin:\n        print(\"\\n✅ Гибридная криптосистема работает идеально!\")\n    else:\n        print(\"\\n❌ Ошибка при расшифровке текста\")",

    "json_to_ui.py": "# /home/sergey/Documents/configurate/utils/json_to_ui.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n# Утилита для конвертации JSON обратно в .ui файл\n\nimport json\nimport xml.etree.ElementTree as ET\nfrom xml.dom import minidom\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, Optional\n\n\nclass JSONtoUIConverter:\n    \"\"\"\n    Конвертирует JSON-структуру формы обратно в .ui файл.\n    Используется для редактирования существующих форм.\n    Поддерживает пустые/битые данные — всегда создаёт валидный .ui файл.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self):\n        self.namespaces = {\n            'ui': 'http://schemas.qt.io/qt/designer/ui/5.0'\n        }\n\n    def convert(self, json_data: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None, json_file_path: str = None,\n                output_file_path: str = None) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Конвертирует JSON в .ui файл.\n\n        Args:\n            json_data: JSON-структура формы (опционально)\n            json_file_path: путь к JSON файлу (опционально)\n            output_file_path: путь для сохранения .ui файла (опционально)\n\n        Returns:\n            XML-строка .ui файла\n        \"\"\"\n        # Загружаем данные\n        if json_file_path:\n            try:\n                with open(json_file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n                    json_data = json.load(f)\n            except:\n                json_data = None\n\n        # Если данные не загрузились, создаём пустую форму\n        if not json_data:\n            json_data = self._get_empty_form()\n\n        # Создаём корневой элемент\n        root = ET.Element('ui', {\n            'version': '5.0'\n        })\n\n        # Добавляем класс формы\n        class_elem = ET.SubElement(root, 'class')\n        class_elem.text = json_data.get('class', 'MozartForm')\n\n        # Добавляем имя объекта\n        object_name_elem = ET.SubElement(root, 'objectName')\n        object_name_elem.text = json_data.get('objectName', 'Form')\n\n        # Добавляем заголовок окна\n        window_title_elem = ET.SubElement(root, 'windowTitle')\n        window_title_elem.text = json_data.get('windowTitle', 'Новая форма')\n\n        # Добавляем геометрию\n        self._add_geometry(root, json_data.get('geometry', {}))\n\n        # Добавляем свойства\n        self._add_properties(root, json_data.get('custom_properties', {}))\n\n        # Добавляем виджеты\n        widgets_elem = ET.SubElement(root, 'widget', {\n            'class': json_data.get('class', 'MozartForm'),\n            'name': json_data.get('objectName', 'Form')\n        })\n        for widget_data in json_data.get('widgets', []):\n            self._add_widget(widgets_elem, widget_data)\n\n        # Добавляем связи\n        self._add_connections(root, json_data.get('connections', []))\n\n        # Форматируем XML\n        xml_str = self._prettify_xml(root)\n\n        # Сохраняем в файл\n        if output_file_path:\n            with open(output_file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n                f.write(xml_str)\n            print(f\"Конвертация завершена: {output_file_path}\")\n\n        return xml_str\n\n    def _get_empty_form(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Возвращает parent, geometry: Dict[str, int]):\n        \"\"\"Добавляет геометрию в элемент\"\"\"\n        rect = ET.SubElement(parent, 'rect')\n\n        x = ET.SubElement(rect, 'x')\n        x.text = str(geometry.get('x', 0))\n\n        y = ET.SubElement(rect, 'y')\n        y.text = str(geometry.get('y', 0))\n\n        width = ET.SubElement(rect, 'width')\n        width.text = str(geometry.get('width', 800))\n\n        height = ET.SubElement(rect, 'height')\n        height.text = str(geometry.get('height', 600))\n\n    def _add_properties(self, parent, properties: Dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Добавляет свойства в элемент\"\"\"\n        for name, value in properties.items():\n            prop = ET.SubElement(parent, 'property', {'name': name})\n\n            if isinstance(value, bool):\n                bool_elem = ET.SubElement(prop, 'bool')\n                bool_elem.text = 'true' if value else 'false'\n            elif isinstance(value, int):\n                number_elem = ET.SubElement(prop, 'number')\n                number_elem.text = str(value)\n            else:\n                string_elem = ET.SubElement(prop, 'string')\n                string_elem.text = str(value)\n\n    def _add_widget(self, parent, widget_data: Dict[str, Any]):\n        \"\"\"Добавляет виджет в дерево\"\"\"\n        widget_class = widget_data.get('class', 'QWidget')\n        widget_name = widget_data.get('name', '')\n\n        if not widget_name:\n            return\n\n        widget = ET.SubElement(parent, 'widget', {'class': widget_class, 'name': widget_name})\n\n        # Добавляем геометрию\n        self._add_geometry(widget, widget_data.get('geometry', {}))\n\n        # Добавляем свойства\n        self._add_properties(widget, widget_data.get('properties', {}))\n\n        # Добавляем кастомные свойства\n        for name, value in widget_data.get('custom_properties', {}).items():\n            self._add_properties(widget, {name: value})\n\n        # Добавляем дочерние виджеты\n        for child in widget_data.get('children', []):\n            self._add_widget(widget, child)\n\n    def _add_connections(self, parent, connections: list):\n        \"\"\"Добавляет связи сигнал-слот\"\"\"\n        if not connections:\n            return\n\n        conns_elem = ET.SubElement(parent, 'connections')\n        for conn_data in connections:\n            conn = ET.SubElement(conns_elem, 'connection')\n\n            sender = ET.SubElement(conn, 'sender')\n            sender.text = conn_data.get('sender', '')\n\n            signal = ET.SubElement(conn, 'signal')\n            signal.text = conn_data.get('signal', '')\n\n            receiver = ET.SubElement(conn, 'receiver')\n            receiver.text = conn_data.get('receiver', '')\n\n            slot = ET.SubElement(conn, 'slot')\n            slot.text = conn_data.get('slot', '')\n\n    def _prettify_xml(self, element) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Форматирует XML с отступами\"\"\"\n        rough_string = ET.tostring(element, encoding='unicode')\n        reparsed = minidom.parseString(rough_string)\n        return reparsed.toprettyxml(indent='  ')\n\n\ndef json_to_ui(json_file_path: str = None, json_data: Dict = None, output_ui_path: str = None) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    Утилитарная функция для конвертации JSON     "ui_to_json.py": "# /home/sergey/Documents/configurate/utils/ui_to_json.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n# Утилита для конвертации .ui файлов в JSON для хранения в meta.forms\n\nimport json\nimport xml.etree.ElementTree as ET\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Any, Optional\n\n\nclass UItoJSONConverter:\n    \"\"\"\n    Конвертирует .ui файл (XML) в JSON-структуру для хранения в meta.forms.\n    Сохраняет геометрию, свойства виджетов, связи событий.\n    Поддерживает пустые/битые файлы — всегда возвращает валидный JSON.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self):\n        self.namespaces = {'ui': 'http://schemas.qt.io/qt/designer/ui/5.0'}\n\n    def convert(self, ui_file_path: Optional[str] = None, xml_content: Optional[str] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Конвертирует .ui файл или XML-строку в JSON.\n\n        Args:\n            ui_file_path: путь к .ui файлу (опционально)\n            xml_content: XML-строка (опционально)\n\n        Returns:\n            JSON-структура формы (всегда валидная)\n        \"\"\"\n        # Базовый пустой результат\n        result = self._get_empty_result()\n\n        try:\n            if ui_file_path:\n                tree = ET.parse(ui_file_path)\n            elif xml_content:\n                tree = ET.ElementTree(ET.fromstring(xml_content))\n            else:\n                return result\n\n            root = tree.getroot()\n\n            result[\"class\"] = self._get_text(root, 'class', 'MozartForm')\n            result[\"objectName\"] = self._get_text(root, 'objectName', 'Form')\n            result[\"windowTitle\"] = self._get_text(root, 'windowTitle', 'Новая форма')\n            result[\"geometry\"] = self._get_geometry(root)\n            result[\"widgets\"] = self._get_widgets(root)\n            result[\"connections\"] = self._get_connections(root)\n            result[\"custom_properties\"] = self._get_custom_properties(root)\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f\"Ошибка при конвертации: {e}. Возвращена пустая форма.\")\n\n        return result\n\n    def _get_empty_result(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Возвращает пустую валидную структуру формы\"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"class\": \"MozartForm\",\n            \"objectName\": \"Form\",\n            \"windowTitle\": \"Новая форма\",\n            \"geometry\": {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": 800, \"height\": 600},\n            \"widgets\": [],\n            \"connections\": [],\n            \"custom_properties\": {}\n        }\n\n    def _get_text(self, element, tag, default=''):\n        \"\"\"Возвращает текст дочернего элемента\"\"\"\n        child = element.find(f'.//ui:{tag}', self.namespaces)\n        if child is not None and child.text:\n            return child.text.strip()\n        return default\n\n    def _get_geometry(self, root) -> Dict[str, int]:\n        \"\"\"Извлекает геометрию формы\"\"\"\n        try:\n            geometry = root.find('.//ui:geometry', self.namespaces)\n            if geometry is None:\n                return {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": 800, \"height\": 600}\n\n            x = geometry.find('.//ui:x', self.namespaces)\n            y = geometry.find('.//ui:y', self.namespaces)\n            width = geometry.find('.//ui:width', self.namespaces)\n            height = geometry.find('.//ui:height', self.namespaces)\n\n            return {\n                \"x\": int(x.text) if x is not None and x.text else 0,\n                \"y\": int(y.text) if y is not None and y.text else 0,\n                \"width\": int(width.text) if width is not None and width.text else 800,\n                \"height\": int(height.text) if height is not None and height.text else 600\n            }\n        except:\n            return {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": 800, \"height\": 600}\n\n    def _get_widgets(self, root) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        \"\"\"Извлекает все виджеты формы\"\"\"\n        widgets = []\n        try:\n            items = root.findall('.//ui:widget', self.namespaces)\n            for item in items:\n                widget = self._parse_widget(item)\n                if widget:\n                    widgets.append(widget)\n        except:\n            pass\n        return widgets\n\n    def _parse_widget(self, widget_elem) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        \"\"\"Парсит отдельный виджет\"\"\"\n        try:\n            class_name = self._get_text(widget_elem, 'class', 'QWidget')\n            name = self._get_text(widget_elem, 'objectName', '')\n\n            if not name:\n                return None\n\n            result = {\n                \"class\": class_name,\n                \"name\": name,\n                \"geometry\": self._get_widget_geometry(widget_elem),\n                \"properties\": self._get_widget_properties(widget_elem),\n                \"custom_properties\": self._get_widget_custom_properties(widget_elem)\n            }\n\n            # Рекурсивно обрабатываем дочерние виджеты\n            children = widget_elem.findall('.//ui:widget', self.namespaces)\n            if children:\n                result[\"children\"] = [self._parse_widget(child) for child in children if\n                                      self._get_text(child, 'objectName', '')]\n\n            return result\n        except:\n            return None\n\n    def _get_widget_geometry(self, widget_elem) -> Dict[str, int]:\n        \"\"\"Извлекает геометрию виджета\"\"\"\n        try:\n            rect = widget_elem.find('.//ui:rect', self.namespaces)\n            if rect is None:\n                return {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": 100, \"height\": 30}\n\n            x = rect.find('.//ui:x', self.namespaces)\n            y = rect.find('.//ui:y', self.namespaces)\n            width = rect.find('.//ui:width', self.namespaces)\n            height = rect.find('.//ui:height', self.namespaces)\n\n            return {\n                \"x\": int(x.text) if x is not None and x.text else 0,\n                \"y\": int(y.text) if y is not None and y.text else 0,\n                \"width\": int(width.text) if width is not None and width.text else 100,\n                \"height\": int(height.text) if height is not None and height.text else 30\n            }\n        except:\n            return {\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"width\": 100, \"height\": 30}\n\n    def _get_widget_properties(self, widget_elem) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Извлекает стандартные свойства виджета\"\"\"\n        properties = {}\n        try:\n            props = widget_elem.findall('.//ui:property', self.namespaces)\n            for prop in props:\n                name = prop.get('name')\n                if name in ('geometry', 'objectName'):\n                    continue\n\n                value_elem = prop.find('.//ui:string', self.namespaces)\n                if value_elem is not None and value_elem.text:\n                    properties[name] = value_elem.text\n                    continue\n\n                bool_elem = prop.find('.//ui:bool', self.namespaces)\n                if bool_elem is not None and bool_elem.text:\n                    properties[name] = bool_elem.text.lower() == 'true'\n                    continue\n\n                number_elem = prop.find('.//ui:number', self.namespaces)\n                if number_elem is not None and number_elem.text:\n                    properties[name] = int(number_elem.text)\n                    continue\n        except:\n            pass\n        return properties\n\n    def _get_widget_custom_properties(self, widget_elem) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Извлекает кастомные свойства виджета\"\"\"\n        custom_properties = {}\n        try:\n            props = widget_elem.findall('.//ui:property', self.namespaces)\n            for prop in props:\n                name = prop.get('name')\n                if name in ('geometry', 'objectName', 'text', 'windowTitle', 'enabled', 'visible'):\n                    continue\n\n                string_val = prop.find('.//ui:string', self.namespaces)\n                if string_val is not None and string_val.text:\n                    custom_properties[name] = string_val.text\n                    continue\n\n                bool_val = prop.find('.//ui:bool', self.namespaces)\n                if bool_val is not None and bool_val.text:\n                    custom_properties[name] = bool_val.text.lower() == 'true'\n                    continue\n\n                number_val = prop.find('.//ui:number', self.namespaces)\n                if number_val is not None and number_val.text:\n                    custom_properties[name] = int(number_val.text)\n                    continue\n        except:\n            pass\n        return custom_properties\n\n    def _get_connections(self, root) -> List[Dict[str, str]]:\n        \"\"\"Извлекает связи сигнал-слот\"\"\"\n        connections = []\n        try:\n            conns = root.findall('.//ui:connection', self.namespaces)\n            for conn in conns:\n                sender = conn.find('.//ui:sender', self.namespaces)\n                signal = conn.find('.//ui:signal', self.namespaces)\n                receiver = conn.find('.//ui:receiver', self.namespaces)\n                slot = conn.find('.//ui:slot', self.namespaces)\n\n                if sender is not None and signal is not None:\n                    connections.append({\n                        \"sender\": sender.text.strip() if sender.text else \"\",\n                        \"signal\": signal.text.strip() if signal.text else \"\",\n                        \"receiver\": receiver.text.strip() if receiver and receiver.text else \"\",\n                        \"slot\": slot.text.strip() if slot and slot.text else \"\"\n                    })\n        except:\n            pass\n        return connections\n\n    def _get_custom_properties(self, root) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Извлекает кастомные свойства формы\"\"\"\n        custom = {}\n        try:\n            props = root.findall('.//ui:property', self.namespaces)\n            for prop in props:\n                name = prop.get('name')\n                if name in ('geometry', 'objectName', 'windowTitle', 'enabled', 'visible'):\n                    continue\n\n                string_val = prop.find('.//ui:string', self.namespaces)\n                if string_val is not None and string_val.text:\n                    custom[name] = string_val.text\n                    continue\n\n                bool_val = prop.find('.//ui:bool', self.namespaces)\n                if bool_val is not None and bool_val.text:\n                    custom[name] = bool_val.text.lower() == 'true'\n                    continue\n\n                number_val = prop.find('.//ui:number', self.namespaces)\n                if number_val is not None and number_val.text:\n                    custom[name] = int(number_val.text)\n                    continue\n        except:\n            pass\n        return custom\n\n\ndef convert_ui_to_json(ui_file_path: str = None, xml_content: str = None, output_file_path: str = None) -> Dict[\n    str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Утилитарная функция для конвертации .ui файла или XML в JSON.\n\n    Args:\n        ui_file_path: путь к .ui файлу (опционально)\n        xml_content: XML-строка (опционально)\n        output_file_path: путь для сохранения JSON (опционально)\n\n    Returns:\n        JSON-структура формы (всегда валидная)\n    \"\"\"\n    converter = UItoJSONConverter()\n    result = converter.convert(ui_file_path, xml_content)\n\n    if output_file_path:\n        with open(output_file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            json.dump(result, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)\n        print(f\"Конвертация завершена: {output_file_path}\")\n\n    return result\n\n\ndef create_empty_form_json(output_file_path: str = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Создаёт JSON для пустой формы.\n\n    Args:\n        output_file_path: путь для сохранения JSON (опционально)\n\n    Returns:\n        JSON-структура пустой формы\n    \"\"\"\n    converter = UItoJSONConverter()\n    result =
